Name: Bodycote
Description:
With more than 165 locations in 22 countries, Bodycote is the world’s leading provider of heat treatment and specialist thermal processing services.  Thermal processing encompasses a variety of techniques and processes which improve the properties of metals and alloys and extend the life of components and is a vital part of any manufacturing process.

Phone: +44 (0)1625 505300
Contact us: http://www.bodycote.com/contact

Name: PT Krakatau Steel (Persero) Tbk
Description: An integrated steel company, a largest steel maker in Indonesia, headquartered in Cilegon, Banten. The location is on the western end of West Java and adjacent to the Sunda Strait, and where the Krakatoa volcano and island from which the company takes its name are located.

Name: Baku Steel Company
Description:
A flagship of the modern metallurgy of Azerbaijan Republic Baku Steel Company CJSC is the first up-to-date steelworks in the Caucasus region.

The Company was inaugurated by the National Leader Heydar Aliyev on June 21, 2001.

An electric arc furnace (EAF) with application of alternative energy supply, which is widely used in Germany, USA, France, Italy and other advanced countries, a ladle-furnace, cutting-edge continuous casting machine (CCM) are installed in Baku Steel Company LLC. Operation of the main power units in the process of steel melting is controlled automatically according to set programs. Using a state-of-the-art steelmaking and continuous casting technology the Company produces different grades of steel billets with cross sections of 120x120, 140x140, 150x150 mm and the length of 12000 mm and hot-rolled re-bars with diameters ranged from 10.0 to 32.0 mm cut to length of from 6000 to 12000 mm.

Name: Speira
Description:
Speira is a leading European aluminium rolling and recycling company, comprising a total of eleven recycling and production sites in Germany and Norway plus own research and development. We recycle up to 650,000 tons of aluminium per year and produce around one million tons of advanced rolled products. The plants include the Alunorf joint venture, the world’s largest aluminium rolling mill, and Grevenbroich, the world’s largest refining plant. Our customers include top industrial companies in automotive, packaging, printing, engineering, and construction.

Our purpose extends beyond business growth; we aim to set the sustainability benchmark in the industry by delivering high-quality, low-carbon products. We minimize emissions across the entire value chain, using recycled materials and ressources efficiently. To indicate products with at least 75% recycled content or emissions close to zero, we have developed the labels ORBIS and RIVOS, underscoring our commitment to build a circular world that works.

Name: Metal Park
Description: Metal Park revolutionises the metal industry by providing a dynamic industrial hub where leading companies can seamlessly adapt to market demands. Our innovative model eliminates infrastructure constraints through asset-as-a-service, pioneering a global-first pay-as-you-go structure.

Name: AZZ Inc
Description: AZZ Inc. is a leading provider of galvanizing and a variety of metal coating solutions and coil coating solutions to a broad range of end-markets in North America. AZZ’s Metal Coatings segment is a leading provider of metal finishing solutions for corrosion protection, including hot-dip galvanizing, spin galvanizing, powder coating, anodizing and plating, to the steel fabrication industry.  AZZ’s Precoat Metals Segment is a leading provider of aesthetic and corrosion protective coatings to the steel and aluminum coil market.

Name: Metalúrgica Nunes
Description:
Desde fevereiro de 1985, a Metalúrgica Nunes se destaca no desenvolvimento de soluções em usinagem de precisão com tradição e alta performance. Fornece peças e serviços para indústrias de tecnologia de ponta nos mercados nacional e internacional.
 
	Atua em segmentos como: automotivo, agrícola, eletro-doméstico, eletro-eletrônico, refrigeração industrial, calçadista, dentre outros.
 
	Principais produtos: adaptadores, arruelas, buchas, bujões, conexões, distribuidores, eixos, êmbolos, flanges, hastes, nípeis, parafusos especiais, pinos, pistões e porcas, além da montagem de sub-conjuntos.
 
	A qualificação dos produtos é assegurada pelo moderno laboratório de metrologia que possui equipamentos como o tridimensional CNC, rugosímetro, projetor de perfil, durômetro, entre outros.
 
	A tecnologia tem aliados como os centros de usinagem, tornos CNC com sistema de alimentação por barras e blanks de até 400mm de diâmetro e tornos automáticos A25. Laminadoras de rosca, fresadoras, furadeiras e retíficas centerless complementam o parque industrial.
 
	A empresa respeita os seus profissionais como o principal recurso da organização, investindo na capacitação e desenvolvimento contínuo. Também se preocupa com a comunidade, participando ativamente de projetos sociais e preservação do meio ambiente.
Location: São Leopoldo, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Indonesia Pomalaa Industry Park
Description: Established in 07 July 2022, PT. Indonesia Pomalaa Industry Park is one of Huayou’s subsidiary in Indonesia that focusing in new high-tech enterprise that specializing in the green industrial park, research and development, manufacturing business of new energy Li-ion battery materials and new cobalt materials with planned area of 11.808 ha. that located in Pomalaa Town, Kolaka County, Southeast Sulawesi Province, Indonesia.

Name: 247TailorSteel
Description:
247TailorSteel supplies customized laser-cut sheet and tube material, with years of experience in the sheet-steel processing industry. Thousands of customers have taken advantage of the 247TailorSteel portal, Sophia, for ordering customized sheet steel and tubes with various processing techniques online.
 
247TailorSteel strives for increasing convenience, simplicity and customization. When it comes to staying true to our customers, we are convinced of the added value brought by the ‘Internet of Things’ and artificial intelligence. Thanks to our advanced Sophia system, laser parts and side parts are automatically selected from a composite product. With Sophia (Sophisticated Intelligent Analyzer), your personal online assistant, you can easily and quickly order your tailor-made products at 247TailorSteel. Sophia stands for pioneering software with a wealth of functionalities and high ease of use.
 
This advanced software ensures efficient production process around the clock, meaning both costs and time are saved.

Name: Plansee Group
Description:
We specialize in the processing of molybdenum and tungsten. Ceratizit processes tungsten carbide into tools. Plansee processes molybdenum and tungsten metals into semifinished products and components.

The supply of our key raw materials molybdenum and tungsten is also guaranteed. Global Tungsten & Powders supplies tungsten and tungsten carbide powder both to the Plansee Group as well as to external customers. Molymet supplies molybdenum powder.

Name: USIESP Usinagens Especiais
Description: Special machining and cladding services of metallic and non-metallic products.

Name: PLANIFER
Description:
Há mais de 37 anos no mercado, a PLANIFER é especialista em usinagem de alta precisão e execução de projetos de montagem.

Atendemos setores exigentes como o aeroespacial, automobilístico, agrícola, óleo & gás e bens de capital.

Ao longo de nossa trajetória, investimos continuamente em novas tecnologias e processos para agregar valor aos produtos fabricados, com foco na excelência e na inovação.

Contamos com certificações internacionais como a AS9100 e NADCAP, além de um parque fabril moderno e profissionais altamente capacitados para atender com precisão as demandas dos nossos clientes.

Reconhecida como “Melhor Fornecedor de Usinagem”, a Planifer se destaca pela qualidade, confiabilidade e compromisso com cada entrega.

 Localizada em Campinas/SP, com fácil acesso às principais rodovias e aeroportos.

Name: Banco Aluminium Private Limited
Description: Since 57 years, Banco Aluminium is an engineering company , manufacturing extrusions and alloys and providing end to end solutions to customers world wide

Name: Breman Machinery B.V.
Description:
Breman Machinery b.v. makes components for builders of machinery, engineering bureaus and industrial end users, such as; offshore companies, the military, aerospace companies and other industrial firms.

From simple structures to complex mechanical components. 
Work-pieces of high precision, often with extreme dimensions and weights. 
Work-pieces that weigh tens or even hundreds of tonnes and are made to a precision of a hundredth of a millimeter. Samples of workmanship.

What’s unique about Breman Machinery is that they are able to produce these components and structures entirely in house. 

They have the people, machines and facilities under their own roof.
•	all machining and non-machining processing of (heavy) materials
•	welding and structures
•	assembly and fitting
•	corrosion protection

Breman Machinery uses their unique machine capacity for their own projects and to supply specific components to third parties. What they aim for is custom-designed solutions.

ISO9001, ISO3834, EN-1090-1 and VCA**-certified.

Extreme precision!

Name: Dumaco | Dé specialist in metaalbewerking
Description:
Dumaco is de nummer één one stop shop. Bij ons vindt u alle metaalbewerkingen onder één dak. Van lassen en (buis)lasersnijden tot nabewerkingen. Dat betekent: meer snelheid, meer efficiëntie en meer kwaliteit. Dumaco lever immers alleen maar vakmanschap. 

Dankzij de landelijke dekking, heeft u altijd een lokale partner in de buurt. Vanuit alle locaties bieden we een breed scala aan plaatbewerking aan. Daarbij zijn verschillende locaties gespecialiseerd in specifieke bewerkingen waaronder buislasersnijden, watersnijden, ponsen, knippen, lassen en verspanende bewerkingen zoals frezen en draaien. Zo zijn we in staat om u te voorzien van een totaalpakket.

Name: Galvanização Raitz
Description:
A galvanização é o que fazemos. Mas o que entregamos é proteção e confiança.

Há mais de três décadas, a Raitz Galvanização protege estruturas, projetos e reputações com excelência técnica e compromisso real.

Lideramos em volume porque lideramos em cuidado com o processo, com as pessoas e com o futuro.

Somos mais que aço galvanizado. Somos a força da galvanização. A confiança de ser Raitz.

Name: PLANIFER Ferramentaria e Estamparia
Description:
Há mais de trinta e cinco anos no mercado, a PLANIFER atua no ramo de usinagem de peças de alta precisão e na execução de projetos de gabaritos de montagem.

Entre os seus clientes estão os segmentos: aeroespacial, automobilístico e óleo & gás.

Ao longo da sua trajetória, a empresa se especializou em novas tecnologias e processos de usinagem para cada vez mais agregar valor aos produtos fabricados.

A busca pela excelência e o espírito de melhoria contínua, trouxe à PLANIFER o reconhecimento dos seus clientes com diversas premiações, inclusive a de “Melhor Fornecedor de Usinagem”.

Localizada próxima às principais rodovias e aeroportos, a PLANIFER conta com um parque fabril de última geração e tecnologias de ponta, somado a profissionais altamente capacitados para atender os projetos e demandas de seus clientes.

Name: AZZ Galvanizing
Description: Hot Dip Galvanizing Services.

Name: Almag S.p.A.
Description: We are brass bars producers since 1946. We are part of a holding specialized in the production of semi-finished products in non-ferrous alloys. What distinguishes us is the how: the quality of our product makes us reliable over time.

Name: VÍTKOVICE STEEL a.s.
Description:
VÍTKOVICE STEEL is a leading European manufacturer of rolled steel products and the largest manufacturer of steel plates in the Czech Republic. The main production program includes heavy plates and shaped cutouts, which are produced in the sheet metal rolling mill, and sheet piles, which are produced in the heavy beam rolling mill.
The company is the only manufacturer of sheet piles in the Czech Republic and one of only two manufacturers in the European Union. The production of heavy plates enjoys a strong market share in the key domestic market. Products undergo quality control in our own accredited testing laboratories that have the most advanced testing equipment

Name: POSCO INDIA PC (AHMEDABAD)
Description:
POSCO was launched on April 1, 1968 with a mission for national industrialization.
As the first integrated steel mill in Korea, Posco has grown to produce 41 million tons of crude steel a year,
and has grown to become a global business with production and sales in 53 countries in the world.
POSCO has continued to contribute to the development of mankind through endless innovation and developments in technology,
and has become the most competitive steel maker in the world.
POSCO will continue to be an enduring company, trusted and respected by people established its management philosophy
Corporate Citizenship: Building a Better Future Together.

Name: CTB Trattamenti Termici
Description:
Dal 1981 la passione per i Trattamenti Termici costantemente alimentata dalla ricerca di innovazioni tecnologiche in grado di soddisfare le esigenze di un mercato frenetico ed in costante mutamento. 

CTB Trattamenti Termici ha negli anni implementato la propria struttura con un parco impianti tecnologicamente all'avanguardia in grado di poter assicurare il perfetto controllo del processo termico in ogni sua singola fase nella piena salvaguardia di una elevata flessibilità produttiva. 

L'azienda si e' da sempre rivolta principalmente alla gestione di particolari di piccole dimensioni (settore oleodinamico, ingranaggeria di precisione) eseguendo Trattamenti Termici e Termochimici sia in Atmosfera Controllata che in Vuoto, Trattamenti Localizzati ad Induzione e con Laser.

Negli anni la gamma dei servizi offerti si è ulteriormente differenziata introducendo un reparto interamente dedicato alla Tecnologia della Sbavatura Termica (TEM - Thermal Deburring Method).

Name: Grupo MARSAN
Description:
En GRUPO MARSAN somos especialistas en revestimientos superficiales para automoción, con fines de protección, funcionalidad y aspecto.

Complementariamente, cubrimos en la cadena de suministro la transformación metálica, los ensamblajes, y la logística de entregas, y contamos con un Centro Tecnológico propio (“M-TECH”).

GRUPO MARSAN dispone de plantas en España (Vigo), Portugal (Valença) y México (Celaya y Villagrán).

DESCRIPCIÓN TÉCNICA DE NUESTROS SERVICIOS: 

   - REVESTIMIENTOS: cataforesis, pintura en polvo y líquida.
   - TRANSFORMACIÓN METÁLICA: desde la ingeniería de diseño y la fabricación y puesta a punto de utillajes de estampación y soldadura, hasta la homologación de primeras muestras, primeras preseries y producción en serie. 
   - ENSAMBLAJES: clipados, colocación de anti-ruidos y montaje de piezas.
   - Optimización LOGÍSTICA
   - CENTRO TECNOLÓGICO: desarrollo de proyectos de I+D+i y servicio de asesoramiento a clientes.

Name: FMI
Description:
From precision parts and mechatronic modules to mechanical tooling, if necessary, manufactured in our clean rooms.

Because we know the requirements like no other, we realize high-tech packaging for the safe transport of this sensitive equipment.

We achieve all this in our own unique way.

FMI is not just a high-tech manufacturer but your ally in progress.

Passionate and critical when needed, we autonomously pursue sustainable relationships and shared success.

Through efficient communication, smart supply chain management, and complete transparency.

While others play their cards close to their chest, we are open from the very beginning. As a close-knit organization, we are particularly proud of our people's dedication.

Whatever we produce as a high-tech manufacturer, every step is executed with precision, minimizing quality issues and delays, together with you.

This allows you to swiftly respond to market demands.

Ensuring Progress,
Empowering Innovation.

Name: Aços Trefita
Description: Steel is part of the life of every human being. Here at Aços Trefita, this essential product receives the best possible treatment, because with this care we contribute to the safety and quality of numerous products.

Name: Groupe Thermilyon - Traitement thermique
Description:
Thermi-Lyon possède un savoir-faire reconnu dans son métier depuis 1960 :
la prestation de service en traitement thermique et revêtement sous-vide.
Visitez notre chaîne Youtube :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkJcy_D8wo9USsSER0UiSOA

Name: Unimetals Group
Description:
Unimetals Recycling (UK) Limited operates one of the largest metal recycling and processing businesses in the UK and UAE. Unimetals' priority is to create commercial value by optimising the recycling, processing, refining, trading and delivery of critical and precious metals.
 
 Our services:
Scrap Metal Recycling and Collection in the UK: Unimetals are committed to offer both competitive pricing for purchasing and world class services to help clients recover value from their scrap metal products.

Precious Metal & PGM Recovery in the UAE: A unique hydrometallurgical and pyrometallurgical plant in Abu Dhabi which recovers Platinum Group Metals (PGMs) from industrial waste and byproducts.

Merchanting services: Experienced and reliable importers and exporters. Unimetals' aim is to offer trade expertise as well as storage, finance and logistics services for partners, helping them secure a safe and reliable flow of materials and opening new markets for their goods.
 
 Our Mission:
Unimetals' is committed to building a sustainable future by efficiently and responsibly managing the lifecycle of metals and minerals, ensuring their valuable contribution to various industries and global development. Supporting the circular economy – and a vision for a future where no metal ends up as waste.
 
 Commitment to Sustainability:
Dedicated to sustainability and ensuring operations focus on responsible recycling practices, resource efficiency, and environmental protection.
 
 Join our journey:
If you share our vision for a sustainable future and are passionate about making a difference in the metals industry, connect with Unimetals. Together, we can drive innovation, commercial value and build a better world through sustainability.

Name: Deprest NV
Description:
Deprest specializes in the design, manufacturing, and delivery of:
• High-quality pressure vessels
• Large chocolate tanks and pumps (10-60 tonnes)
• Filters and equipment
• Tanks, including sump tanks, storage tanks, and Vlarem-compliant tanks
• Special constructions and certified welding, alongside subcontracting services like plasma cutting and plate rolling

With decades of experience, we serve industries such as chemical, petrochemical, pharmaceutical, nuclear, and food. 

Our services include technical calculations, custom designs, production, and testing, ensuring compliance with international standards like PED, ASME, EN13445, and AD2000. We also produce vessels according to Vlarem and API regulations, including internals.

We hold the following certifications:
• ISO 9001:2015
• ISO 3834-2
• EN1090-EXC3

Our advanced workshop features state-of-the-art machinery, including automated welding technologies like PAW and SAW. We work with high-quality materials, such as vessel steel, stainless steel, and special alloys, delivering precision, durability, and reliability in every project.

We deliver innovative, high-quality, and sustainable solutions tailored to your needs. By combining technical excellence, advanced technology, and a people-focused approach, we bring your projects to life with precision and care. Sustainability is a priority—we use 100% recyclable materials and implement efficient processes to minimize environmental impact. Discover more about our EcoVadis sustainability rating on our website.

Contact us at sales@deprest.be or visit www.deprest.be for more information.

Name: MetaPro Group
Description:
With Two branches in both the United Arab Emirates and Egypt, MetaPro Group is a budding Arab-German partnership company in the Middle East and North Africa that specialises in selling chemicals for electroplating, HDG, and metal pre-treatment through exclusive agreements with reputable European brands.

Our business partnerships and highly skilled technical staff guarantee the best possible quality and level of service.

Name: Chimet Spa
Description:
Chimet is a chemical-metallurgical company, a leader in the recovery and refining of rare and precious metals (platinum, palladium, iridium, rhodium, ruthenium, copper, gold, silver).

Its activity is fully part of the circular economy objectives that are now a priority in national and European policy. Through the cycle developed by Chimet, waste becomes reusable raw materials in numerous industrial chains (petrochemical, pharmaceutical, automotive, goldsmith, electronics, fuel cells and photovoltaic panels, etc.).

The metals produced by Chimet are part of the strategic raw materials necessary for the performance of activities crucial to the productive autonomy of the country and of Europe.

Name: Paulo Heat Treating, Brazing and Metal Finishing
Description:
Paulo, an Aalberts company, delivers precision heat treating and thermal processing services that push the boundaries of what’s possible in metallurgical science. With locations strategically spread throughout North America, we support the world’s most innovative manufacturers across industries including aerospace, defense, automotive, power generation and beyond.

Our systems and processes are engineered from the ground up for consistency, traceability, and performance at scale. Backed by decades of expertise, our team of passionate experts goes above and beyond to ensure every part is processed with uncompromising quality and care.

Now part of Aalberts NV, a global leader in mission-critical technologies, we bring 80+ years of proven expertise together with the power of Aalberts’ global resources. Our proprietary datagineering approach—powered by our custom-built PICS (Production Information and Customer Service) system—ensures every part is traceable, consistent, and optimized for performance.

We provide heat treating services a broad range of industries, including:
Automotive & Heavy Truck
Aerospace & Defense
Agriculture
Firearms
Tool & Die
Medical
Mining, Oil & Gas
Power Generation

Name: Hot Deformation and Thermomechanical Processing Laboratory
Description:
Hot Deformation and Thermo-Mechanical Processing research group was founded in 1990, aiming to draw a comprehended acquaintance of the uninspected phenomena that may impress the advanced materials’
behavior in the major of Hot-Deformation and Thermo-Mechanical processing.

Name: Groupe OPTITEC
Description:
Le Groupe Optitec, fondé en 2002, est spécialisé dans les traitements de surfaces et l'application de peintures industrielles sur divers substrats tels que l'acier, le galva, l'aluminium, l'inox, le plastique, le bois et le cuivre. Le groupe est composé de plusieurs entités, #Surfacier et #Surfatech dans l'Hérault (34), #Technocoat dans le Rhône (69), #Technolaq dans l'Ain (01) et #Surfaprotec à Tunis.
Cela nous confère la capacité de traiter des séries de toutes tailles. Des petits accessoires aux pièces mesurant jusqu'à 12 mètres de longueur, nous disposons de chaînes de productions industrielles automatisées et de chaînes dédiées au traitement de pièces de grandes longueurs.

Cette polyvalence nous permet de répondre de manière efficace aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients. Nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions de traitements de surfaces de qualité, alliant expertise, durabilité et satisfaction client.

En ce qui concerne le traitement de l'acier, nous sommes fiers d'être labellisés Qualisteelcoat et d'être membres de l'association AFTA.P. A partir de 2010 pour Surfacier et depuis 2018 pour Technocoat. Ce label nous engage à fournir un service de conseil de qualité, à effectuer des traitements assurant une durabilité maximale, et nous permet de proposer des garanties par le biais de contrats d'assurance d'une durée pouvant atteindre jusqu'à 10 ans.

Promoteurs, architectes, maîtres d'œuvre, acheteurs industriels, économistes de la construction et bureaux d'étude soyez les bienvenus !

Name: ZINKPOWER
Description:
We are one of the leading hot-dip galvanizing groups.
We are represented under the ZINKPOWER brand with 45 galvanizing plants and 5 coating plants in 13 countries in Europe, America and Asia. In addition to high-quality, durable corrosion protection, our expertise also includes the flexibility and versatility of our plants: we are able to hot-dip galvanized all components in our Group, from the smallest bolt to steel girders – precisely where the customer needs this service. From the very start, environmental conservation has been one of the cornerstones of our philosophy, as is the quality of our work and our customers’ satisfaction. Lasting, environmental corrosion protection – that’s the ZINKPOWER name.

Name: Astro Pak
Description:
Astro Pak is the leader in providing Passivation, Precision Cleaning and High-Purity Chemical Cleaning services for a wide variety of “cleanliness sensitive” critical systems and components.  Many of our customers have external agencies that drive their cleaning requirements, such as the FDA, NASA and others.  We service such industries as Pharmaceutical, Biotechnology, Aerospace, Laser, Semiconductor, Water Treatment and more, including Industrial markets.  

Astro Pak has been perfecting its cleaning chemistries and processes over the past 65 years, for which we deploy crews and equipment to go on site to customer facilities, as well as processing components, hardware and assemblies at one of our state of the art Cleanrooms or Shop locations. Our services and products leverage decades of experience to deliver the most effective chemistries and techniques, resulting in increased equipment longevity, reduced corrosion-related downtime and regulatory compliance in client facilities.

Name: enim
Description:
enim is a Quebec-based sustainable development company that harvests critical and strategic minerals from an abundant source: the urban mine. With its patented, low-carbon hydrometallurgical technology and its modular, socially acceptable solution combining innovation and ecology, enim is at the forefront of a rapidly changing market: green metals. 

Visit us: https://enim.ca/

Name: APIFEMA
Description:
Granallado y pintura industriual para tanques de almacenamiento, interiores de tanques, tuberias, hormigón y cualquier tratamiento para estructras de acero.


Industrial blasting and coatings for storage tanks, tanks linings, pipelines, concrete and any steel structure treatment

Name: Wilting
Description:
Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in de efficiënte productie van hoogwaardige fijnmechanische componenten en modules, gericht op internationale High Tech industrieën zoals de halfgeleiderindustrie, lucht- en ruimtevaart, voedselverwerking, automotive en meer.

Met ruim 40 jaar ervaring in het industrialiseren van deze producten doorlopen we een gestructureerd proces dat snel en doeltreffend alle aspecten van de productie inricht. Onze focus ligt op reproduceerbaarheid en voorspelbaarheid door statistische data te gebruiken, waarbij we een man-onafhankelijk (schaalbaar) en kosteneffectief proces realiseren. We putten daarbij uit ervaringen en kennis opgebouwd in verschillende marktsegmenten.

Wilting is onderdeel van Andra Tech Group, een groep bestaande uit 9 bedrijven in Nederland en Duitsland: Wilting (Eindhoven, Wintelre en Leerdam), Kusters Precision Parts (Oss), Mayer Feintechnik (Göttingen) HFI (Groenlo), Visietech (Schijndel), DKH (Uden), Jatec (Leerdam), Lemmens Metaalbewerking (Bergeijk) en Lucassen (Sittard).

Op dit moment werken we met zo'n 700 medewerkers op 11 productielocaties dagelijks aan fijnmechanische componenten voor diverse high tech industrieën.

Name: Norm Coating
Description:
Norm Coating; 1998 yılında kurulmuş ve 1999 yılında ilk Otomatik Elektrolitik Çinko Kaplama Hattı'nı devreye alarak kaplama sektörüne girmiştir. 77.500 m2 açık, 55.500 m2 kapalı üretim alanında toplam 5 fabrikada 586 çalışanı ile hizmet vermektedir.

2020 yılı itibari ile 140.000 ton/yıl üretim kapasitesi sayesinde otomotiv başta olmak üzere beyaz eşya, inşaat, makine, mobilya, havacılık, biyomekanik ve demiryolu gibi farklı sektörlerde kullanılan bağlantı elamanlarının kaplamasını yapmaktadır.

Name: İES GALVANİZ
Description:
2015 yılında Osmanlı Organize Sanayi Bölgesi'nde faaliyete geçen İES Galvaniz  Sanayi ve Tic. A.Ş. enerji ve çelik sektörüne yönelik metal imalatı ve sıcak daldırma galvanizleme hizmetleriyle sektörde öncü bir konumda ulunmaktadır. 

50.000 m2'lik alanın 20.000 m2 'si kapalı üretim tesislerinden oluşan firmamız, ulusal ve uluslararası pazarlara yüksek standartlarda hizmet sunmaktadır.

Name: Artig Serviços Offshore
Description:
Somos uma empresa com presença global atuando com engenharia de ponta no segmento de energia, óleo e gás offshore, atuamos com “INOVAÇÃO E QUALIDADE” em usinagem, caldeiraria, soldagem, fabricação de equipamentos e estruturas destinadas a operação, manutenção e instalação submarina.
Temos um vasto portifólio de ferramentas para operação subsea ROV atuando em todas as bacias exploratórias de com presença consolidada em toda a frota de veículos operados remotamente atendendo 100% das empresas prestadores deste serviço as principais petroleiras do cenário nacional.
Estamos instalados em uma moderna fábrica contando com 20 máquinas CNC de última geração, podendo executar trabalhos com precisão e agilidade atendendo os clientes dentro do mais alto padrão internacional de qualidade.
Com um processo vertical que atende desde o corte da matéria prima até a pintura final dos equipamentos estamos prontos para entender, desenvolver e resolver as demandas de nossos clientes com completo quality control, inclusive com máquinas e braços tridimensionais, inspeção de soldagem e pintura.
Contamos com um staff de 130 profissionais qualificados, nos somos a ARTIG Offshore, inovação e qualidade!

Name: Wallwork Group Ltd
Description:
The Wallwork Group specializes in heat treatment, surface engineering, vacuum brazing, vacuum equipment manufacturing, heat-resistant casting, and hot isostatic pressing. We serve a diverse range of sectors including aerospace, automotive, biomedical, motorsport, and manufacturing across the UK and Europe.

Our Manchester facility supports aerospace heat treatment and commercial services across Northern England, Scotland, and Ireland, operating 24/7 with accreditations like AS9100, Nadcap, and Aerospace Prime.

The Birmingham location provides services like vacuum hardening, tempering, and case hardening, with a focus on tooling, prototypes, small batches, and high-volume work, all ISO 9001 compliant.

Wallwork Cambridge offers PVD/CVD coatings, heat treatment, and vacuum brazing, with AS9100, ISO 9001, and Nadcap approvals, alongside specialized coatings in partnership with Cemecon.

To extend its reach to the North East and Scotland, the Wallwork Group acquired Wallwork Newcastle (formerly Metaltech), which now offers specialized processes that were previously unavailable, enhancing our service capabilities in these regions.

Name: RMB SpA
Description:
Dal 1981 recuperiamo nuove materie prime dai rifiuti gestendo il ciclo completo nel totale rispetto dell’ambiente. Oggi possiamo affermare di essere una delle principali piattaforme polifunzionali d’Europa per il trattamento finalizzato al recupero di rifiuti speciali, pericolosi e non.

La “mission” di RMB è lavorare sempre meglio il rifiuto garantendo il recupero di una quantità crescente di frazioni valorizzabili che diventeranno fonti alternative alle materie prime estratte in natura, riducendo al minimo lo smaltimento in discarica nel rispetto delle direttive europee di settore, identificabile come concretizzazione dell'economia circolare. 

Per raggiungere questo obiettivo RMB è impegnata in una continua ricerca tecnologica e nella progettazione di impianti all’avanguardia. Grazie ad una squadra competente di tecnici l’azienda studia attentamente le normative di settore per applicarle alla gestione ed effettua attività di ricerca e sviluppo sui materiali con l’obiettivo primario di assicurare i massimi livelli di qualità e tutela ambientale garantendo al contempo un ambiente di lavoro salubre e sicuro. 

Valori aggiunti per l’azienda sono il personale specializzato e gli impianti altamente innovativi che ogni giorno svolgono attività di recupero e trasformazione da rifiuto a prodotto.

Name: Bundesverband Feuerverzinken e.V. (German Galvanizers Association)
Description: The Bundesverband Feuerverzinken e.V. (IVF), based in Düsseldorf, represents the interests of the German hot-dip galvanizing industry, which protects around 1.8 million tons of steel against corrosion (rust) by hot-dip galvanizing with a turnover of over 1 billion euros and employs around 5000 people. The association and its service organization, the Institut Feuerverzinken GmbH, represent the economic and technical interests of the German hot-dip galvanizing industry vis-à-vis the public, politicians, authorities, process users, consumers and scientific institutions. Its tasks include Lobbying Research and development Member support Public relations and process marketing Technical support for users Further training for members and process users Standardization work One focus of the association's activities is the topic of sustainability. The association understands sustainable action to be primarily product-related in an ecological sense.

Name: Chiarotti Verniciature Srl
Description:

La sua lunga tradizione, unita ad esperienza e competenza le ha permesso di specializzarsi nel trattamento di ogni tipo di supporto: metalli (acciaio, alluminio e leghe), materiali plastici e compositi (ABS, Nylon, vetroresina, polipropilene, fibra di carbonio, ecc.), legno e vetro.

Dispone di due siti produttivi che si sviluppano su una superficie di 10.000 mq, di cui 4.600 mq coperti destinati ad impianti per la realizzazione dei trattamenti superficiali. Un impianto di produzione è situato nel Comune di San Giovanni Teatino, in provincia di Chieti, ed un altro, specializzato nel trattamento di materie plastiche con un impianto completamente pressurizzato, ha sede nel Comune di Villamagna, sempre in Abruzzo.

Il lavoro del reparto di Ricerca e Sviluppo, in stretta sinergia con l’area produttiva, è costantemente orientato a promuovere l’utilizzo di attrezzature di ultima generazione e di prodotti vernicianti innovativi per ridurre l’impatto ambientale delle lavorazioni e migliorare costantemente la qualità.

Öldükten sonra arkalarında bir şeyler bırakacakları motivasyonuyla üretim yapan grup; bu motivasyon ile günlük kaygılarıyla başa çıkabilmenin yanı sıra: pozitif, kendinden emin, kendisine ve çevresine enerji veren, güler yüzlü ve hepsinden önemlisi "kendini mutlu tanımlayabilecek" insanlar olma yolunda ilerlemektedir.

Günlük hayatında Death Metal, Stoner Metal, Black Metal, Doom Metal, Thrash Metal, Groove Metal, Progressive Metal ve daha pek çok ağıza alınamayacak türde metal dinleyen grup, her şeye rağmen Ankara'da büyümüş, Türkiye'de yetişen pek çok insandan çok da farklı olmayan insanlardan oluşmaktadır. Girdikleri ortama göre her türden müziği tüketmekte ve dışarıdan bakıldığında o kadar da metalciye benzememektedirler.

Description:
Buca-Premium is known for its craftsmanship and precision. The company specializes in the design and production of stainless steel sink and drip trays, event bars and other custom products that are not only functional, but also aesthetically pleasing. These products are designed with an eye for detail and meet the highest standards in terms of hygiene, sustainability and design. Whether it concerns a hospitality industry or a stylish event location, Buca-Premium delivers custom made solutions that fit seamlessly into any setting.

Name: STN TOOLS
Description:
In het hart van de industrie, waar elke micrometer telt en elke seconde van productietijd kostbaar is, staat STN als een baken van innovatie en kwaliteit. 
Al meer dan vier decennia zijn wij de vertrouwde partner voor bedrijven die streven naar uitmuntendheid in de vliegtuig-, automobiel- algemene toelevering en medische industrie.
Onze toewijding aan precisie begon in een kleine werkplaats, waar passie voor techniek en een streven naar perfectie de drijfveren waren. 
Door de jaren heen hebben we onze vaardigheden aangescherpt en onze technologie geavanceerd, maar onze kernwaarden zijn onveranderd gebleven: integriteit, nauwkeurigheid en klanttevredenheid.
Met een team van ervaren specialisten en een arsenaal aan geavanceerde machines, bieden wij een scala aan diensten die ongeëvenaard zijn in de branche. Van reconditioneren tot balanceren, van meten tot adviseren, onze diensten zijn erop gericht om de levensduur van uw gereedschappen te verlengen en uw productieprocessen te optimaliseren.
Bij STN geloven we dat elk gereedschap een verhaal vertelt - een verhaal van vakmanschap, precisie en zorgvuldige aandacht voor detail. Wij zijn er trots op dat we deel mogen uitmaken van uw productieverhaal en kijken ernaar uit om samen te werken aan de successen van morgen.

Dzięki ciągłemu rozwojowi procesu odzysku w chwili obecnej posiadamy jedną z najnowocześniejszych i najbardziej wydajnych linii do recyklingu kabli w Europie. Dlatego też możemy zaoferować jedne z najlepszych cen na złom kabli w tej części kontynentu.

Nosso objetivo é manter um desempenho à altura da demanda do mercado. Para tanto, investimos numa estrutura organizacional dinâmica com profissionais comprometidos e recursos tecnológicos avançados.

Een stalen of bronzen deur, een toegangspoort, een ijzeren trap van Smederij Tupker, gecombineerd met creativiteit en ambachtelijk vakmanschap, zorgt voor een origineel en onderscheidend eindresultaat. Met ruim 40 jaar ervaring ben je verzekerd van maatwerk en persoonlijke service zodat alles tot in detail passend is. 

In onze smederij aan de Zuidergracht 50 te Soest laten wij je graag de vele mogelijkheden zien. Vanuit onze showroom heb je een goed uitzicht over de smidse en kun je onze ambachtslieden aan het werk zien. Aanschouw de hoogwaardige afwerking en de liefde voor het vak.

Hier kun je inspiratie opdoen en advies inwinnen. We denken graag met je mee om zo tot het een passend ontwerp te komen. Bij ons is geen idee te gek en ben je op het juiste adres wat betreft uniek maatwerk.

W oparciu o międzynarodowe normy gwarantujemy najwyższą jakość i powtarzalność realizowanych projektów, jednocześnie dbając o ochronę środowiska i zadowolenie klienta.
Naszą dodatkową i niezaprzeczalną zaletą jest kompleksowe wykonywanie zleconych usług, czyli realizacja od projektu aż po wysyłkę.

Współpracujemy z firmami na całym świecie, m.in.produkujemy do Niemiec, Holandii, Belgi, Austrii, Norwegii, Danii, Szwecji, Czech, Słowacji i Wielkiej Brytanii.

Nasze kompetencje potwierdzają certyfikaty wystawione przez międzynarodową firmę GSI-SLV na spawanie i zgrzewanie stali narzędziowej, stali wzmocnionej, stali zwykłej tzw. czarnej, oraz stali nierdzewnej. Zgodnie z normami europejskimi DIN EN ISO 3834-2 oraz EN1090-2:2008+A1:2011.
Posiadamy również certyfikat na spawanie pojazdów szynowych i części pojazdów zgodnie z normą EN 15085-2CL2.

Description:
MatCalc Engineering GmbH with its theoretical and practical expertise is your reliable partner for research, development and application in the field of materials engineering, process engineering and material computational design. -Simulation services
-Technological database development

Name: AUJOR
Description:
AUJOR – Especialistas en tratamientos del acero inoxidable desde 1961.

En AUJOR somos expertos en el tratamiento del acero inoxidable, ofreciendo soluciones integrales que mejoran sus propiedades estéticas, técnicas y anticorrosivas. Con más de 60 años de experiencia, realizamos proyectos sin limitaciones de medidas, tanto en nuestras instalaciones como directamente en casa del cliente, gracias a nuestro equipo especializado y a nuestras unidades móviles totalmente equipadas.

Nuestros servicios abarcan procesos como decapado, pasivado, electropulido, derouging, limpieza biológica, Ner-Inox, pulidos, arenados, Sublimotion process y trabajos in situ. 

Además, ponemos a disposición de nuestros clientes productos químicos, maquinaria y accesorios necesarios para estos tratamientos, junto con asesoramiento y formación especializada. 
También somos distribuidores exclusivos de TIG BRUSH en España.

Trabajamos para sectores altamente exigentes como la industria farmacéutica, vitivinícola, automoción, alimentaria y otras áreas industriales que requieren la máxima calidad en el tratamiento del acero inoxidable.

Nuestra actividad se apoya en tres compromisos firmes: la calidad, avalada por la certificación ISO 9001; el respeto al medio ambiente, aplicando políticas ecológicas con depuradora propia y autorización ambiental de la GENCAT; y la seguridad, garantizando el estricto cumplimiento de la normativa en prevención de riesgos laborales, fomentando la formación continua y proporcionando a nuestro equipo todos los recursos necesarios.

En AUJOR unimos experiencia, innovación y compromiso para ofrecer soluciones a medida en el tratamiento del acero inoxidable.

Description:

Over time the company founder, Giorgio Bille, and his collaborators have contributed to the evolution of the core business of the company from merely standard processes to specific and exclusive machining, including large parts, offering controls performed with Zeiss measuring centres.

The company also performs grinding of parts coming from old worn machine tools of different types (for overhaul companies) and of components of new small- and large-size machines (for machine tool manufacturers).

The company has evolved over time in line with our customers’ requirements, developing state-of-the-art machining processes that demonstrate advanced precision and technological innovation.

SERVICES:

•	Special, 8-axis CNC flat surface grinding
•	Outside diameter grinding
•	Lapping service
•	Inside diameter grinding
•	Special grinding
•	Vertical CNC grinding

•	Hot and cold hardfacing

QUALITY:

Monitoreo Ambiental:
• Análisis de agua y suelo.
• Estudios de impacto ambiental.
• Monitoreo de calidad del aire.
  
Ventajas de trabajar con nosotros:

• Nos esforzamos por proporcionar soluciones sostenibles y responsables con el medio ambiente.

Estamos ubicados en Nasca, Abancay, Majes y Chala.

Name: E-CORT CORTE E DOBRA DE METAIS
KUMIBEX CNC MILLING & WELDED CONSTRUCTION
Description:
Kumibex to siła doświadczenia w konstrukcjach lekkich do kilku ton. Mamy doświadczonych spawaczy frezerów i tokarzy. Kładziemy bardzo duży nacisk na rozwój tej gałęzi naszego przedsiębiorstwa. Stale rozwijamy swój park maszyn aby móc oferować naszym klientom coraz to nowsze i lepsze rozwiązania.
Produkujemy kilkanaście ton tygodniowo konstrukcji spawanych od 30 lat. To doświadczenie jest bezcenne.

Nasze usługi:
1. Spawania ręcznego przez naszych spawaczy na maszynach typu EWM

2. Spawania automatycznego dużych serii o niewielkich rozmiarach. Nasze stanowisko zrobotyzowane z Cobotem w pełni zadowoli nawet najbardziej wymagającego klienta pod względem jakości i powtarzalności produkcji.

3. Toczenia, wytoczymy pojedyncze elementy, duże i małe serie elementów. Automaty tokarskie CNC które posiadamy są stabilne i szybkie. Mają napędzane narzędzia oraz przechwyt. Posiadamy tokarki ręczne do dużych detali.

4. Wypalamy blachy grube, w naszym parku maszyn jest wypalarka CNC gazowa i plazmowa o dużej mocy.

5. Tniemy precyzyjnie na piłach taśmowych najlepszych producentów Bomar i Bianco

6. Frezujemy nasze konstrukcje i elementy precyzyjne dla naszych klientów obrabiamy na precyzyjnych frezarkach CNC

Name: Ahlins i Habo AB
Description:
Ahlins är experter på anodisering av aluminium oavsett om det är små eller stora upplagor, små eller stora detaljer. Med attityden att ständigt utvecklas har företaget också blivit riktigt bra på hårdanodisering och passivering. Men det är inte allt. Ahlins har kompetensen att ta hand om kundens produktion från ritning till färdig produkt. Det innefattar även moment som kapning, trumling, montering och förpackning. 

På Ahlins har vi alltid gillat utmaningar. Det kan handla om en ny process för att behandla en speciell aluminiumlegering eller ett nytt automatiseringsprojekt till en kund eller en familj olika detaljer. 

Efter 60 år i anodiseringsbranschen är Ahlins ett av de mest kreditvärdiga företagen i Sverige. 

Ahlins vision och affärsplan kan sammanfattas med tre bokstäver: KUL

Kundfokus - Rätt produkt i rätt tid till rätt pris. 
Utveckling – Ständig utveckling inom effektivitet, teknik, logistik, kunnande och kvalitet. 
Långsiktighet – Lönsamhet och oberoende

Name: Galvanizaçao Do Minho, Lda
Description: From General Galvanizing to Centrifugal Galvanizing, our experts are at your disposal to offer you the best anti-corrosion and/or aesthetic solutions.

Name: The Remet Company Limited
Description:
Founded in 1947 by Josef Reid, The Remet Company has grown over the decades into the international market leader it is today. Over the years, we have expanded our operations into different sectors within the metals industry, including smelting, shredding and granulation.

We move over 100,000 tonnes of material every year and work with businesses across Europe, Asia and the UK. The metals we collect and trade help to link together a sustainable chain where raw materials are put back into use in a myriad of industries, including, superalloy, aerospace and power generation to name a few.

This means more recycling and less waste. We are proud to be a part of this process and we hold all the relevant industry accreditations to help us meet the right standards in our work. As part of our group, we also operate the following:

- Avon Metals
- Remet Ferrous
- Remet Processing

If you would like to learn more about The Remet Company, simply call today and speak to our team at our base of operations in London.

Name: De Haas RVS
Description:
Bij De Haas RVS zijn we gespecialiseerd in op maat gemaakt jacht- en scheepsbeslag, met oog voor detail en technische perfectie. Wij bieden ook seriebouw in kleinere oplages, waarbij we dezelfde hoge kwaliteit en nauwkeurigheid handhaven.

Daarnaast realiseren wij unieke metaaloplossingen in RVS, aluminium, messing en brons, evenals functionele onderdelen voor de bouw- en industriesector. Elk project wordt uitgevoerd met vakmanschap en precisie.

Name: Miedema Metaal BV
Description:
Miedema Metaal BV is een metaalbedrijf met eigen engineeringsafdeling, waar de wens en het contact met de klant centraal staat. Op deze manier waarborgen wij kwaliteit en kunnen wij leveren binnen de gestelde termijn. Doordat de klant direct contact heeft met de uitvoerder, kan zijn of haar project volledig naar wens worden uitgevoerd. Wij zijn gecertificeerd volgens NEN-EN 1090, waardoor wij producten met een CE-markering leveren. 

Van ontwerp tot realisatie, Miedema Metaal heeft zijn bijdrage geleverd aan veelzijdige projecten zoals bruggen, leuningen, verankeringen, klossen, stuurhutten en remmingswerk. Maar ook voor het kopen van koppelpontons, (koppelbare) werkvlotten en werkbakken bent u bij ons aan het juiste adres. Wij werken voornamelijk met staal, RVS & aluminium. De bewerking van andere materialen is ook mogelijk, zoals bijvoorbeeld kunststof.

Description:
Dinamo S.r.l. è specializzata nella verniciatura di metalli ed è situata nella zona industriale di Migliarino Pisano (Pisa). Tratta verniciatura a polvere e liquido, lavora a stretto contatto con i settori Automotive, Oil & Gas, Nautica ed è tutt'oggi in crescita continua. Name: Castal Hot Forging Steel
Description:
Mould construction, hot forged steel production, quality control.

We are specialists in steel hot forging for a wide range of industrial sectors. We offer our customers the services of mould design and construction, manufacturing of hot forged steel components, moulding process optimisation and quality control.

Our mission.

Ensure high quality levels and customer satisfaction, combined with an appropriate quality management system, compliant with UNI EN ISO 9001:2015. We provide customers with the know-how gained from fifty years’ experience in the market, offering tailor-made solutions and certified raw materials.

Name: NOYON
Description:
Od kilkunastu lat w NOYON wspieramy naszych klientów w realizacji nawet najbardziej wymagających projektów z zakresu obróbki metali. Łączymy doświadczenie z nowoczesnymi technologiami, stale rozwijając park maszynowy i poszerzając zakres świadczonych usług.

Dziś oferujemy nie tylko zaawansowane cięcie laserowe i gięcie, ale również: cięcie wodą, cięcie plazmowo-gazowe, frezowanie 3- i 5-osiowe, toczenie precyzyjne, elektrodrążenie, a także inżynierię odwrotną – pomiary CMM, skanowanie 3D i druk 3D. Uzupełnieniem oferty są profesjonalne usługi spawalnicze oraz wykończeniowe. Dzięki temu w jednym miejscu zapewniamy klientom kompleksową obsługę – od prototypu po produkcję seryjną.

Naszą siłą jest elastyczność. Realizujemy zarówno jednostkowe zlecenia, jak i serie produkcyjne, zawsze z tą samą dbałością o precyzję, terminowość i wysoką jakość. Wieloletnie doświadczenie pozwala nam nie tylko sprostać wymaganiom technologicznym, ale też optymalizować procesy, co przekłada się na efektywność i konkurencyjne koszty projektów.

Współpracujemy z firmami z wielu branż – od motoryzacji i energetyki, po budownictwo, kolej czy przemysł ciężki. Każdy projekt traktujemy indywidualnie, a satysfakcja klienta jest dla nas najlepszym potwierdzeniem, że obraliśmy właściwy kierunek.

Name: PULIRAS Srl
Description:
Specialisti nella pulitura e trattamento dei metalli, offriamo servizi di smerigliatura, saldatura, vibratura, satinatura, verniciatura e sabbiatura per garantire la massima qualità e resistenza dei materiali. Scegli la

Name: Inovaguil - Usinagem e Caldeiraria
Description:
A Inovaguil é uma empresa especializada em peças de precisão, que atende diferentes setores em todo o Brasil. Nossos produtos e serviços estão divididos entre caldeiraria, solda e usinagem (fresa, torno) leve. Atuamos também de acordo com a necessidade do cliente, trazendo soluções e otimizando seus processos.

Nosso time é composto por profissionais qualificados, eficientes e contamos com parceiros de longa data, com ampla experiência na área de usinagem.

Nossa Missão: 
Queremos sempre ser a melhor opção do segmento. Para isso, temos como missão prestar um serviço de qualidade, utilizando matérias de alto padrão, atendendo todas as expectativas do cliente.

Nossa Visão:
Estamos constantemente buscando por inovação, atualização e manutenção dos nossos produtos, nossa visão é direcionada ao futuro da usinagem, com foco em melhoria contínua dos nossos processos.

Nossos Valores:
Para nós, o cliente é prioridade, por isso temos o compromisso com a qualidade. Ética e transparência são fundamentais na nossa empresa e além do cliente externo, fazemos questão de que nossos funcionários sejam valorizados. 

 Inovaguil, há 12 anos ajudando nossos clientes a transformarem seus projetos em realidade!
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: NEBO. - Crafting the impossible.
Description:
𝗨𝗻𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗺𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗶𝗻 𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗺𝗮𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴
At Nebo we challenge the status quo. We are uncompromising toolmakers. Pioneers in precision, architects of complexity and craftsman of the seemingly unmakeable.

𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲
We believe in co-creation and partnership. Together we design the ideal process from a challenging task to accurate manufacturing.

𝗙𝗮𝗯𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲
With our state-of-the-art machine park and facilities we are dedicated to ultra precision manufacturing. We push our limits regarding extraordinary materials and we have the possibilities to go direct in production. Our craftsmanship in symbiosis with our Yasda machines deliver continuous process innovations.
 
- Craftsman who take ownership from the start to the end of a project
- Direct contact with the manufacturer, we will take control of your challenges
- Short lead times, from idea to realization by a pragmatic way of working
- One-stop shop makes us in control of complex workflows
- Multi-discipline cutting technologies combined with in-house knowledge and experience.
 
𝗩𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗲
The proof of the pudding is in the eating. We measure extreme tolerances through the use of geometric dimensioning and tolerancing. Our ultra precision validation tooling from the Zeiss Prismo family guarantee that we deliver success through precision. All the way from proof of concept to production.

𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗰𝘁
For inquiries or assistance, please feel free to reach out to our team via phone or email. We’re here to help!

Name: Traitement de Surface et Mécanique (TSM)
Description:
Située à Seraincourt dans le Val-d'Oise (95), TSM est une entreprise familiale spécialisée dans le traitement de surface sur des pièces mises à disposition par le client et dans la mécanique (rectification) associée.

Elle possède de forts savoir-faire dans : 
•	Le traitement par électrolyse
•	Le traitement par projection thermique (HVOF)
•	L’usinage de précision (rectification, tournage et rodage)

Elle détient une expertise dans l’aéronautique, militaire, l’hydraulique industriel et le nucléaire.

Dans ce secteur, l'entreprise travaille notamment pour EDF et ses sous-traitants, Framatome et Orano. TSM maîtrise le code RCC-M et est certifiée EN9100 et NADCAP.

TSM est membre d'Alfeor, ETI qui regroupe des entreprises sous-traitantes du secteur nucléaire possédant des savoir-faire à forte valeur ajoutée : www.alfeor.fr

Name: Mohre
Description:

Onze werkwijze is doordacht en gestructureerd: elke stap, van tekening tot eindproduct, is herleidbaar en transparant. Daarmee borgen we de kwaliteit en de strakke, efficiënte uitvoering die je van ons mag verwachten. Mohre is de partner met korte lijnen waarop je kunt rekenen.

Name: SAMA Cromo
Description:
SAMA Cromo SRL è un'azienda che si occupa di trattamenti galvanici d'alta qualità collaborando con partner nel campo militare, biomedico, aereonautico, spaziale e civile. Siamo una delle più efficienti ed innovative galvaniche sul territorio nazionale, sempre a cercare di migliorare i nostri processi per aumentare la qualità dei nostri trattamenti sempre dando un'occhio a diminuire l'impatto ambientale per un futuro migliore.

Name: FACIM NV
Description:
Facim NV is een metaalverwerkend bedrijf gespecialiseerd in plaatwerk en draai -en freeswerk. Facim biedt vandaag de dag een waaier van mogelijkheden. Wij kunnen een zuivere toeleverancier zijn maar ook montage en assemblage kan u door ons laten uitvoeren. Facim levert producten aan o.a. volgende sectoren: olie en gasindustrie, electronica en assemblage, scheepsnavigatie, machinebouw, automatisatie…

De producten bij Facim komen tot stand dankzij een doordachte combinatie van productietechnieken en vakmanschap. Facim beschikt over een uitgebreid machinepark en een poederlakinstallatie. Door een optimale synergie sluit ons dienstenpakket volledig aan op uw behoefte: cnc technologie (lasersnijden, ponsen, plooien) - lassen - prototyping - poederlakken - assembleren - klantspecifiek verpakken.

Facim NV is opgericht in 1948, Facim staat voor Fabrikage van Artikelen voor Confectie en Industriele Materialen, aanvankelijk was Facim een producent van ritssluitingen, reflectoren en matrijzen voor de diamantsector. In 1974 drong een verhuizing van het kleine atelier in Merksem naar ruimere werkhuizen in Deurne zich op. 

Sindsdien specialiseerde FACIM NV zich steeds meer in metaal- en later plaatbewerking. Wegens verdere uitbreiding verhuisde het bedrijf in 1987 naar 4000 vierkante meter vloeroppervlakte op het industrieterrein Bosduin in Kapellen. Facim verhuisde in november 2014 naar een gloednieuw gebouw op het industrieterrein Rijkmaker in Essen (6000 vierkante meter vloeroppervlakte).

Met de overname van CNC Quality in 2017 leggen wij ons ook toe op de verspanende bewerkingen. Wij hebben uitgebreid geïnvesteerd in automatisatie van onze draai -en freesmachines en in nieuwe draai -en freesmachines!

Bent U op zoek naar een toeleverancier, wij zullen u graag bezoeken of uitnodigen om onze ruime mogelijkheden voor te stellen. Neem hiervoor vrijblijvend contact met ons op via 03/666.54.15 of via lds@facim.be.

Name: 1. Wenz-Mechanik GmbH
Description:
As reliable partner we supply companies in Aerospace, Medical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. We manufacture mechanical precision parts, prototypes, assemblies as well as complete stations customized according to customer specifications, including assembly, testing and documentation.

Are you looking for a competent partner, who supplies your special tool, surgical instrument or other precision parts in highest German quality? Expert CNC milling? We are the right choice! Based in beautiful Reutlingen, we have made our dedicated contribution to aerospace, medical engineering and mechanical engineering for more than 55 years. Based on your requirements we mill your requested tool using state-of-the-art technology on Hermle CNC precision machines.

Name: LPMG | Usinagem e Galvanoplastia
Description:
Bem-vindo à página empresarial da LPMG no LinkedIn!

Somos uma empresa dedicada ao tratamento de superfícies desde a nossa fundação em 21 de março de 2016. Especializados em galvanoplastia, oferecemos uma ampla gama de serviços, incluindo zincagem, zinco níquel, e cromo decorativo.

Expandimos nossas atividades para o ramo de usinagem, corte a laser e dobra ampliando ainda mais nossa capacidade de atender às necessidades dos nossos clientes.

Na LPMG, estamos comprometidos em fornecer soluções de alta qualidade e confiáveis para garantir a satisfação dos nossos clientes. Nossa equipe altamente qualificada e experiente está pronta para oferecer serviços personalizados e atendimento excepcional em todas as etapas do processo.

Siga-nos para ficar atualizado sobre as últimas notícias, atualizações do setor e oportunidades de networking. Estamos ansiosos para conectar com você e explorar como podemos colaborar para o sucesso mútuo.

Junte-se a nós na jornada da excelência em tratamento de superfícies e usinagem!

Name: PSS Precision Solutions & Services

Além disso, desenvolvemos componentes específicos para máquinas industriais, contribuindo para a eficiência operacional. Name: Limat Ltd
Description:
Limat Group is a private corporation with three active companies:
Limat Polishing | Schwartz Almog | Limat Chemistry

The market in which we operate:
Surface treatment for engineering parts.
Limat's vision:
•	To promote the field of surface treatment processes in Israel, and demonstrate leading technology in the global environment.
•	To develop quality in our organizational culture as a routine aspect of our service.
•	To provide surface treatment services to our customers at an optimal level in order to improve the performance of the customers' products and systems.
Limat Group companies:
1.	Limat Polishing 
Limat is considered a leading company in the industry.
During its four decades of operation, the company has acquired unparalleled experience in the field of metal surface treatments, such as standard passivation, removal of oxides, special cleanings, conversion coatings, and in particular, electrochemical polishing for stainless steel.

2.	Schwartz Almog
Provides nickel, silver, gold and anodize coating for various types of metals, such as electroless nickel, nickel sulfomat, soft and hard gold, silver, tin, the introduction of hardeners (helical and insert), silk printing and aviation painting (epoxy and polyurethaneConductive coating on plastic.

3.	 Limat Chemistry
Limat Chemistry plant produces a variety of materials for cleaning and surface treatment of metals for commercial needs, factories and institutional users.
The variety of materials provides a broad finishing and cleaning solutions for industries engaged in the production of stainless-steel products: the food industries, medical devices, biomed, cleantech, etc.Limat is ISO 9001-2008 certified by the Israeli Standards Institute.
Limat maintains a green environment and complies with the regulations and requirements of the Ministry of the Environment.
The surface treatments for brake metals are done subject to international standards: QQ-P-35, F-1089, ASTM A-967, ASTM B-912-02.

Name: UKRTRUBOIZOL
Description: NPP “UKRTRUBOIZOL” manufactures electrically welded straight-seamed steel pipes Ø426-1422 mm with a wall thickness from 6 to 24 mm, up to 12 meters long, made of steel of strength class up to K60. The capacity of the line, depending on the assortment, is up to 25,000 tons per year. The line for the production of welded steel pipes allows the production of pipe products in accordance with the national, interstate and international requirements of ISO 3183:2019, DSTU ISO 3183:2017 (ISO 3183:2012, IDT), API Spec 5L, DIN EN 10219-1,2, DIN EN 10217-1,3,5,6, DSTU 9219:2023, DSTU 9218:2023, TU U 24.2–05757883–095:2022, DSTU 8943:2019, GOST 20295-85, GOST 10706-76, GOST 10705- 80. NPP UKRTRUBOIZOL is a reliable producer and supplier The main difference of the production line is modern equipment for the full technological cycle of production of PLD for main gas and oil pipelines. The key advantage of the unique equipment is the mechanism for expanding pipes. According to DSTU 9219:2023, GOST 20295-85, international standards and world practice, EXPANSION is an integral stage in the manufacture of large-diameter welded straight-seam steel pipes (PLD) for the construction of main pipelines for the transportation of oil and gas. The plant’s products are certified for compliance with the requirements of the Technical Regulations for Pressure Equipment (Resolution of the CMU No. 27 dated 01.16.2019) and standards: • GOST 20295-85 • GOST 10706-76 • GOST 10705-80 • GOST 10704-91 The company operates an integrated management system that meets the requirements of international standards, which is confirmed by the Bureau Veritas certification body: • ISO 9001:2015 • ISO 14001:2015 • ISO 45001:2018 NPP UKRTRUBOIZOL has been producing and supplying high-quality products to the market of anti-corrosion insulation for more than twenty years to create reliable pipelines with a service life of up to 50 years.
Location: Pgt. Meliorativny, Novomoskovskiy r. UKRAINE , Dnepropetrovskaya obl.

Name: Duravi
Description:
Duravi IS Metal Transformation. More than a lubricant, it reacts with the metal at a molecular level to rearrange the top layer so that it is flatter, smoother, and harder… creating a surface that nearly eliminates friction, dramatically reduces heat, and is significantly more durable and resistant to wear and corrosion. Duravi’s ground-breaking technology not only changes our understanding of the field tribology but also our view of the useful life vehicles, tools, and other equipment used to build, run, and maintain the modern world. 

Our journey spans over 30 years of research and development, led by a team of experts passionate about creating sustainable, high-performance products. We believe that environmental responsibility and industrial efficiency can go hand in hand. And, by focusing on bio-based ingredients, we aim to reduce the environmental and financial impact of mitigating friction, offering our customers solutions that are not only effective but also contribute to a greener planet.

Name: Plateco Inc.
Description:
Plateco is the ultimate zinc plating company.

Many manufacturers assume that plating steel parts is a simple process, and that all platers are essentially the same. Nothing could be further from the truth, as Plateco customers well know. 

While some platers too often fall short of their customers’ quality and timing targets, the Plateco team is composed of perfectionists who go to unprecedented lengths to consistently deliver truly exceptional corrosion- and fracture-resistant plating on a timely and cost-effective basis. 

Have you ever seen a zinc plating company reveal its product return rate at the top of its website? If not, there's probably a good reason. Plateco does: Its return rate for 2024 was 0.18%, which is pretty close to perfection. Yet Plateco won't be satisfied until that rate is zero.

Plateco's return rate is so much lower than its competitors because no zincplating company incorporates nearly as much upfront engineering, rigorous cleaning and plating stages, innovative proprietary technologies, and meticulous quality monitoring as Plateco. And no zinc plating company possesses the knowledge, talent and passion for perfection of the Plateco team. The result is a truly one-of-a-kind plating company that delivers unmatched reliability in every conceivable way.

Plateco also delivers exceptional value, as its customers don't have to absorb the hidden costs of having to re-plate and re-ship poorly plated parts, incurring penalties for late deliveries, or losing their customers due to too many poorly-plated or late parts.

What's more, customers who let Plateco Transfer pick up and deliver their parts pay shipping rates that are roughly half of what commercial carriers charge, and their plated parts are delivered within five business days of when they're picked up.
 
It's no wonder Products Finishing magazine has named Plateco one of the country's "Top Shops" for five consecutive years.

Plateco: Pursuing plating perfection.

Name: Polmans
Description:
At Polmans, we do not just manufacture parts, we build trust. For many years, we have been supporting customers in nuclear, aerospace, defence, medical and energy industries with one clear goal. Deliver parts that work from the very first use and keep performing for many years. Our teams specialise in high precision machining of large mechanical parts, CNC turning and milling, mechanical assembly and advanced metrology.

What truly sets us apart is not only our machine park, it is the way we work. We listen, we ask the right questions, we co engineer when it adds value and we are honest about what is and what is not possible. We prefer to prevent a problem on the drawing rather than fix it on the machine.

Traceability, strict quality control and on time delivery are not marketing claims, they are daily habits. This is why many customers stay with Polmans for a long time and trust us with their most critical applications. If you are looking for an industrial partner who is discreet, reliable and demanding, rather than just another parts supplier, let us talk about your next project.

MAX-NOW | Precision CNC Machining. Trusted by Industry. Driven by Technology.

MAX-NOW is a trusted CNC machining and metalworking partner serving the European market, known for delivering precision components and engineering support to high-profile industrial clients. Since 1983, we have built a strong reputation in the metal processing sector by combining technical expertise, consistent quality, and a customer-first approach.

Our core competencies include:
• CNC milling and turning of complex parts and tight-tolerance components
• Electrical Discharge Machining (EDM) for hard materials and intricate geometries
• Cold metal forming for durable, high-integrity parts
• Assembly, prototyping, and support for serial production

Over the years, MAX-NOW has become a dependable partner for sectors where quality and reliability are non-negotiable — including automotive, aerospace, medical, rail, defense, motorsport, and industrial machinery.

Our modern machine park is equipped with high-performance CNC technology and supported by skilled engineers, toolmakers, and production specialists. We invest continuously in process optimization, automation, and staff development to meet the evolving needs of advanced manufacturing.

At MAX-NOW, we do more than just machine parts — we provide integrated manufacturing solutions tailored to your technical and business requirements. Whether it’s a one-off prototype or a long-term production program, we collaborate closely with our clients to ensure manufacturability, reduce lead times, and deliver cost-effective results without compromising quality.

Our mission is to build long-term relationships through engineering excellence, process transparency, and a shared focus on innovation and performance.

Name: VALTI
Description:
VALTI, a manufacturer of seamless precision steel tubes meeting the most exacting standards. 

The company supplies its products to various industries such as bearings, mechanical, and oil & gas. VALTI offers a comprehensive product range and customised dimensions according to customer requirements. 

On 1 June 2022, Vallourec Bearing Tubes (now VALTI) left the Vallourec group and has been acquired by Mutares SE & Co. KGaA, a German industrial holding. 

This has been a major change in the organisation of VALTI, which is now operating independently with its own clients and working towards its own sustainability. 

Today, VALTI is the second largest player in the European bearing tubes market with around a 25% market share. 

Mutares and VALTI are working on the strategic positioning of the company and making it a European leader in precision tubes. The company employs 190 people with our headquarters based in Burgundy, France.

تتميز خدماتنا بالدقة، والجودة، والتسليم في الوقت المحدد، مما يجعلنا شريكاً موثوقاً في مشاريع التشييد والصناعة والمعادن.

W ostatnim czasie w firmie przeprowadzono wiele kluczowych decyzji począwszy od zmiany w pionie zarządzającym, kończąc na poszczególnych działach produkcyjnych. Usprawniono wiele procesów, nie rezygnując przy tym ze swojego priorytetowego podejścia do jakości.

Potwierdzeniem wysokich kwalifikacji STALKO było przyznanie w 2021 roku, przez Ministra Spraw Wewnętrznych i Administracji koncesji na wykonywanie działalności gospodarczej w zakresie wytwarzania i obrotu broni, amunicji i wyrobów o przeznaczeniu wojskowym lub policyjnym.

Name: Kamps Straal- en Industriële Spuitwerken
Description:
Kamps Straal-  en Industriële Spuitwerken is a Dutch family business, engaged in the preserving of industrial objects since 1972. The company owns two fully equipped workshops in Heinkenszand and Kats, where fully qualified and certified employees work with every possible blast and coating equipment available. Combined with our sister companies Hoondert and Martens Cleaning we employ 200 professionals. 

Kamps Straal- en Industriële Spuitwerken is a company that works with few organisational layers. This guarantees one hundred percent involvement in all our projects. We stand for the quality of all of our projects. With our in-house developed digital quality management system, we continuously monitor the progress of every project, from intake to testing and delivery. This means your project is in safe hands with us. If desired, we can provide a traceable report of every step to our clients.

We embrace difficult projects, different shapes, measurements or demands and complex coating systems: Kamps Straalbedrijf gladly rises to the challenge and takes care of everything. We have experience in preserving for the petrochemical industry, in different corrosive environment classifications, like C4, C5, C5-I and C5-M. We are certified for all NORSOK coating systems, both on- and off-shore. Kamps also has its own in-house NACE inspection.

Name: L'ELECTROLYSE
Description:
Née en 1900 avec le développement des applications, à l’époque de la fée électricité, L’ELECTROLYSE est une entreprise industrielle de services qui œuvre dans le traitement et le revêtement de surfaces. A cette activité principale ont été intégrés des moyens de peinture et de contrôle non-destructifs, un laboratoire de développement et d’analyses minérales et une station de traitement et la valorisation des déchets industriels permettant ainsi à L’ELECTROLYSE de gérer les déchets de sa propre activité.

L’ELECTROLYSE est implantée sur 3 sites :
- Le siège social, basé à Latresne, qui compte environ 130 salariés
- REDA, située à Mérignac, spécialiste du chromage dur et de la mécanique qui y est associée, qui compte une douzaine de salariés
- LELMA, à Tanger au Maroc, est une filiale dont les activités sont équivalentes à celle du site de Latresne et rassemble une trentaine de personnes
 
L’ASD (Aéronautique, Spatial et Défense) représente une part importante des activités des sites, sans négliger l’industrie chimique, le ferroviaire, l’industrie nautique, les bureaux d’études mécaniques et les biens d’équipement (nucléaire, pétrolier, etc.)…

Name: GEMET - Obróbka CNC, Linie Produkcyjne, Formy Wtryskowe
Description:
Istnieje wiele rodzajów obróbki maszynami CNC zarówno do seryjnej, jak i indywidualnej produkcji. Można stworzyć narzędzia na postawie dostarczonych projektów bądź skorzystać z gotowych rozwiązań, jakie proponują profesjonalne firmy zajmujące się tego rodzaju działalnością.

Produkcja maszyn i linii produkcyjnych, frezowanie CNC 3 i 5-axis oraz obróbka elektroerozyjna to tylko niektórych usług, z których można skorzystać. Możliwe jest projektowanie narzędzi, stworzenie elementów od podstaw oraz ich odtworzenie.

Dlatego niezależnie od branży, stażu i stopnia innowacyjności różne firmy w innych etapach rozwoju mają opcje skorzystania z takich usług.

Każda firma ma swoją historię. Nasza rozpoczęła się w 1979 r. Od tego czasu nieustannie rozwijamy się, dzięki czemu jesteśmy dziś ekspertami w obróbce skrawaniem oraz budowie form wtryskowych i wykrojników. Rozumiemy, że sposób w jaki jesteśmy postrzegani, stanowi odpowiedzialność wspólnie nas wszystkich i każdego z osobna. Łączymy nasze dwie główne cechy – tradycję i nowoczesność, co pozwala nam lepiej rozumieć oczekiwania i potrzeby Klientów. Pozostajemy też otwarci na ich sugestie oferując najbardziej optymalne rozwiązania zapewniające sukces inwestycji. Wieloletnie doświadczenie, nowoczesne zaplecze oraz system jakości są gwarancją solidności i wydajności naszych produktów

Name: Al Azman Steel Galvanization Company
Description:
Al Azman Steel Galvanization Company is based in Dammam, Saudi Arabia and serves the entire KSA market with effective solutions to harsh environmental factors that cause rusting and corrosion. Specializing in galvanizing steel using a state-of-the-art, ‘hot-dip’, galvanizing process, Al Azman Steel Galvanization Company provides strong and cost-effective protection for most kinds of steel products.

Galvanized steel has many important benefits and advantages over other methods, from durability, cost and availability to safety, sustainability and decreased environmental impact. With an experienced team and an established quality control process, Al Azman Steel Galvanization Company is the right galvanizing partner in the Kingdom.

Our high quality and cost effective galvanizing service follows a three-stage hot dip process – pre-treatment, galvanizing and inspection – to ensure the highest quality and customer satisfaction standards in the industry. Our galvanizing kettle’s large size – 13 meters long by 1.6 meters wide by 2.3 meters deep – allows us to galvanize your large objects in a single dip. All the steel processed at our plant meet or exceed the highest international galvanizing standards, including:

American: ASTM, A123 & A153/A153M
British: BS729, BS/EN/ISO 1461
Australian: AS1214, AS/NZS 4680
Japanese: JIS H8641 and 9124
German: DIN50976

Name: Modercromo srl
Description:
Modercromo viene fondata nel 1967 per iniziativa dei tre soci Flli. Giampaolo. Nasce inizialmente come piccolo laboratorio di cromatura conto terzi, si specializza in seguito nella cromatura con alti riporti di spessore di cromo. Nel 1969 la sede operativa viene trasferita nei nuovi e più ampi capannoni dove viene perfezionata la cromatura di barre per pneumatica e oleodinamica assumendo ben presto un ruolo di leadership nel settore della produzione di barre cromate.

Gli anni che vanno dal ’72 all’80 sono caratterizzati dall’innovazione delle infrastrutture e dall’installazione di nuovi impianti ideati e realizzati in proprio per la produzione specifica di barre cromate. Nel 1995 con l’ingresso nella società dei tre figli dei soci fondatori si centra l’attività nella produzione e commercializzazione diretta.
Nel 2001 viene inaugurato il nuovo capannone nel quale si effettua la lavorazione di rettifica delle barre pelate: con tale nuovo processo Modercromo raggiunge l’obiettivo dell’integrazione verticale delle lavorazioni per realizzare maggiore efficienza e migliorare il servizio ai clienti.

Dal 2003 è iniziata la costruzione di capannone per l’introduzione di nuovi impianti di cromatura tecnologicamente molto più avanzati rispetto a quanto sia presente sul mercato oggi che consentiranno il miglioramento qualitativo del prodotto cromato ed un’ottimizzazione di costi.

L’azienda è dotata di nuove linee di cromatura in continuo (nuova metodologia di lavoro) e di linee di cromatura in vasca (tradizionali).

Modercromo offre un sistema di cromatura della barra cromata tra i migliori del mercato. Con una gamma di prodotti focalizzati al continuo miglioramento delle prestazioni. 
Partendo da ISOCROM  200h siamo arrivati al ISOCROM  72h CASS.

Name: Master Laser
Description:
Master Laser: Inovação e Excelência em Soluções Metálicas

Na Master Laser, somos especialistas em corte a laser de metais e caldeiraria com mais de 12 anos de experiência. Utilizamos tecnologia de ponta para oferecer serviços de alta precisão e qualidade, incluindo:

- Corte a Laser de Alta Definição: Trabalhamos com aço carbono, aço inox, alumínio e outros materiais, garantindo cortes precisos e acabamentos impecáveis.

- Soldas MIG e TIG: Nossas técnicas de soldagem proporcionam resistência e durabilidade, atendendo às especificações mais rigorosas.

- Usinagem e Dobra: Equipamentos modernos para usinagem e dobra de peças, assegurando conformidade com os projetos mais complexos.

- Pintura a Pó, KTL e Outros Acabamentos: Oferecemos tratamentos de superfície avançados, como pintura a pó, KTL, zinco branco, zinco preto, galvanização a fogo, entre outros. Estamos sempre prontos para atender às necessidades específicas de cada cliente, garantindo que você obtenha o acabamento ideal para o seu projeto.

Parceria Estratégica

Mais do que fornecedores, somos parceiros estratégicos. Analisamos as necessidades de cada cliente e colaboramos no desenvolvimento de soluções inovadoras e eficientes.

Seu Braço Direito em Metal

Conte com a Master Laser para impulsionar seus projetos. Nossa equipe multidisciplinar e infraestrutura completa garantem a entrega de produtos de alta qualidade, no prazo e dentro do orçamento.

Transforme suas Ideias em Realidade

Entre em contato e descubra como podemos transformar suas ideias em realidade com soluções personalizadas e inovadoras.
