Name: Coatinc PreGa
Description:
We start where conventional hot-dip galvanizing reaches its limits: PreGa precision galvanizing is the innovative high-temperature piece galvanizing for complex components from 500 g to 800 kg. Individual corrosion protection - reliably reproducible and absolutely suitable for series production.

Thanks to a special iron-zinc alloy phase formation and the low viscosity of the zinc melt at high temperature, we achieve particularly thin coating thicknesses with speciﬁc mechanical characteristics and long-lasting protective effect according to DIN EN ISO 14713-1. Even the duplex process is no problem due to the simple overcoatability.

This makes PreGa precision galvanizing the ideal economical alternative for all parts with special requirements and complex geometries where normal-temperature galvanizing and centrifugal galvanizing reach their limits. Let our team of experts advise you!

𝗦𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝟭𝟵𝟵𝟬 leading international company, multi&eco certified, specialized in metalworking and 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗰𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿’𝘀 𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗱𝘀, based in Lumezzane, Brescia, Italy. 

𝗕𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘀, 𝗘𝗰𝗼𝗯𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘀, 𝗕𝗿𝗼𝗻𝘇𝗲, 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗦𝘁𝗲𝗲𝗹 (𝗗𝘂𝗽𝗹𝗲𝘅, 𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗱𝘂𝗽𝗹𝗲𝘅, 𝗜𝗻𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗲𝗹), 𝗔𝗹𝘂𝗺𝗶𝗻𝘂𝗺 𝗔𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘆𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗣𝗼𝗹𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗿𝘀 (𝗔𝗕𝗦, 𝗣𝗣, 𝗣𝗘𝗛𝗗, 𝗣𝗘𝗟𝗗..)

With over 85% of its work exported, Frigotech has established itself as a global benchmark in the sector. 

This commitment is supported by a selected and constantly 𝗲𝘃𝗼𝗹𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗺𝗮𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗿𝘆, capable of satisfying all requests. 

The continuous improvement and attention to market requests is converted into the development and evolution of production processes based on specialized equipment's creation with a selected machinery. 

Following an eco-friendly and sustainable approach respecting the environment, 𝗙𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗼𝘁𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝘀 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝘀 𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝗮 𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗼𝗳 𝟯𝗺𝗺 𝘁𝗼 𝟯𝟮𝟬𝗺𝗺 in a wide range of non-ferrous metals, Brass, Ecobrass, Bronze and stainless steel. 

Frigotech differentiates itself for the sustainable goal direction and efficiency.
All machines are numerically controlled, the processes are carried out on modern constant temperature systems: 

- Highly qualified teams
- Data collection and software analysis
- Advanced machinery
- Process surveillance

𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀:
- ROHS

- ISO14001
- ISO9001 

𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘇𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝗻:

𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗙𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗼𝘁𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗺𝗲𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝘁𝗼 𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹 𝘂𝗽 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘀 𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝘀𝗸𝗶𝗹𝗹𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲𝘀.

Name: Fluidics Instruments BV
Description:
Fluidics Instruments BV is specialized in the development and manufacture of a very wide variety of atomizers, nozzles, burner lances, sprinklers, regulators and related products for the atomizer technology.

Fluidics Instruments BV is gespecialiseerd in de ontwikkeling en fabricage van een zeer grote diversiteit verstuivers, nozzles, branderlansen, sprinklers, regelaars en aanverwante producten voor de verstuiver techniek.

Name: MENEGATTI INDUSTRIES LLC
Description: metals refining, zorba,zurik, electrics waste, ice concentrate, heavy metals, meetball, low grade metals

Name: De Carlo Usinagem e Componentes LTDA.
Description:
A De Carlo Usinagem e Componentes Ltda atua no mercado desde 1977 com Usinagem de peças em geral ( 2 rodas, 4 rodas, Agricola, etc ), certificada pela ISO/TS 16949 e ISO 9000 possui varias maquinas tais como:
- Centro de Usinagem ( Vertical e Horizontal )
- Torno CNC ( Vertical e Horizontal )
- Retifica CNC e Mecanica
- Fresadora 
- Furadeira
entre outras.

Name: HFI B.V.
Description:
HFI is een wereldwijde Tier-1 leverancier van fijnmechanische onderdelen en componenten voor de meest veeleisende ondernemingen in marktsegmenten als: Measuring & Control, Medical, Semicon & Optics, Energy, Defense, Food & Agro en Suspension.

Bij HFI draait het letterlijk en figuurlijk om het vervaardigen van uiterst nauwkeurige producten uit de meest uiteenlopende metalen en legeringen. We realiseren dit door een combinatie van hooggekwalificeerd, praktisch vaardige en ervaren professionals en geavanceerde en efficiënte bewerkingsmethoden die werken met de nieuwste CNC-gestuurde machines.

HFI is onderdeel van Andra Tech Group, een groep bestaande uit 9 bedrijven in Nederland en Duitsland: Wilting (Eindhoven, Wintelre en Leerdam), Kusters Precision Parts (Oss), Mayer Feintechnik (Göttingen) HFI (Groenlo), Visietech (Schijndel), DKH (Uden), Jatec (Leerdam), Lemmens Metaalbewerking (Bergeijk) en Lucassen (Sittard).

Op dit moment werken we met zo'n 700 medewerkers op 11 productielocaties dagelijks aan fijnmechanische componenten voor diverse high tech industrieën.

Name: MWA Steel
Description: MWA is dé specialist in het bewerken van (staal)platen. Wij beheersen meerdere technieken en leveren een breed spectrum aan soorten en afmetingen, niet alleen in staal maar ook in aluminium en RVS. Dat doen we voor onder andere constructie- en offshorebedrijven en machine- en apparatenbouwers, in zowel binnen- als buitenland. Voor onze klanten zijn we meer dan een leverancier. Zij ervaren ons als een professionele partner die over de hele linie meedenkt en doordenkt, ook als het gaat om nieuwe oplossingen en diensten. Wij zetten onze ruime kennis en ervaring om in helder advies, kwaliteitsproducten op maat, een hoge servicegraad en snelle en betrouwbare levering, desgewenst ook Just In Time.

Name: VMC - Veluw Metal Creations
Description: VMC is een familiebedrijf met ruim 30 jaar ervaring in de ontwikkeling en productie van complete plaatbewerking. Dankzij onze goed opgeleide medewerkers in combinatie met een hypermodern machinepark zijn wij in staat uitstekende kwaliteit te leveren. Dagelijks zijn wij bezig onszelf te verbeteren en onze footprint zo klein mogelijk te maken. Wij zijn gevestigd in zelfontworpen smart nieuwbouw en o.a. dankzij onze 7.612 zonnepanelen en energie efficiënte klimaatbeheersing zijn wij in staat een duurzaam werkklimaat te creëren én zo goed als zelfvoorzienend in energie. Dankzij deze innovaties, ontstaan vanuit gezond boerenverstand, zijn wij een van de groenste metaalbedrijven van Nederland, daar zijn wij erg trots op!

Name: Härdservice AB
Description:
We are 3:rd party certified according to ISO 9001/14001, work in accordance with VDA and ran our own fully equipped laboratories. Our key values are closeness, knowledge and service and we choose to support our customers with extensive materials know how and education.

Amongst others, we offer vacuum hardening, vacuum brazing, case hardening, carbo nitriding, quench & tempering, LPC-low pressure carburizing, gas nitriding, nitrocarburizing, post oxidation, normalisation, annealing, solution treatment, precipitation hardening, deep freezing, SolNit- high temperature nitriding of stainless steels, induction hardening, laboratory service and technical support.

Primarily customers are in industry sectors of transmission components, knives, medicare, machine builders, tool makers, aerospace, AM-industries, mining and construction industry etc.

Name: aalbers|wico
Description: aalbers|wico is a respected family company and was founded in 1966. At our locations in Renswoude we have more than 160,000 ft2 of floor space, a wide range of sophisticated machinery, our own R&D department and our own test centre. Over 100 expert employees work at our organisation within two independent divisions: defence & security and metal & technology.

Name: Galvanizados Avilés S.A.
Description:
Galvanizados Avilés, S.A., se constituye en el año 2008 con el objetivo de atender la creciente necesidad de galvanizado en caliente por inmersión. 

La empresa se ubica en una parcela de 33.000 m2 con una planta totalmente automatizada en unas instalaciones cubiertas de 8.700 m2.

La planta, además de un alto grado de automatización,  cuenta con las últimas tecnologías de aspiración y filtración, que la convierten en una de las más limpias y seguras de Europa.

Name: Anochrome
Description:
With nearly 80 years of coating expertise Anochrome Group operates across six sites in the UK and Central Europe, providing a trusted source for all your surface finishing requirements.

Using the latest technology and equipment, we have a focus on sustainability and reducing our environmental impact. Our offering includes a wide range of performance enhancing finishes and application methods which include GEOMET, DÖRKEN, MAGNI, Barrel and rack zinc, zinc nickel and E Cote as well as high end decorative paint, on all shapes and sizes.

Same site coating and fastener threadlocking and sealing including precote and Rimlex is provided from all our regions, reducing lead times and ensuring the most cost-effective solution for component manufacturers.

Quality is assured across all sites under IATF16949 and ISO9001.

Get in touch to see how we can help you.

Name: GSE Carbide
Description: GSE Carbide is the innovation on the Grinding market in Europe. After more then 35 years in the metal world we have broad experience and knowledge of products, materials, processes and machines. We offer our customers a 360° service. Our grinding service allows us to pre-process our products.

Name: ROTO | The Metal Group
Description:
Roto B.V. is the holding company of a 100% independent family business with 5 ROTO Business Units.

We support our Business Units to achieve further sustainable growth and add value for our customers. Within ROTO, the five Business Units operate autonomously and are specialists in their respective core business: 

- Prins De Boer Staal in steel processing
- Staco in grating technology and expanded metal
- Prestia in surface treatment, such as galvanization, powder coating and wet painting 
- Rotocoat in surface treatment, such as galvanization and powder coating
- Rezinal in zinc recycling. 

Our Business Units focus primarily on the European market, providing their services from the Netherlands, Belgium, France, Germany, Poland and the United Kingdom.

Name: Vacuum S.p.A. – A HÄRTHA GROUP company
Description:
Established in 1975 at Trezzano sul Naviglio (Milan), Vacuum is one of the first Italian companies to have adopted vacuum technology for heat treatment. 

In over forty years of work, we have refined our production processes for maximum efficiency and reliability, to become the point of reference for the industry.

Name: Mettec CNC Solutions
Description:
Welcome to Mettec CNC Solutions, where precision in CNC machining is not just a promise, but a practice. With extensive experience in the industry, we cater to a wide range of sectors, delivering high-quality, customized machining solutions.

 Excellence in Machining: Our state-of-the-art CNC equipment, operated by a team of expert machinists and engineers, allows us to tackle complex machining projects with unmatched precision. Our services include CNC turning, milling, drilling, and advanced multi-axis machining.

 Tailored for Your Needs: We understand that each project is unique. That's why we offer bespoke solutions, working closely with clients to turn their visions into perfectly crafted realities, all within the precise specifications and industry standards.

 Committed to Sustainability: At Mettec, sustainable manufacturing is a core value. We constantly evolve our processes to be eco-friendlier, ensuring we minimize environmental impact while maintaining the highest quality.

 Innovating for Tomorrow: We embrace the latest technological advancements, continuously upgrading our capabilities. Our commitment to innovation means constantly seeking more efficient, effective, and precise machining methods.

 Client-Centric Approach: Our clients are at the heart of everything we do. We're dedicated to building long-lasting relationships based on trust, quality, and clear communication, always aiming to exceed expectations.

 A Global Partner: Based in Poland, our expertise and services extend globally. We are proud to serve an international clientele, delivering the same level of precision and care worldwide.

 Join Our Journey: Follow Mettec CNC Solutions on LinkedIn for insights into our projects, technology, and company news. Connect with us to discover how we can bring unparalleled precision to your manufacturing needs.

#MettecCNC #PrecisionMachining #CNCInnovation #CustomMachiningSolutions #GlobalManufacturing"

Name: TCA SpA
Description:
T.C.A. S.p.A. è player di riferimento nel recupero metalli preziosi da scarti di varie industries: dal settore orafo a quello farmaceutico, dal settore minerario all’elettronica.
Con oltre 120 dipendenti, 3 sedi italiane e sguardo internazionale, TCA collabora da anni come partner di processo per il comparto orafo argentiero italiano e con aziende estere in tutto il mondo.
TCA S.p.A. è presente nella Gold and Silver Good Delivery List della London Bullion Market Association – LBMA e tra le poche imprese accreditate LPPM - London Plainum and Palladium Market, ed è tra i pochi player mondiali capaci di gestire l’intero ciclo del processo di recupero metalli, anche nell’ambito del trattamento di materiali low grade.
Una collaudata esperienza di oltre 40 anni e una spiccata volontà di innovazione si uniscono agli obiettivi di tutela ambientale e sicurezza, per determinare le direttrici del business dell’impresa, la cui governance è orientata alla crescita responsabile.

Name: VDL Technics
Description:
VDL Technics is een onderdeel van de VDL Groep. Als toeleveringsbedrijf is VDL Technics proactief op het gebied van metaalbewerking. Gespecialiseerd in het produceren en seriematig samenstellen van complexe plaatwerkconstructies door middel van (robot-)lassen. Bij nauwkeurige tolerantie-eisen kan de mechanische nabewerking ook in eigen huis uitgevoerd worden. Daarnaast zijn wij ook succesvol in de productie en montage van staalconstructies. 

VDL Technics kent een zeer brede range aan toeleveringsactiviteiten en een grote diversiteit aan (repeat)producten en complexe projecten die we realiseren. Voorbeelden hiervan vinden we onder meer bij landbouwwerktuigen, staalconstructies, straatmeubilair, consumentenartikelen en parkeersystemen. De toegevoegde waarde die wij u te bieden hebben, ontstaat door het effectief toepassen van onze jarenlange ervaring met de meest moderne productiemethoden voor uw producten. 

VDL Technics heeft zich door inzet, flexibiliteit en enthousiasme ontwikkeld van ‘jobber’ naar ‘main supplier’. Door gericht te investeren in mensen, huisvesting en machines zijn wij inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een speler van formaat. Wij zijn trots op de duurzame relaties die wij met een groot aantal klanten hebben opgebouwd.

Name: Metaltecss Revestimentos de Metais
Description: Para nós, revestir é preservar.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do sul

Name: Posco MPPC
Description: POSCO MPPC nos dedicamos al suministro de acero laminado para la industria, nuestra misión es cumplir con los requisitos de nuestros clientes y partes interesadas, mediante la mejora continua en todos nuestros procesos, identificando nuestros riesgos y oportunidades.

Name: SCH Holland BV
Description: SCH Holland bv is een particulier bedrijf dat op maat gemaakte systemen en oplossingen biedt op het gebied van ontwerp, productie en installatie van metalen dak en gevelbekleding.

Name: PMP Jelšingrad FMG A.D.
Description:
PMP Jelšingrad is a part of the steel division of the international corporation PMP Industries. The company originated from the Italian city of Coseano and is an international manufacturer of integrated machinery solutions across various sectors. These sectors include material handling, road construction, agriculture and forestry, mining, earthmoving, and construction. 

PMP Jelšingrad is a well-established company with extensive experience in manufacturing various products. We specialize in utilizing welding technologies for production. Along with other notable production methods such as cutting technologies supported by CNC machines, all our products have a strong presence in the Western European market. 

To stay ahead of the competition, we understand the importance of investing in our greatest assets – our employees – and continually developing our technologies. With a talented team of 260 skilled individuals, we have achieved not only stable financial growth but also an increase in our production capacity. We believe that by empowering our employees and embracing technological advancements, we can continue to deliver exceptional products and maintain our position as a market leader. 

Join us on an exciting journey towards continued success and excellence in the industry!
Location: Bosanska Gradiska, Republica Srpska, Bosnia And Herzegovina

Name: PWB AG (POLYGENA Group)
Description: Die PWB AG ist Ihr zuverlässiger Komplettanbieter für unterschiedlichste Industrien mit über 40 Jahren Prozess Know-how in der Fertigungsbranche. Zu unseren Dienstleistungen zählen CNC-Fertigungstechnik, Drehen, Fräsen und Dreh-Fräsen. Hoch qualifizierte Fachkräfte an zwei Standorten in Altstätten SG und Pfäffikon ZH verstehen es, mit modernster Anlagentechnik alle Prozesse für mechanische Komponenten und vollständige Baugruppen in unterschiedliche Grössenordnungen und Komplexität perfekt zu managen. PWB bildet in der hauseigenen Academy Polymechaniker/innen und Produktionsmechaniker/innen auf höchstem Niveau aus. Sie ist Vorreiter Ihrer Branche in der Prozessoptimierung durch Industrie 4.0 Technologien. Erfahren Sie mehr unter www.pwb.ch oder treten Sie direkt mit uns in Kontakt unter info@pwb.ch.

Name: TAG vacuum heat treatments
Description:
TAG was founded in 1988 with the goal of creating a centre of excellence in the high technology heat treatment sector. 

The operational structure allows us to work with various production units that enable the implementation of vacuum heat treatment, ionic nitriding, subcooling and vacuum brazing. 

The company's continued development, based on and supported by constant investments in modern technology, makes it possible for TAG to collaborate, among other things, with major industries operating in particular sectors such as the aerospace, biomedical and energy sectors.

Name: Doeko B.V.
Description:
In the past 59 years, Doeko, which is formed by a close-knit team of professional employees, has developed into a state-of-the-art company. The core activities can be divided into diess, Molds and Precision Mechanics. Our customers, located worldwide, are active in various industries such as the packaging, semiconductor and automotive industry.

The strength of our company lies in the high level of quality, precision and the specialism present in various fields. A very complete machine park from top manufacturers is available to us and our success is explained by the natural urge to continuously improve.

In addition to craftsmanship, control of the production process is of obvious importance. The (logistics) business operations are organized by means of a broadly integrated ERP system and are safeguarded in our quality management system.

We are happy to assist you and invite you for a personal introduction to Doeko.

Mission vision:
Our challenge is to continue where others stop. Creating compositions that are characterized by the combination of accuracy and complexity. The application of modern processing and processing techniques inspires our professionals to keep raising the bar.

We will continue to engage in the activities with which the company once started, the design and manufacture of high-quality dies and molds in order to be able to serve the market for precision mechanical modules based on that expertise. This mix of activities makes Doeko the stable partner for you.

Name: Soprima Industrie
Description:
Soprima is the specialist for coating locking, sealing and anti-seizing products for over 30 years. With more than 50 million parts processed per year, Soprima is the pre-coating French leader.
Soprima‘s expertise is based on a long experience in the assembly field. We develop assembly solutions which are accurate and innovating in cooperation with your Engineering Offices, from the technical specifications to the delivery of complete fixing solutions.


Find us on www.soprima.com

Name: Swiss-PVD Coating AG
Description:
As an independent family company, we offer you high-quality coating solutions. We specialise in the wear protection of tools, for decorative and functional coatings, and solutions for the medical sector.

Thanks to our PVD coatings, you extend the service life, quality and range of applications of your products and thus gain a crucial lead over your competitors. Our high-performance coatings are the result of many years of experience and in-depth knowledge of our clients’ needs. We offer you transparent and comprehensive advice and attach great importance to fast and flexible order handling.

The close cooperation with our sister companies in R&D new-arc Ltd. and in plant engineering swiss-PVD Ltd. enables us to stay on the cutting edge. As our customer, you benefit from the latest developments in PVD coating technology. We offer truly bespoke solutions for our clients.

Name: AÉROMÉTAL
Description:
Depuis plus de 30 ans, Aérométal accompagne ses fournisseurs sur le recyclage et la valorisation de leurs métaux stratégiques dans la filière la plus adaptée à la réduction de leur empreinte carbone.


Matières travaillées :

- Alliages nickel (Inconel, Hastelloy, Nimonic, René, Udimet..)
- Alliages cobalt (Stellite, Alacrite, FSX 414..)
- Alliages titane ( TA6V, 6-2-4-2, Ti17..)
- Alliages tungstène (Carbure tungstène, Densimet, Inermet, Densalloy,..)
- Métaux purs (Ni, Co, Ti, Mo, W, Ta, Zr)


Formes physiques :

- Copeaux d'usinage
- Chutes de production
- Pièces rebutées
- Éléments de process usagés


Prestation :

- Traitement complet des copeaux et des chutes pour les fonderies sous-vide
- Tous process de découpe (chaude ou froide) pour mise à dimensions
- Destruction de pièces sur mesure (suivant traçabilité EN9100)
- Solutions logistique clés en main
- Audit sur site


Certifications :

- ISO 14001
- ISO 9001
- EN9100
- Laboratoire conforme suivant AC 17025
- ISO 19443 


Partenariats et labels :

- RSE Ecovadis GOLD
- Membre Nuclear Valley
- PME attractive

Name: Giusto Manetti Battiloro S.p.A.
Description:
Since 1600 Giusto Manetti Battiloro has been producing gold leaf in Florence (Italy): fifteen generations of the Manetti family have accompanied and sometimes anticipated the evolution of production processes for the transformation of ingots into gold leaf.
 
Giusto Manetti Battiloro operates in the fields of Architecture, Design and Furnishing, contributing to the restoration and construction of extraordinary places such as the Palace of Versailles, the Hermitage Museum, the Rockefeller center, the Prada Foundation, and many others. Manetti’s gold leaf proudly shows the “Made in Italy” brand worldwide and serves as an ambassador for the tradition and innovation of the finest Italian craftsmanship.
 
In 2022, The Fine Arts line was introduced, specifically designed to enable distributors, retailers, and stores to offer a complete range of products: from precious metal leaves to imitation leaves to all the accessory products for each stage of gilding.
 
In addition to the artistic sector, the company operates in two other markets through its two brands:
 
•	"Gold Chef": Edible gold and silver from Gold Chef is ideal for enhancing first courses, desserts, drinks, and making all recipes more lavish and elegant. The ancient tradition of decorating dishes with precious metal leaves is now one of the most exclusive trends in food design, rediscovered by Gualtiero Marchesi and beloved by starred chefs across the world. 
•	"Beauty Gold": Cosmetic gold and silver from Beauty Gold is suitable for both facial treatments and the creation of elegant and theatrical makeup. The Beauty Gold range is divided into three sectors: Professional(for aesthetic treatments at beauty centers and spas), Industrial (for the production of cosmetics or the decoration of makeup and hair), and Retail (for daily beauty routines).The management system for the creation and marketing of products and ingredients for the cosmetic sector is certified according to ISO 9001, ISO 22716, and EFfCI standards.

Name: Van den Brink Barneveld b.v.
Description:
Van den Brink Barneveld b.v. is uw deskundige partner op het gebied van luchtkanalen en metaalbewerking. Onze vakmensen kunnen met behulp van het moderne machinepark aan al uw eisen voldoen, ook als de order spoedig klaar moet zijn. Halffabrikaten of hoogwaardige eindproducten, grote of kleine opdrachten, door onze ruime basisvoorraad en flexibele productieplanning kunnen wij u altijd van dienst zijn.

Van den Brink Barneveld: kwaliteit in luchtkanalen. 
Prettig wonen, werken of recreëren. Het begint met doordachte luchtbehandeling. Van den Brink Barneveld construeert, fabriceert en monteert al meer dan vijftig jaar luchtkanalen die daar garant voor staan. Onze luchtkanalen voldoen aan de Luka-normen en blinken uit in luchtdichtheid, duurzaamheid en kwaliteit. Ze worden zorgvuldig gemonteerd door onze eigen monteurs.

Van den Brink Barneveld: flexibiliteit in metaalbewerking.
Van den Brink Barneveld beschikt op industrieterrein Harselaar in Barneveld over een moderne metaalbewerkingstak met een grote capaciteit. Naast complete luchtkanalen produceren we hier halffabrikaten en eindproducten voor diverse bedrijven. Dankzij onze ruime basisvoorraad en flexibele productieplanning kunnen we u altijd snel van dienst zijn.

Name: Smolenaers. Sheet Metal Solutions
Description:
Smolenaers Sheet metaal Solutions staat bekend als de kleermaker onder de plaat bewerkers. We hebben ruim 40 jaar ervaring in het produceren en bewerken van plaatwerk. Name: Druetta Hnos. S.A.
Description:
Druetta hnos. S.A. es, antes que nada, el resultado del esfuerzo, la consecuencia lógica del trabajo de una pujante familia que, poco a poco, ha logrado convertirse en referente de la industria del galvanizado por inmersión en caliente.
Sus inicios se remontan al año 1947, cuando Don Carlos Alberto Druetta funda el primer taller en Av. Rivadavia 10.027 de la Ciudad Autónoma de Bs. As.
Sin embargo, aquel fue sólo el comienzo del posterior gran desarrollo de la compañía, ya que en el año 1994 se trasladó a la localidad de La Tablada, ampliando su superficie y línea de producción, hasta lograr, tiempo después, en el año 2001, poner en funcionamiento un horno de 8 mts. x 1.7 mts. x 2.2 mts.
Desde entonces, y con el claro objetivo de afianzar a los clientes, la calidad y el servicio, comenzó a liderar el sector.
Todo esto, acompañado por el compromiso y la responsabilidad, hizo posible un viaje sin retorno para construir la planta más grande y moderna del país.
El año 2010 encontraba a Druetta hnos. S.A. en pleno proceso de crecimiento. Su trabajo y dedicación, basado en la atención al cliente, la seriedad y el sólido prestigio ganado durante más de 60 años, desembocaron en un gran hito. Un antes y después en su historia, y en la historia de la industria nacional del galvanizado por inmersión en caliente.
A partir de una importante inversión, apostando al futuro y con el propósito de ofrecer a sus clientes más y mejores servicios, Druetta hnos. S.A. inauguró en Gral. Rodríguez, a metros del Acceso Oeste, una nueva y moderna planta con los más altos estándares de construcción, seguridad y cuidado del medio ambiente.

La misma,un emprendimiento de vanguardia a nivel mundial,fue un innovador paso de Druetta hnos. S.A. hacia el futuro.
Su nuevo horno, herramienta fundamental del proceso, mide 13 metros de largo, 1.80 metros de ancho y tiene una profundidad de 3 metros. Éste convirtió a la empresa en la más grande de la Argentina y en una de las diez más grandes de Sudamérica

Name: micrometal GmbH
Description:
micrometal GmbH, incorporating HP Etch and Etchform, has decades of experience in photochemical etching. Our goal is to bring our unique etching technology to you to stimulate innovation in your endeavours while always maintaining the highest quality and reliability.

micrometal’s chemical etching process is very different from conventional photo-chemical etching processes. We use a special liquid resist system to obtain ultra-thin photoresist layers enabling a higher degree of precision in the chemical etching process. 

It allows us to achieve extremely small feature sizes and single digit micron tolerances repeatably. Traditional chemical etching uses relatively thick dry film resist which compromises ultimate part precision and the tolerances that are available. 

We also use digitally produced glass photo-tooling, providing superior reproduction and resolution than digital film photo-tooling used in conventional chemical etching processes. 

micrometal also offers a continuous chemical etching process, meaning that metal can be processed continuously from the introduction of initial raw material (typically on a reel) to the final packaging step (which can see finished parts delivered on a reel). 

The continuous photo etching process avoids problems associated with batch-to-batch variations, effectively processing one large batch rather than a number of smaller batches. It is only in this way that chemical etching process can truly claim that the first and the millionth part will actually be the same.

Our standards for maintaining product and process quality are high. We are certified according to ISO 13485, ISO 14001 and IATF 16949. We are constantly striving to optimise ourselves further, so that the principle of "continuous improvement" is firmly established.

We supply these markets: filter technology, medical technology, automotive, electronics, consumer & capital goods industry, aerospace technology.

Name: Visietech Technical Products BV
Description:
Visietech is een toonaangevende toeleverancier van (fijnmechanische) onderdelen en het hart van de Nederlandse maakindustrie. Naast onze vestiging in Schijndel beschikt Visietech over eigen productiecapaciteit in Tsjechië ‘Visietech Bohemia’ en tevens een groot netwerk aan toeleveranciers uit Tsjechië. De twee pijlers onder ons productieproces zijn ‘lean manufacturing en 5S’. Door deze slimme manier van werken zijn wij in staat om onze leverbetrouwbaarheid en kwaliteit op een steeds hoger niveau aan u te presenteren. Continu verbeteren zit Visietech in het bloed en het is gebleken dat dat onze relaties ook verder brengt. Want Visietech gaat verder waar een ander ‘nee’ zegt en biedt u de oplossing voor uw kwaliteitsprobleem, voorraadsreductie, leverbetrouwbaarheid en is een logistieke oplossing doordat wij al uw uitbestedingen regelen. 

Visietech beschikt momenteel over een modern machinepark met diverse mogelijkheden om 24/7 te produceren zowel op draai- als freesgebied. Ook in ons machinepark zullen wij de komende jaren blijven investeren. Onlangs hebben wij een 5-assige Grob 350 freesbank met 200 gereedschappen geïnvesteerd. Deze freesbank zal door een BMO palletbeladingssysteem worden ondersteund waardoor onze steltijden tot een minimum worden beperkt en man-arm produceren ook voor onze klanten binnen handbereik ligt. Voor verdere informatie over ons machinepark verwijzen we u graag naar onze website www.visietech.com of een van onze showcases op onze LinkedIn pagina.

Daarnaast beschikt Visietech over ervaren medewerkers in de frontoffice om al uw vragen te beantwoorden over de verkoop, orderplanning en administratie. Visietech wordt ondersteund door een modern ERP pakket wat ons de mogelijkheid biedt om u real-time te informeren over bijv. de voortgang van uw order.

Als Oberflächen stehen Gold, Silber, Palladium/Nickel, Nickel, IMOloy, Weißbronze, Kupfer, Zinn sowie Mehrschichtsysteme zur Verfügung.

IMO ist nach ISO 9001, IATF 16949, ISO 14001 und ISO 50001 zertifiziert.

Name: Technoplating Group
Description:
Technoplating Group
The Technoplating Group is a trusted Dutch network of surface-treatment specialists, consisting of Technoplating Nijkerk, Technoplating Lelystad, and Technocladding Europe. We are specialists in chrome plating, nickel plating, and EHLA laser cladding — offering a wide range of advanced surface treatments including grinding, polishing, and honing. Together, we protect and enhance the performance of critical components across industries such as machinery, maritime, offshore, mining, oil & gas, and steel.

Technoplating Nijkerk & Technoplating Lelystad
With over 60 years of experience, Technoplating Nijkerk and Lelystad have built a strong reputation in chrome and nickel plating. Since the 1950s, our focus has consistently been on delivering high-quality coatings that offer excellent wear and corrosion resistance. Through continuous investment in advanced machinery, we carry out both pre- and post-treatment processes in-house, maintaining full control over the workflow and ensuring consistent, top-tier quality.

Technocladding Europe
Technocladding Europe was established in 2022 with a clear focus on sustainability and environmentally conscious operations. As responsible manufacturing becomes increasingly important, we offer high-quality laser cladding solutions designed for long-term durability and reliability.

We specialize in EHLA (Extreme High-Speed Laser Application) laser cladding, offering multiple protective layers that provide exceptional resistance to corrosion and wear. This significantly extends the service life of metal components and reduces the need for frequent maintenance or replacement.

Though we are a young and flexible organization, we work in close collaboration with the Technoplating Group—combining our innovative approach with decades of expertise in surface treatment, and managing the full process in-house from start to finish.

Our flexibility allows us to meet both small, custom orders and high-volume manufacturing requirements while maintaining exceptional quality and consistency. We also offer a collection and delivery service, ensuring your parts are transported safely and efficiently. We are ISO 9001 accredited and provide treatments such as : Sulphuric Anodising, Hard Anodising, Conversion coatings (Iridite NCP, Surtec 650V) Phosphoric Anodising + Prime, Zinc Plating, Electroless Nickel Plating, Stainless Steel Passivation, Powder Coating, Polishing, Bead Blasting


At Teign Metal Finishes, we take great pride in our work. For us, achieving the perfect finish always comes first. In practice, our experience, care and commitment to quality means we deliver a first class service, time after time.

Teign Metal Finishes is a pro-active and progressive company. As well as constantly investing in the latest technology, we also have our own on site laboratory, allowing us to ensure all chemicals and processes are administered safely, and correctly.

We can offer highly valuable input when developing the perfect finish and are more than happy to provide samples for market testing. Where necessary we are able to modify products as required.

Name: Ladwig & Überall GmbH
Description:
Die Ladwig & Überall GmbH ist seit über 40 Jahren Ihr kompetenter Werkzeugbauer und Fertigungsdienstleister am Standort Hilzingen.

Wir sind Ihr europaweit tätiger Partner von der Entwicklung bis hin zur Fertigung von innovativen Werkzeugen. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihnen passende Werkzeuge und Produkte unter Berücksichtigung der wirtschaftlichen und technischen Vorgaben zu fertigen.

Unsere Kernkompetenzen liegen in:

 Konstruktion
 Werkzeugbau
 CNC-Bearbeitung
 Metallverarbeitung

Unsere Dienstleistungen finden in Branchen Anwendung wie:

 Automotive: Werkzeugentwicklung/bau von Stanz-, Biege- und 
 Presswerkzeugen sowie Serienfertigung für das Crashmanagement 
 Elektroindustrie: Metallverarbeitung für die Bearbeitung von Hardware Gehäuse und Hochleistungskühlkörper
 Verpackungsindustrie / Maschinenbau: Fertigung von Einzelteilen und Kleinserien

Mit rund 40 Mitarbeitern am Standort Hilzingen in Süddeutschland nutzen wir jeden Tag, um für unsere Kunden europaweit innovative Werkzeuge zu entwickeln und nach ISO-Standard zu fertigen.

Trinitan Green Energy Metals (TGEM) has 50 solid years of experience in industrial technology and provides innovative and sustainable solutions for metal and mineral processing. 

TGEM committed to leading sustainable change, leveraging our proprietary STAL Technology to deliver high-quality Class 1 Nickel with minimal environmental impact, aligning with global clean energy goals.

Name: JAMA
Description: Jama is a specialist in machining and has won the trust of several industry segments thanks to the combination of quality, commitment and flexibility. Quality achieved with state-of-the-art technology and excellent technical staff; Commitment to the goals and objectives of the client; Flexibility to develop custom projects. With adequate logistics, Jama carries out the delivery of its products in any region of the country. It is the completion of a process that consolidates the company as one of the most serious and competent suppliers for the Brazilian industrial sector. Large industries do so: when they need parts and assemblies to make up their machines and equipment, they contact Jama. With structure and agility to respond to the needs of its customers, Jama produces machined parts and welded assemblies in strict accordance with the projects. Components with precise shape and function that add quality and technology and contribute to a high productivity end product. Cutting solutions, CNC and conventional machining, milling, heat treatment, drilling and welding. We add surface treatment such as: electroplating, chrome and painting.

Name: STS Galvano
Description:
STS Galvano

Depuis 2006, année de sa création, STS s’est développée jusqu’à devenir un des plus grands fournisseurs de traitement de surface pour l’horlogerie haut de gamme en Suisse.

Créée par Frédéric Saulcy & Thierry Mesnier et spécialisée dans la galvanoplastie, STS adapte son offre à la demande de ses clients en se positionnant sur d’autres domaines d’activités dans les secteurs industriels. Name: Aços Torres
Description:
A Aços Torres comercializa aço em barra e desenvolve projetos de peças customizadas em parceria com indústrias dos setores de mecânica pesada, equipamentos pesados e implementos agrícolas, peças e automóveis, ferramentas, geração e condução de energia, extração de óleo e gás, entre outros.

Nossa linha de produtos contempla barras de aço redondas e quadradas para usos diversos na construção mecânica. Contamos com uma completa infraestrutura de corte, usinagem e trepanação para tratamento das barras conforme necessidades de cada indústria e aplicação.

Sabemos da importância da qualidade e de um aço de verdade para usa na sua indústria. Aplicamos um sistema de rastreabilidade que acompanha os padrões de procedência e qualidade da matéria-prima desde sua origem, com rigoroso controle dos lotes, do recebimento à entrega ao cliente.

Realizamos intermanete com equipamentos próprios e equipe especializada um longo do processo de validação, com ensaios de ultrassom e análises laboratoriais que asseguram a conformidade dos materiais antes de sua comercialização.

Acerte no parceiro que garante qualidade, precisão, e um timaço de especialistas que oferece um serviço completo dentro de casa. Acerte com a Aços Torres.

Name: ARCTEC (dépôt sous vide - PVD & CVD)
Description:
ARCTEC – Le savoir-faire français du revêtement PVD & CVD de haute performance

Basée à Marnaz, en Haute-Savoie, au cœur de la Technic Vallée, ARCTEC est une PME familiale fondée en 2003, et aujourd’hui reconnue comme un acteur majeur du revêtement PVD haute performance (Arc et Arc pulsé) et CVD.

Notre vocation : prolonger la durée de vie, améliorer la productivité et sublimer vos outils  grâce à des revêtements adaptés, conçus pour des secteurs exigeants comme l’usinage, le formage, le moulage, la mécanique de précision, le médical ou encore le décoratif.

Chez ARCTEC, chaque projet commence par une écoute : comprendre vos besoins, vos contraintes, vos ambitions… pour créer des solutions techniques adaptées, efficaces et fiables. C’est notre engagement depuis plus de 20 ans.

En 2024, nous avons lancé ÉCLAT, notre nouvelle gamme de revêtements dédiés à l’univers du luxe, alliant esthétisme raffiné et performances fonctionnelles.

PME à taille humaine, notre force réside dans la proximité, la réactivité et l'expertise de notre équipe. Clients, partenaires, fournisseurs : chez ARCTEC, chaque relation compte.

ARCTEC, unlimited coating solutions.

Name: OrderOn
Description:
OrderOn.com maakt metaalbewerking makkelijk.

In de maakindustrie worden snelheid, efficiëntie en flexibiliteit in productie en levering steeds belangrijker. Dat kan alleen met de nieuwste apparatuur en technologieën. Maar voor veel maakbedrijven zijn de investeringen in de nieuwste technologieën en machines, expertise, logistiek en gekwalificeerd personeel te hoog.

Daarom heeft VDL OrderOn.com ontwikkeld. Het online platform voor on-demand bestellen, produceren, bewerken en leveren van metaal. Daarmee heb je de nieuwste productiefaciliteiten en know-how van VDL altijd binnen handbereik. Gecombineerd met meer dan 60 jaar expertise, ervaring en vakmanschap.

Met Orderon.com kan iedereen in de maakindustrie de snelheid, kwaliteit, nauwkeurigheid en intelligentie van de nieuwste technologieën toepassen in het eigen bestel- productie- en leveringsproces. Makkelijk en snel, via een gebruiksvriendelijk online platform. On-demand, flexibel, overzichtelijk en op maat. Hoeveel, waar en wanneer je maar wilt.

Met OrderOn.com combineert VDL meer dan 60 jaar expertise en vakmanschap in industriële toelevering met de nieuwste productie-, en automatiserings-, en e-commercetechnologieën. On-demand beschikbaar. 24 Uur per dag, 7 dagen per week. Voor ieder productiebedrijf en proces.

Name: DKH Metaalbewerking BV
Description:
Gespecialiseerd in fijnmechanische bewerking van klantspecifieke producten, variërend van enkelstuks tot kleine en grote series, hebben wij jarenlange ervaring in diverse sectoren, waaronder de Voedingsmiddelenindustrie, Automotive, Medical en Machinebouw.

Onze productie voldoet aan hoge kwaliteitseisen, met een machinepark dat is geoptimaliseerd voor het vervaardigen van grote series in korte tijd. Door geavanceerde automatisering kunnen we 24/7 zowel draai- als freeswerk produceren. We verspanen diverse materialen zoals RVS, aluminium, staal, en kunststof.

DKH is onderdeel van Andra Tech Group, een groep bestaande uit 9 bedrijven in Nederland en Duitsland: Wilting (Eindhoven, Wintelre en Leerdam), Kusters Precision Parts (Oss), Mayer Feintechnik (Göttingen) HFI (Groenlo), Visietech (Schijndel), DKH (Uden), Jatec (Leerdam), Lemmens Metaalbewerking (Bergeijk) en Lucassen (Sittard).

Name: Sohar Titanium FZC
Description: Sohar Titanium (FZC) L.L.C., located in Sohar Freezone, Oman, is set to become a leading producer of titanium slag with an annual capacity of 150,000 metric tons. Spanning 160,000 square meters, this OMR 63.5 million project is a joint venture between Minerals Development Oman (MDO), Dubal Holding, and Stork Group under Gulf Titanium. The facility features three electric arc ore-thermal furnaces, each with a 25.5 MVA capacity, ensuring high-quality production. The plant's construction and ramp-up are scheduled to be completed by August 2025, with commercial shipments starting in the fourth quarter of 2024. This project marks a significant milestone in the industry, positioning Sohar Titanium as a key global player.

Name: AVATEK Srl
Description:
Servizi metallurgici certificati di lavaggio, sgrassaggio, decapaggio e passivazione del metallo.
Progettazione di impianti di decapaggio certificati e sistemi di lavaggio mobile adattabili alle esigenze specifiche dei clienti.

Avatek è un’azienda piemontese all’avanguardia specializzata nel settore della protezione e anticorrosione dei metalli.
Miriamo ad offrire soluzioni di alta qualità che soddisfino le esigenze specifiche dei nostri clienti tramite ampie conoscenze tecniche e standard di lavoro elevati.

Il cliente è per noi un partner che merita di essere seguito dalla fase iniziale di consulenza basata sulle sue necessità specifiche, fino alla consegna del prodotto lavorato e finito.
Avatek non svolge solo un servizio per i propri clienti, ma gli offre assistenza certificata e specializzata in ogni decisione.

La determinazione e la dedizione che mettiamo nel nostro lavoro ci ha portato a iper specializzarci, innovarci e migliorarci costantemente nel settore del trattamento metalli.
Per questo motivo oltre ai servizi certificati di lavaggio, sgrassaggio, decapaggio e passivazione investiamo ogni giorno in ricerca e sviluppo.
Già nel 2020 siamo stati pionieri nel settore brevettando il nostro impianto industriale mobile e trasportabile di trattamenti chimici per la lavorazione dell’acciaio.
Le nostre competenze tecniche ci permettono inoltre di progettare e implementare impianti di decapaggio certificati e sistemi di lavaggio mobile adattabili alle esigenze specifiche dei nostri clienti.

Siamo pronti ad offrirvi servizi personalizzati di eccellenza nel trattamento dei metalli diventando non solo vostri fornitori, ma partner di fiducia!

Name: Northwest Polishing
Description:
Northwest Polishing Ltd is a leading provider of Stock Metal finishing. Founded in Oldham in 1996 by Managing Director Andrew Marston the company has grown to be one of the most trusted independent metal finishers within the UK.  

In 2022 we have made a significant investment and are now able to offer a full range of Sheet Polishing services to accompany our industry renowned Long Product Polishing Services.


Offering an unparalleled reputation for Quality underpinned by our ISO 9001 Accreditation. Second to none customer service with our no hassle free of charge daily collection and delivery service from the midlands, where we’ll pick your stock up and return it polished within our standard 3 day lead time and finally a value centric ethos to our whole operation which has help shape our business for more than three decades.

With an established workforce that offers over a century of finishing experience. We also support our local community by blooding young talent through our in house apprenticeship schemes. Our philosophy is to build on our heritage and assist in safeguarding the future of British Engineering by investing in new skills, machinery and delivering unparalleled quality products.

Name: MB RECYCLAGE
Description:
La société MB Recyclage est spécialisée dans la récupération et le recyclage des fers et métaux, le démantèlement d’ouvrages métalliques et la démolition industrielle ainsi que la gestion des VHU ou Véhicules Hors d’Usage (dépollution, démolition, recyclage).

Elle assure également la prise en charge des déchets industriels banals, de la collecte à l’élimination. Différents services de mise à disposition de contenants et de transport sont disponibles tout en garantissant une totale traçabilité.

Intégrée dans un groupe familial œuvrant dans le domaine de la récupération industrielle depuis trois générations, notre société évolue selon une politique d’amélioration permanente qui lui a permis de répondre à l’ensemble des critères de la norme ISO 9001 et d’en obtenir la certification.

Notre expertise, reconnue par de nombreuses références et appuyée par la certification MASE, nous permet de répondre aux exigences techniques de nos clients dans le plus grand respect de la sécurité de nos collaborateurs.

Enfin, nos différents agréments sont la preuve de notre savoir-faire en matière de protection de l’environnement appuyé par une certification ISO 14001 de notre site.

Name: Centrum voor Verduurzamen
Description: Verzinkerij Meerveldhoven, De Run Metaalcoating en Dameco Plating: drie bedrijven van één familie op één locatie, die elkaar perfect aanvullen, met alle voordelen van dien. Uw materiaal kunnen we zo bijvoorbeeld in veel gevallen efficiënter dan andere ‘oppervlaktebehandelaars’ voorzien van alle mogelijke bewerkingen en behandelingen: verzinken (zowel ‘gewoon’ thermisch als centrifugaal, hoge temperatuur en elektrolytisch), schooperen/metalliseren, rvs-beitsen, passiveren, poedercoaten en natlakken. We verzorgen bovendien als enige in de Benelux alles eromheen: halen en brengen (ook naar uw klanten), demonteren, voor- en nabehandelen, assembleren, verpakken en etiketteren. Uiteraard doen we dit zoals het hoort: netjes en voor een schappelijke prijs!

GB

A family that, over the years, has been able to propose innovative solutions and products such as:
•	the Naysteel certified spring box, 
•	the exclusive certified and patented FimaSpring spring to replace the traditional tempered spring, 
•	FimaSilence, the first patented and certified silent roller shutter that reduces noise and vibrations by up to 80% compared to traditional roller shutter.

The Fima group is today synonymous with quality, reliability and made in Italy, offering a wide and diversified catalogue for every need and business category.

It operates in the market of steel, industrial automations, rolling shutters, garage doors and related accessories. Browse our catalogue and get in touch with our team!

Name: SMPI Thermolaquage
Description:
Activités de traitements de surfaces sur tous types de métaux
SMPI, située à Dunkerque (Hauts-de-France 59), est spécialisée dans les traitements de surfaces : Sablage, Métallisation et Thermolaquage sur tous types de métaux. C’est aussi une entreprise de sous-traitance capable de traiter des grandes séries, mais également des pièces à l’unité pour les industries et les particuliers.
Créée en juillet 2007 par Monsieur PETITHOMME, la société a été rachetée par Monsieur FLAJOLET en 2016. Dans la même année, la société a intégré le groupement d’entreprises C.E.T.S (Compagnie Européenne de Traitements de Surfaces), aujourd’hui composé de 9 sociétés expertes dans les domaines du traitement de surfaces. Les compétences du groupe sont variées et complémentaires. C.E.T.S a pour objectif de répondre à vos besoins en vous apportant la solution technique la plus adaptée.

Description:
Phoenix Industry Solutions GmbH ist ein innovatives mittelständisches Unternehmen in Bermatingen am Bodensee. 

Wir sind Ihr kompetenter und zuverlässiger Partner zum Thema Metallverarbeitung in Deutschland Österreich und der Schweiz für die verschiedensten Branchen wie Maschinenbau, Gießereien, Elektrotechnik, Fahrzeugtechnik, Baumaschinen und dem Handwerk.  

Unsere Kernkompetenzen:

 Laserschneiden, Abkanten und Schweißen: Wir stellen komplexe Blechbaugruppen in Top-Qualität her und bearbeiten kompetent Schweißbaugruppen aus Baustahl, hochlegiertem Stahl, Aluminium und Kupfer. 
 Laserschweißen: Weil Laser etwas kann, was beim konventionellen Schweißen nicht möglich ist: Die Energie punktgenau an feinsten Strukturen eintragen und dabei das Werkstück fast nicht verziehen. Sowie hochfeste, flache Schweißnähte mit oxidfreien Oberflächen ausbilden. Das alles berührungslos und ohne Krafteinwirkung auf das Werkstück.Eine perfekte Prozesskontrolle und gleichbleibend hohe Qualität!
 Im Schweißbereich verarbeiten wir vorwiegend Stahl, Aluminium und Edelstahl im WIG-, MIG-, MAG-Verfahren 
 Baugruppenmontage: Sparen Sie sich Zeit, Geld und Koordinationsaufwand durch unsere Montageprozesse und professioneller Dokumentation
 Qualitätsdienstleistungen: Kontroll- und Sortierarbeiten für Sie. Egal ob bei Ihnen im Haus oder bei Ihren Kunden – wir sind europaweit für Sie im Einsatz.

Mit rund 22 motivierten und qualifizierten Mitarbeitern und einem hochmodernen Maschinenpark sind wir stets in der Lage, flexibel die Wünsche unserer Kunden zu erfüllen.

Unser Unternehmen führt ein zertifiziertes Qualitätsmanagementsystem nach DIN ISO 9001:2015, DIN EN 15085-2, DIN EN ISO 3834-2.

Description:
Providing top quality metal finishing at competitive prices, Pym & Wildsmith is an Employee-owned company totally focused on customer satisfaction.

As one of the Midlands’ leading specialist industrial finishing companies we support a range of clients from individual users to blue chip customers. Our wide range of coatings and processes are designed to improve the performance and enhance the appearance.

We provide pre-treatment, shot blasting, paint spraying, metal spraying, powder coating and e-coating services as well as full assessment and technical advice. We are major suppliers to the automotive, agricultural, transport, architectural and construction sectors. Pym & Wildsmith has over 40 years’ experience in the provision of high-quality pre-treatments and industrial finishes to metal products across UK industry.

Our work can be seen in a wide variety of contexts from heavy earth moving equipment to highly specialised small batches. We are based at our headquarters in Bramshall, Staffordshire with access to the UK’s major motorway networks and road system. Our extensive office and manufacturing facility includes an EPD facility, box ovens, spray booths as well as our technical department.

Sentimo
Om naast de B2B markt ook de consumenten te kunnen bedienen, is in 2008 Sentimo opgericht. Destijds met metalen radiatorbekledingen, maar inmiddels ook met meer innoverende producten voor in en om het huis.

Sinds 2024 is TePe metal onderdeel van Ulamo Metaal. TePe Metal engineert en realiseert ontwerpen en verzorgt complete projecten voor de industrie en retail: van luxe Point of Sale inrichtingen en display’s tot en met complete industriële transportbanden.

Onder dezelfde Ulamo-vlag, met dezelfde mentaliteit, maken we samen meer.

Name: Bonal Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Bonal Technologies, is the world's leading provider of sub-harmonic vibratory stress relief technology of metal. Bonal also provides a complete variety of consulting, training, program design and metal stress relief services to several industries including: automotive, aerospace, mining, petroleum, to mention a few.

Sub-Harmonic Vibratory Stress Relief 
Bonal manufactures the Meta-Lax Vibration Stress Relief Technology for the purpose of metal stress relieving. Meta-Lax is a patented stress relief process which according to the US Dept. of Energy is a “proven substitute to 80-90% of heat treat stress relief applications yet saves 65-95% of the time and cost in doing so without sacrificing quality!”

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Meta-Lax - A Patented Process
The patented Meta-Lax technology is unique in the vibratory stress relief industry in that Meta-Lax is the ONLY vsr process that produces “consistently” effective results. It also is the only vsr process that uses sub-harmonic energy and can certify that stress relieving is complete. 

Meta-Lax Technology - During Welding
Furthermore, Meta-Lax processing can be used during welding (Weld Conditioning) to prevent 50-95% of weld distortion and cracking while improving overall quality. That will save you straightening, rework, and scrap.

Name: Munsters Metaal Helmond
Description:
Munsters Metaal Helmond is al ruim 95 jaar een welbekend begrip in regio Helmond en omstreken. Zij zijn gespecialiseerd in het verwerken van RVS, staal en aluminium voor uiteenlopende industrieën.

Wat doet MMH precies?
De kracht van het bedrijf is het produceren van kleinere series met een korte levertijd, beter bekend als “High Mix – Low Volume”. Dit kan zowel voor grotere als ook voor kleinere producten. Maar zij deinzen ook niet terug voor het produceren van “one offs” van halffabricaten. Het bedrijf heeft ook verschillende montage afdelingen. Het gaat hier over het monteren van halffabricaten en geheel gemonteerde machines, die vanuit MMH direct naar de eindklant worden gestuurd. 

Werkzaam voor verschillende industrieën:
MMH produceert voor veel verschillende industrieën, waaronder de voedingsmiddelenindustrie, verpakkingsindustrie, interieurbouw, waterzuivering enz. Bij deze industrieën zijn de kwaliteitseisen op het gebied van hygiëne standaard zeer hoog. De opdrachten variëren van plaatwerk tot lichte constructies, van schets tot complete machine. Maar ook produceren zij voor de overige industrieën. Denk bijvoorbeeld aan simpele beugels die gezet en gelast dienen te worden. Zij hebben de mogelijkheden om alles onder één dak te fabriceren! 

Groot bedrijfspand:
Ook al bestaat MMH al 95 jaar, sinds 2010 zitten zij gelegen aan de Haagse Beemdweg 27 in Helmond. Dit pand is in eigen beheer neergezet, waarbij destijds rekening is gehouden met de groei van het bedrijf. In 2020 hebben zijn ook één naastgelegen pand aangekocht, zodat ook voor de toekomst groei mogelijk blijft.

Name: FIRST industries
Description:

En mettant l'accent sur l'humain et l'innovation, FIRST Industries est reconnue comme un leader dans le secteur. L'entreprise place l'individu au centre de ses réflexions, qu'il soit employé, client ou prestataire. Cette approche, combinée à une vision tournée vers l'avenir, permet à FIRST industries de répondre aux besoins d'un marché en constante évolution écologique et sociale, tout en maintenant des compétences et un savoir-faire précieux dans le canton de Vaud.

Name: TECNALUM ANODIZAÇÃO
TERRABARRIER
Description:
At TerraBarrier, we are enabling the next generation of materials for extreeme environments. Our technology is a novel surface modification process that transforms the outermost microns of alloys into an inherent barrier against environments such as hydrogen permeation, hydrogen/ammonia embrittlement, acidic and cloride environments.

Unlike conventional methods our process forms an inward-growing layer that is integral with the substrate, homogeneous, and free from secondary oxides. The result is up to 10³ better performance in some extreme environments.

Born from leading university research, TerraBarrier’s innovation extends the lifetime of critical components — delivering both reliability and cost efficiency to industry.

Name: İLETEN MÜHENDİSLİK KAPLAMA SAN VE TİC A.Ş.
Description:

Following the developments in the lighting sector, our company, which has developed itself in the LED lighting sector, has entered the Coating sector with the investment it made in 2017. We aimed to provide sustainable service to our customers in the coating sector by working in the coating industry which is established in Kemalpaşa and operating in a closed area of 1500m2 working with a focus on corporate identity and customer satisfaction.

We are able to serve our customers with alkali, zinc, nickel, silver on aluminum, copper on tin, aluminum on tin, nickel, copper plating areas. All our coatings are made with environmentally friendly, heavy metal-free coating chemistries containing chemicals permitted by European Standards.

We pay attention to customer expectations in terms of work safety, environment, quality, shipment and cost, and we respond in time, quality and most favorable conditions. In order to provide this, our lines are controlled with automatic PLC systems and ERP software performs the necessary input, process and output controls in accordance with the conditions provided by the traceability and the quality is continuously and safely controlled in this way. Our processes are guaranteed by TS ISO 9001: 2015 system.

Our customer portfolio includes various sectors and various firms such as automotive spare parts manufacturers, fastener producers, electric panel manufacturers, medium and high voltage transformer producers, refrigerator manufacturers and manufacturers of hair parts in the furniture industry. We serve all of these various firms with various coating types. We are also continuing our achievements by obtaining high scores from the audits and entering into the Global and approved suppliers of the well-known companies of Europe.

Name: RVM Industries B.V.
Description:
Bij RVM Industries schrijven we geen geschiedenis, maar toekomst. De focus op volle kracht vooruit, een rugzak gevuld met kennis en ervaring, fouten én succesverhalen, pieken en dalen. We nemen het allemaal mee naar morgen, overmorgen en de dagen die volgen.

Zonder glazen bol spreken we op voorhand uit dat ons verhaal binnen nu en pakweg 10 jaar is geworden tot een absoluut succesverhaal. Simpelweg, omdat we weten wat er nodig is én weten hoe het werkt als het gaat over mechanische machineonderdelen voor de Hightech industrie. Dat is fijn voor onszelf, nog beter voor onze klanten. 

Het geef rust, schept kaders en zorgt voor duidelijkheid. Het is ontzorgen in optima forma zonder gebruik te maken van dit verschrikkelijke woord. Je merkt het al: RVM Industries is net wat anders.

We staan dan ook bol van discrepantie: jong (hartstikke jong), máár tegelijkertijd beschikken we over tientallen jaren aan kennis en ervaring. Vernieuwend, maar ook weer niet. Want we veranderen weinig en zetten juist vol in op best practices uit het verleden en laten wat ‘niet werkt’ gewoon links liggen. Brabants, Kempisch en nuchter. Maar, ook vol bravoure en een groot zelfvertrouwen. Je zou ook kunnen zeggen dat we in de toekomst in staat zijn om geschiedenis te schrijven, omdat we vandaag en morgen ons voordeel doen met resultaat en rendement uit het … verleden. Volg je het nog? Waar het ons om gaat: we zijn een start-up die begint als grown-up én dat gaat iedereen merken.

Wij zijn RVM Industries: wij zijn beter voorbij. Een perfect gedraaid of gefreesd mechanisch machineonderdeel is bij ons ‘part of the job’. Ons machinepark is al even state of the art en flexibel als de (complexe) producten die we maken. Als geen ander verstaan wij de kunst van het vak. 

RVM Industries – the art of machining

Name: TMC
Description:
TMC nasce nel 1996 a Vigano di Gaggiano, paese in provincia di Milano. Inizialmente l’azienda si occupa di produzione di componenti in materiale composito e collabora con le maggiori aziende del panorama nazionale, continuando ad operare su Milano fino al 2006.

Negli anni sviluppa le competenze di verniciatura delle componenti e nel 2006 l’azienda trasferisce le proprie attività a Foggia. Un anno dopo il trasferimento, l’azienda avvia un processo di forte specializzazione nel settore e nel 2009 inizia ad effettuare verniciature nel settore automotive, per inaugurare nel 2010 il primo sistema di verniciatura automatizzata che utilizza robot antropomorfi per la protezione anti corrosiva per i motori destinati a mercati oltreoceano.

TMC punta sempre di più sul lean manufacturing e la digitalizzazione dei processi, e vede un ruolo sempre più strategico delle attività di ricerca e cooperazione che possano consentirle di mantenere la leadership nel proprio settore.
