Maatwerk, dat is ons vak. Van complete staalconstructies voor bedrijfshallen tot de bouw van machines. En van leuningen voor een design trap tot de reparatie van werktuigen. En hier stoppen we niet als het verder gaat dan ons vak. Door de samenwerking met veel gerenommeerde partijen, zorgen wij er voor dat onze klant het product volledig naar wens krijgt opgeleverd.
Ons doel is om te ontzorgen. Waarbij wij voornamelijk werken voor aannemers en machinebouwers.
Wij werken graag voor grote en kleine partijen. Wij denken met u mee en zorgen ervoor dat u eigenlijk verder niet meer naar het project hoeft om te kijken. Hierop hebben wij onze systemen ook ingericht. Wij hebben geïnvesteerd in vooraanstaande 3D CAD software, vinden goede communicatie heel belangrijk, houden ons aan de planning, laten indien gewenst ons creatieve brein zijn gang gaan en verzorgen montage op locatie.

Onze werkplaats bevindt zich in Lichtenvoorde. Niet voor niets worden wij regelmatig geprezen om onze Achterhoekse mentaliteit - “D’r an”. En uiteraard schromen wij niet om de Achterhoek achter ons te laten om aan mooie projecten in de rest van het land te werken. Wij staan voor u klaar!

Name: EQMS
Description:
Welcome to EQMS, where precision meets innovation in the world of metalworking. Founded in 2022, our state-of-the-art facility near Monterrey boasts a 6,000 m² manufacturing space, equipped with advanced technology for high-gauge metal cutting, bending, and rolling. Our team of skilled professionals leverages eight cranes with a combined capacity of 160 tons, ensuring efficiency and precision in every project.

At EQMS, we specialize in contract manufacturing for a diverse range of metalworking projects, catering to various industries with a commitment to quality and excellence. Our strategic location and expansive capabilities enable us to deliver unparalleled service, from conception to completion.

Name: Correta Usinagem de Precisão Ltda
Description:
A nossa empresa conta com uma experiência acumulada em mais de 30 anos atuando no mercado, possui sede própria em Campo Grande, Rio de Janeiro. Nossa expertise é em fabricação de peças voltados a usinagem, geralmente, para manutenção de maquinas e equipamentos, através de amostra ou desenho.

Fornecemos nossos serviços aos diversos seguimentos da indústria: Farmacêutico, Químico, Metalúrgico-Siderúrgico, Automobilístico, Petrolífero, Ferroviário, Elétrico, Naval, de Papel, Couro e Imprensa.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: MPI Refendage
Description:
MPI Refendage est spécialiste du conditionnement et du cisaillage des métaux.

Associé à un personnel hautement qualifié, notre outil de production souple et performant permet de satisfaire précisément les exigences clients, tant sur la qualité des produits que sur les délais de livraison.

La réactivité et la flexibilité sont des caractéristiques de MPI Refendage. depuis sa création nous apportons des réponses de choix aux problématiques de nos clients dans la France entière. Nous détenons un stock de plus de 1 000 tonnes d’acier et possédons plus de 500 références au sein de notre usine de Lormaison.

Name: MeulemanBV
Description:
Onze organisatie heeft zich gespecialiseerd in het vervaardigen van precisieonderdelen, tevens zijn we toeleverancier van onderdelen voor windenergie, hydraulic, pneumatiek en apparatenbouw. We produceren zowel in stukproductie als in kleine en grote series.
Onze klanten bevinden zich onder andere in de levensmiddelenindustrie, scheepsbouw, machinebouw automatisering en windenergie.

Name: DM2 Laser
Description:
DM2 Laser esegue lavorazioni conto terzi per:

INCISIONE laser di texture estetiche, loghi, finiture funzionali, etc. su stampi e  prodotti finiti
PULIZIA laser di superfici metalliche, stampi e piani presse
SALDATURA laser di componenti meccanici,   stampi e  particolari in acciaio in genere
ADDITIVO(SLM) di inserti stampo e componenti finiti

Inoltre servizi di:
_lucidatura stampi  e preparazione delle superfici
_consulenza per applicazione di texture e finiture funzionali
_progettazione e analisi di canali conformati 
_ritiro e consegna

DM2 Laser offre un pacchetto integrato di tecnologie, know-how e servizi in grado di supportare come unico partner i propri clienti rispetto un mercato in continua evoluzione

Name: Apollo Custom, Inc.
Description: Apollo Custom is a B2B metal treatment provider specializing in high-volume Cerakote applications for OEM manufacturers, distributors looking to put a spin on products they bring to market, or retail operations looking for medium to large batch customizations. Apollo Custom, with a history of serving businesses in the outdoor industry, is seeking to expand its capabilities and its client base. Calling all tech, aerospace, automotive, luxury, home, and other product manufacturers...Do you want to try something different? Give us a shout - we are open to ideas that are as quirky as we are.

Name: Van Gils Coating nv
Description: Van Gils Coating is een familiebedrijf met drie vestigingen die gespecialiseerd zijn in de oppervlaktebehandeling van staal en aluminium. Wij combineren in deze markt de flexibiliteit en de nabijheid van een KMO met de kwaliteit en professionaliteit van een grote onderneming.

Name: Dutch Tube Bending Association (DTBA)
Description:
Ooit nagedacht over hoeveel gebogen buigproducten er in uw omgeving zijn ? 
Dutch Tube Bending Association (DTBA) is opgericht door diverse loonbuigbedrijven van metalen buizen of profielen met als doel  de onderlinge samenwerking te vergroten en de kennis- en toepassingsmogelijkheden van gebogen buis te vergroten.

Name: SCR sa
Description:
Proche des 3 frontières, entre la Suisse, la France et l’Allemagne, SCR SA créée en 1984 à Bonfol (Suisse) par Jean-Michel Crevoiserat est une société d’ingénierie en automatisme, informatique industrielle, contrôle-régulation et instrumentation pour l’industrie.

L’histoire de SCR, comme bien d’autres petites et moyennes entreprises, commence par une idée: fabriquer des sondes à oxygène performantes et robustes ainsi que des régulateurs de potentiel carbone pour permettre la régulation de potentiel carbone.

De fil en aiguille, SCR se trouve confrontée à l’absence d’une multitude de matériels et de services dans le domaine de la cémentation, puis pour d’autres traitements, et n’a ainsi cessé depuis plus de trente cinq ans de proposer de nouvelles solutions centrées sur la régulation de tout type de traitement thermique et l’équipement des industries relatives.

Nos clients travaillent dans de multiples domaines, comme l’aéronautique, l’armement, l’industrie automobile, la boulonnerie, l’horlogerie, médical, etc.

Principalement actif dans le domaine du traitement thermique au niveau international, nous vous proposons une large gamme de compétences techniques :

Electricité & informatique industrielle, automatismes, systèmes de supervision et de gestion de production, mais aussi la réalisation de solutions compètes telles que des fours spéciaux, bancs de tests ou machines spéciales offrent à nos clients la garantie de disposer en permanence d’un haut niveau de technicité et de conseil.

Name: Etchform BV
Description:
Etchform provides customized solutions for metal precision parts for high-tech applications by means of etching & electroforming. Two versatile techniques, combining flexibility, cost efficiency and high quality.
As part of the etching division of the Wickeder Group, together with our sister companies HP Etch in Sweden and Micrometal in Germany, we are globally able to offer complete solutions for one-off to mass production, for both discrete parts and reel to reel in a wide range of materials such as copper- and stainless steel alloys, molybdenum, silver and titanium.

Our customers are found in all high-tech industries such as aerospace, automotive, defense, electronics, engineering, imaging, medical, piezo and semiconductors. Some typical applications are apertures, battery grids, contact springs, EMI/RFI shielding, deposition masks, encoder discs, filters & meshes, implants, shadow masks, shims, washers, etc.

Our technologies offer the following specific benefits for your metal precision parts:
•	An extensive choice of materials, also for metals on plastic carriers.
•	No change in material properties.
•	No additional internal material stress or warping. Hardness and brittleness remain intact.
•	Absolutely burr-free products.
•	Both the contour and the relief can be produced in the same process
•	2.5 D structures are also possible.
•	Quick start and flexible in the event of changes.
•	Limited tooling costs.
•	Product complexity has virtually no effect on the production costs.

Name: Commi s.r.l
Description:
Commi è un'azienda trentennale dinamica ed affermata, specializzata nel settore della verniciatura industriale e dell’anticorrosione, un ramo aziendale si occupa inoltre di manutenzioni elettromeccaniche, in particolare manutenzione e rigenerazione di Interruttori Alta Tensione.

Grazie alla qualità e all’efficienza acquisita, entrambi i settori aziendali sono cresciuti rapidamente trovando il consenso di aziende conosciute a livello nazionale, grazie anche al costante miglioramento degli impianti, della tecnologia e della strumentazione di controllo.

Commi, per tradizione, è un'azienda caratterizzata da serietà e disponibilità, in grado di offrire un alto standard qualitativo ed adeguate risposte per ogni esigenza produttiva. L'impegno e la determinazione mirati al raggiungimento della qualità ci consentono di offrire servizi e risultati di massimo livello, accurati, precisi e rapidi, con soluzioni versatili a misura del cliente, nel pieno rispetto dell'ambiente.

L'alta professionalità della nostra azienda garantisce la massima flessibilità operativa unita ad una capacità di intervento molto rapida, pur rispettando tutte le garanzie di qualità che clienti di importanza internazionale richiedono.

Name: Adamet - Niemet Sp. z o. o.
Description:
W naszych magazynach w Polsce i Niemczech znajduje się ponad 7 tysięcy różnych pozycji z aluminium, miedzi, mosiądzu, brązu i innych specjalnych stopów. Oferujemy usługi cięcia wzdłużnego taśm. Tniemy z taśmy, blachy na dowolną długość. Wycinamy z blach formatki, kręgi i pierścienie. Zapewniamy możliwość cięcia laserem i wodą – waterjet wg orzymanego rysunku CAD. Posiadamy własny transport, a także wysyłamy towary za pomocą firm spedycyjnych. 

Od ponad dekady posiadamy certyfikat ISO 9001:2015, obecnie wystawiony przez jednostkę certyfikującą Loyd’s Register, akredytowaną poprzez Brytyjską Jednostkę Akredytacyjną (UKAS), potwierdzający nasze kompetencje i wysokie kwalifikacje.

Name: Solveteq
Description:
Solveteq is transforming traditional, high-temperature, CO2-intensive metal extraction processes using a proprietary solvent-based technology platform. 

We sustainably extract various metals at near room temperatures, cutting energy use by up to 90% and CO2 emissions by up to 75% while maximising metal recovery.

Our technology is designed to integrate easily into existing operations with minimal capital expenditure.

Solveteq’s team of scientists, engineers and experienced executives are united by our mission to solve the environmental, economic and health challenges posed by metal recycling and extraction.

We will define the new sustainable technological standards for this crucial industry.

Name: CHOUSA
Description:
At CHOUSA, we are leaders in developing high-performance zinc flake coatings designed to extend the lifecycle of metal components across various industries.

Our flagship product, Laurentcoat, offers exceptional corrosion protection and is engineered to meet the most rigorous industry standards. 

Our solutions empower industries to achieve long-term durability, reduce maintenance costs, and improve environmental sustainability.

Our Expertise:

- Zinc Flake Coating Development

- Advanced Corrosion Protection 

- Custom Coating Solutions

- Environmental Compliance

Industries We Serve:

- Automotive
- Construction & Infrastructure
- Electrical Energy
- Agriculture
- Renewable Energy
- Oil & Gas
- Mining 
- Home Appliances

Our Mission:

To revolutionize how industries protect their assets through innovative zinc flake coatings, ensuring enhanced performance, reduced maintenance, and sustainable solutions.

Why CHOUSA:

- Proven Results: Laurentcoat has been tested and trusted across industries for its superior corrosion resistance and performance.

- Customization: We provide bespoke coating solutions to meet your specific industry needs.

- Expert Support: Our team of specialists collaborates closely with clients to ensure seamless integration and application of our products.

Are you interested in learning more about our zinc flake coating solutions or discussing a custom project? 

Contact us today!

info@chousa.com.ar

 http://chousa.com.ar/

 http://chousa.com.ar/en/

Name: Schouten & Visschers' Metal parts and welded assemblies
Description:
Schouten & Visschers is an internationally active company that supplies metal components and systems for healthcare equipment, wellness products, project furniture, construction and mechanical engineering, among others. A highly varied range of machinery enables us to manufacture complex products entirely in-house.

Since its founding in 1933, Schouten & Visschers has developed into a high-quality partner for metal components and functional units.

Name: GAS Mechanical
Description: GAS Mechanical is a leading company specializing in on-site machining, hydraulic torquing, flange management, and machine development. We provide tailored solutions for complex projects, focusing on efficiency and precision. In addition, we offer advisory services for project management and turnarounds, utilizing our technical expertise to optimize maintenance and production processes. Whether for one-time interventions or long-term partnerships, GAS Mechanical guarantees quality and reliability on-site.

Name: TECNOAL srl
Description:
Ossidazione ed Estrusione di profili in alluminio.
Tecnoal Srl, fondata nel 1977 a Fano, si impegna a soddisfare le esigenze dei clienti attraverso un servizio efficace di anodizzazione di profili in alluminio. Con una vasta esperienza, professionalità e tecnologia all'avanguardia, lavora per migliorare la durabilità dei profilati, applicando uno strato protettivo sulla loro superficie che garantisce colore, resistenza e longevità.
Nel 2023, per ampliare la gamma dei servizi, Tecnoal si arricchisce di un nuovo stabilimento dedicato all’estrusione con sede a Sant'Ippolito (PU) in grado di fornire profili in alluminio con forme precise ed uniformi per i vari settori merceologici.
Con l'aggiunta di questo impianto, è stata implementata la capacità di gestire la filiera dell'alluminio, consentendo di offrire una gamma ancora più ampia di soluzioni ai clienti.

Name: Guanghetong Steel Co., Ltd
Description:
At the forefront of the steel industry, Foshan Guanghetong Steel Co., Ltd. is more than just a supplier; we are innovators and leaders in providing high-quality stainless steel, cold-rolled carbon steel, and galvanized steel products. Located in the thriving heart of China's stainless steel town, the LANSHI (International) Metal Trading Center, we are perfectly positioned to lead and influence the steel market.

Our expertise lies in not only supplying a wide range of steel products but also in offering specialized services such as precision slitting, precision rolling, and advanced steel processing including 8K mirror, Hairline (HL), #4, and PVD coatings.   We tailor our services to meet the specific needs of our clients, ensuring each project receives the individual attention and precision it deserves.

Understanding the diverse needs of different industries, we pride ourselves on our ability to provide customized steel solutions.   Whether it’s for construction, automotive, or any other industry, our team works closely with clients to supply steel materials that precisely fit their end-use requirements.

Name: MK Techniek Zutphen
Description:
M.K. Techniek is een dynamisch en gedreven bedrijf dat sinds 2019 actief is op het gebied van montage en staaltechniek. wij bieden een totaaloplossing voor Bouw Sector Daarnaast beschikken wij over ruime ervaring in de productie en montage van balustrades en trappen.
of het nu gaat om grote, complexe projecten of kleinere, routinematige werkzaamheden, bij M.K. Techniek leveren we altijd topkwaliteit. Deze hoge standaard kunnen we garanderen dankzij onze unieke werkwijze en het gebruik van uitsluitend gekwalificeerd en gemotiveerd personeel. Door actief deel te nemen aan de opstart en begeleiding van projecten, kunnen we goed inspelen op de specifieke wensen en eisen van onze opdrachtgevers. Dit zorgt ervoor dat de juiste persoon op de juiste plek terechtkomt.
 
We zijn blij dat je hier bent en hopen dat je deel wilt uitmaken van ons verhaal.

Name: Reliable Plating
Description: Reliable Plating Corp. provides the highest quality electroplating, chrome plating, electroless plating and RoHS compliant metal finishing tailored to your individual specifications, serving the Aerospace, Automotive, Communications, Electronic, Marine, Military, and Commercial Manufacturing sectors.

Name: LA CIBEK PRESSOFUSIONE
Description:
La Cibek has been designing and manufacturing Die-Casting Aluminum and Zinc alloy components since 1968. It is a highly specialized and professional partner that can guarantee a complete service, starting from the design and construction of the mould, to the Die-Casting and machining and surface treatements required by the customer.

La Cibek is characterized by solid values such as a strong and consolidated partnership with customers and suppliers, a constant motivation and training of its employees and the environmental sustainability of production processes.

In recent years, despite the economic crisis, the Company has chosen to invest in plants, new technologies and new services, ensuring process continuity and quality to its customers.

Our products cover a wide range of sectors: Professional appliances, Electrical and Electronics, LPG equipment for automobiles, Agriculture, Industrial automation and cleaning machines,  Pneumatics, Hydraulics and Measuring Instruments.

Name: Kwaliteit Plaatwerk
Description: Producent van metalen plaatonderdelen

Name: Stal Warsztat Sp. z o.o.
Description: Firma powstała na bazie Zakładu Usługowego o blisko trzydziestoletniej tradycji. Od początku prowadząca działalność produkcyjno-usługową w zakresie obróbki metali. Zakład posiada infrastrukturę i wyposażenie do realizacji procesów obróbki skrawaniem, obróbki plastycznej blach, termicznego wypalania blach do grubości 200mm, laserowym wypalaniem blach, obróbek ślusarskich oraz spawaniem metodami MIG/MAG oraz TIG.

Name: Dubbeldam Holding
Description:
Strong companies, one organization. Dubbeldam Holding is a group of independent companies active in various (international) market niches. The passion for technology, creating beautiful products and thinking along in unique customer-oriented solutions is the connecting factor between the companies.

Participating companies have their own (participating) board/management team, a healthy financial position and sufficient growth potential. With clear agreements, both a full takeover and various forms of participation can be discussed.

We believe in long-term relationships. We pay a lot of attention to innovation and sustainable business practices. As an entrepreneur, we believe in joining forces and synergy.

Name: DeZetwerkfabriek
Description: De Zetwerkfabriek fabriceert zetwerken in vele vormen en kleuren met name voor gevel en dakbekleding ten behoeve van utiliteitsbouw, koel- en vrieshuizen en agrarische bouw. Uiteraard maken wij ook zetwerken voor andere toepassingen of halffabrikaten voor metaalverwerkende bedrijven.

Name: P.SOOD & CO.
Description:
P. SOOD & CO (Est. 1953) we are specialists in Tools, Alloy & Special Steels. 
Stockiest of Tool & Alloy Steel to BIS, SAE, AISI, DIN, and JIS standards. 

Hot Rolled and /or Bright Steel Bar & Wire in Mild, Carbon Alloy and Stainless-Steel Grades in accordance with Indian or equal vent international standards.  

Service Provider for Pickling, Phosphate & Spheroidize Annealing of Steel Wire Rod Coils in Hot Rolled and Cold Drawn Condition. 

Mercantile Agent: for Structural Steel, Plates, Sheet Metal and Coils of leading steel mills like SAIL, Tata Steel, AM/NS, JSW, JSPL, and JSL to name a few. 

We have been operating for 70 years in the steel industry.

Our Office & Work is in Chennai, we have branches in Kolkata, Pune & Mumbai for the distribution of our products.

Name: ALTA spa
Description:
ALTA Spa was founded in Italy in 1968 by a group of pioneers in the world of precision mechanics.
ALTA finishing and quality control, with unique solutions in the world made with proprietary technology, allow to obtain high-performance and long-lasting products.
Reliable products thanks also to the automatic system that, by scanning the surface of the tube at the end of processing, allows the detection of any micro defects in the surface.

ALTA SPA has been at the top of the global tube market for more than 50 years for the construction of hydraulic cylinders.

Name: Galvano Helbling AG
Description:
Die Galvano Helbling AG ist ein klassisches mittelständisches Unternehmen mit Sitz in Biel/Bienne. Seit 1954 steht die Qualität und der direkte Kundenbezug an oberster Stelle. Durch unsere Handgalvanik und die Spezialisierung auf klein und mittelgroße Serien können wir einen hohen Standard im Bereich des Qualitätsmanagement anbieten.

Zertifiziert nach ISO 9001:2015 und mit umfangreicher Erfahrung in den Bereichen Luft- und Raumfahrt, Maschinenbau, Feinmechanik und Automotiv sind wir in der Lage auf unsere Kundenwünsche spezifisch einzugehen.

Name: GALVANICA GENTILE SRL
Description: TRATTAMENTI GALVANICI DI DORATURA, ARGENTATURA E NICHELATURA SU METALLI ED IN PARTICOLARE TRATTAMENTI GALVANICI DI COMPONENTI ELETTRONICI.

Name: Visser Techniek
Description:
Visser Techniek kan trots zijn op een generaties lange ervaring in het ontwerpen, vervaardigen en toepassen van plaatwerk en constructies in RVS, Aluminium en Staal.

Wij beschikken over een uitgebreid machinepark en vakkundige medewerkers die u ten alle tijden van dienst zijn om uw wensen of ideeën voor uw producten te realiseren.

Onze kennis en ervaring op het gebied van roestvaststaalbewerking zetten wij al vele jaren in voor de realisatie van projecten en producten voor de chemie, food industrie, procesindustrie, offshore, piping, en intern transport.

Daarnaast leveren wij halffabricaten aan bedrijven die roestvaststalen onderdelen assembleren. Wij zijn ingesteld op korte levertijden.

Heeft u vragen neem dan gerust contact met ons op.  Onze medewerkers voorzien u graag en geheel vrijblijvend van passend advies.

Name: Alfa TT S.r.l.
Description: Alfa T.T. è un'azienda di Brescia che si occupa di trattamenti termici di qualità. Facciamo parte del gruppo guidato da Phoenix International S.p.A. e siamo in grado di garantire per ogni lavoro un’efficiente organizzazione e un'ottimizzazione dei tempi di consegna. La nostra azienda è certificata ISO 9001:2015 / 14001:2015 / 45001:2018.

Name: Colorsolution Srl
Description: Colorsolution, in the heart of the Brembana Valley (Bergamo - one hour from Milan, Italy), offers liquid and powder coating services for any kind of metal and surface. We certify the product through the ISO 9001:2015 quality control system. We take care of before and post-painting services, including pre-assembly and assembly of finished groups, ready to feed the line.

Name: HIERMEX
Description:
Ofrecemos servicios de pintura electrostática, corte, maquinado, troquelado y transformación de metales para la industria metal mecánica. Somos especialistas en maquila y ensambles industriales.
En HIERMEX, tenemos más de 25 máquinas, cada una de ellas especializada para cada proceso de manufactura, lo cual nos permite que la producción sea más eficiente, rápida, replicable y lo más importante con una calidad superior a la de la competencia dentro del mercado manufacturero mexicano. 
Somos una empresa que desarrolla soluciones en la industria metal mecánica para satisfacer y cumplir con las necesidades de nuestros clientes en México y el mundo.

Name: Heass Metaal
Description:
Heass Metaal is een toonaangevende specialist in vier productgroepen: paardenboxen, buitenstallen, stalen trappen en stalen constructies. Met jarenlange ervaring en vakmanschap leveren wij maatwerkoplossingen voor zowel particulieren als bedrijven.

Wij staan bekend om onze kwaliteit, duurzaamheid en klantgerichte werkwijze. In onze moderne werkplaats combineren wij traditioneel vakmanschap met de nieuwste technologieën, zoals onze lasrobot, om producten te leveren die voldoen aan de hoogste eisen.

Onze producten zijn ontworpen met oog voor veiligheid, gebruiksgemak en een lange levensduur. Of het nu gaat om een standaardoplossing of een specifiek maatwerkproject, Heass Metaal denkt met u mee van ontwerp tot montage.

Ons team van ervaren vakmensen staat garant voor een vakkundige uitvoering en uitstekende service. Wij zijn gevestigd in IJsselmuiden en bedienen klanten door heel Nederland en daarbuiten.

Heass Metaal: Uw partner in metaalbewerking en stalinrichting!

Name: Monnig Global
Description: Bob Monnig founded Monnig Industries in 1960 in Glasgow, Missouri. The company quickly established a reputation for being the premier hot-dip galvanizer in the Midwest. The family now operates four other plants throughout the mid-west, as well as freight transportation.

Name: Ecometal SA
Description:
After 20 years working with precious metals, our founders created Ecometal, an efficient and dynamic company which offers its customers a high standard of both technical and commercial professionalism. We offer a global service including treatment, recovery, analysis, technical consulting, and commercialization of precious metals extracted from:

> Scrap from watchmaking and jewelry industry (sweepings, waste, ashes, leftovers, crucibles)
> Waste with oil
> Scrap steel containing precious metals
> Industrial waste (sludge, dental filling scrap, solutions)
> Scrap from goldsmiths/silversmiths (chips, rods, déchets)
>Scrap gold
> Scrap silver

Name: Van 't Hof Aluminium B.V.
Description: Gespecialiseerd in aluminium ramen, deuren, schuifpuien, hardglas puien, winkelpuien en vliesgevels.

Name: 1CSC, a.s.
Description: At 1CSC, we have long been united by steel and a shared vision. We realize how important the quality of our work is to our customers. That's why we don't just talk about it, but constantly invest in its development. In order to build fair and long-lasting business relationships, we must first and foremost give our customers certainty. Certainty in the quality and variety of our products, the speed of delivery and our stability. And that's what we do together in a team of more than 300 employees. We are a Czech company with a good name and headquarters in the middle of Europe - in Brno. We are engaged in the production of calibrated welded pipes and profiles, steel coil processing, laser processing of steel components.

Name: HTR GmbH
Description:
Feuer und Flamme für Ihren Erfolg

Die Leidenschaft für optimale Härteergebnisse leitet HTR seit über 20 Jahren. Für unsere Kunden gehen wir die Extrameile. Darum vertrauen europaweit mehr als 1000 Unternehmen auf unser Know-how.

Ihre Härterei für höchste Qualitätsansprüche

Name: ESTIMET sp. z o.o.
Description:
Rewolucyjne podejście do ofertowania usług z zakresu obróbki blach. Jako pierwsi na świecie oferujemy zautomatyzowany proces przygotowywania oferty cenowe na usługi takie jak:
- cięcie blach
- gięcie blach
- pozostała obróbka i wykończenie blach

Jako firma realizujemy usługi takie jak:
- cięcie laserem
- cięcie plazmowe
- cięcie gazowe
- cięcie strumieniem wody
- gięcie blach
- znakowanie elementów

Name: Reinhold Mendritzki Kaltwalzwerk GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Reinhold Mendritzki Kaltwalzwerk GmbH & Co. KG is a mining & metals company based out of Germany.

Name: HFP Bandstahl GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Stolz auf 100 Jahre Erfahrung!

Modernste Technik und umfangreiches Wissen in der Verarbeitung von Stahl kennzeichnen unseren Standort in Bad Salzungen, Deutschland. 
Leistung bedeutet für uns eine breite Angebotspalette kaltgewalzter Stähle von höchster Qualität zu marktgerechten Preisen, Flexibilität und hoher Lieferbereitschaft.

Name: Boreal Plating - Peças Industriais
Description:
Presente no mercado de Tratamento de Superfícies desde 1988, a Boreal é uma empresa consolidada e reconhecida como uma das maiores do ramo no sul do Brasil.

Sua história está pautada no desenvolvimento constante de processos com alto padrão de qualidade, e no aperfeiçoamento contínuo de suas práticas de gestão, refletido nas certificações ISO 9001, NBR 15100 e RoHS que possui.

Os processos da Boreal andam de mãos dadas com práticas ambientais corretas, sendo todos os resíduos (sólidos, líquidos e gasosos) monitorados e tratados em conformidade com a legislação ambiental.

Name: Almeco Group
Description:
ALMECO GROUP is world leader in the production of aluminum components and laminates for the architectural, lighting, solar and decorative applications. A service focused at maximum product customization and the highest supply flexibility. 
ALMECO's core business are:
- LIGHTING (high reflective laminates and high efficient reflectors)
- SOLAR (copper and aluminium absorbers + aluminium reflective surfaces for solar thermal applications)
- ARCHITECTURAL&DESIGN (coloured and textured anodised aluminium surfaces)

Name: Fonderie Horne
Description: En activité depuis 1927, la Fonderie Horne revêt fièrement son titre d'unique fonderie de cuivre au Canada et de plus grand producteur de cuivre et de métaux précieux en Amérique du Nord.

Name: Vesuvius Digital Services
Description:
As part of the Vesuvius group, our Sensors & Probes division, within Digital Services business unit, delivers complete and customizable solutions to precisely measure the many variables involved in the production and treatment of molten metal.

We think beyond today to create the innovative solutions that will shape the future, delivering products and services that help our customers make their industrial processes safer, more efficient, and more sustainable.

We focus on providing a range of products that enhance the control and monitoring of our customers’ production processes, complementing Vesuvius’ strong presence and expertise in molten metal flow engineering.

We create technologies that can be integrated into process management systems and products that include temperature sensors, oxygen, hydrogen and sublance probes and iron oxide and metal sampling systems.

Our products are carefully designed, tested, and fabricated to increase the efficiency and sustainability of our customers’ processes. We supply melt shops and foundries all around the globe with high standards and service levels.

With our global team of highly qualified professionals, Vesuvius Sensors & Probes is constantly evolving our product development processes and innovative solutions for customers around the world.

We have operations on all continents with production and assembly facilities throughout the Americas, Europe and Asia. And commercial or administrative offices to assess you in all these regions.

This global presence enables us to bring the same level of service excellence, specialized assessment, and technical support to customers in every corner of the world.

Our commitment to meeting the needs and expectations of our customers ensures we pay attention to every detail, from service to final delivery, in all stages of the process, to guarantee the quality of our products.

Name: Collini Group
Description:
The Collini Group specialises in the finishing of base materials by coating: galvanising, anodising, hot-dip galvanising and powder coating – in short, the entire range of surface coating processes. With more than 60 fully automated coating systems, Collini offers the highest performance and flexibility in production.

Our broad technology portfolio includes a wide variety of system types, and depending on requirements, includes standard layers or customised solutions. Metals and engineering plastics are mainly coated in industrial mass production. Single and special quantities are also possible.

Collini at a glance:
_ System type: Drum, rack, band
_ Technologies: Galvanising, Eloxal, hot-dip zinc, CDP, powder
_ Surfaces: Standard layers, specially developed alloys, composite layers, layer systems
_ Basic materials: Metals and engineering plastics
_ In addition: Upstream and downstream services

Name: MagREEsource
Description:
Born in the Alps, Mag REEsource arises from more than 25 years of R&D within CNRS lab in the field of NdFeB magnets and to the discovery of the Hydrogenation technology of Rare Earth transition Metals phase. 
As a committed European Metallurgy Enterprise, MagREEsource wants to be a link in the circular economy by offering a green metallurgical solution thru short loop recycling of NdFeB magnets to secure and diversify the supply of Rare Earth permanent magnets to our European High-tech industries.

Name: STI-FRANCE
Description:
4 usines en France (Peinture - Acier - Titane - Alu - Décor).
1 nouvelle société au Portugal (chaine alu avec 4m - chaine usinage chimique titane).
 40ène de procédés spéciaux.
 260 qualifications pour 35 Donneurs d’Ordre différents.
 >3000 nouvelles industrialisations chaque année.
 1,2M€ de pièces livrées en 2023.
 OTD moyen > 95%
Excellence qualité et reconnu pour les pièces techniques.

« Au service de nos partenaires pour la valorisation des pièces mécaniques et cosmétiques » :
- CND : Ressuage, Magnétoscopie, Nital, Rollscan.
- TRAITEMENTS DE SURFACE : Cadmiage, Zinc-nickelage, Argentage, Phosphatation, Brunissage, Passivation, Nickelage, Cuivrage, TSA, OAS, Alodine, Surtec, Dorure, Dépôt décoratif…
- USINAGE & DÉCAPAGE : Chimique.
- PEINTURE : Tous types de peintures liquides sur composite et métallique.

 Capacité dimensionnelle => De quelques millimètres à 4,5 mètres.

Name: DELTAR CO-DEPOSITION S.R.L.
Description: Deltar è azienda leader nella deposizione di Nichel Chimico ad alto fosforo, del codeposito Nichel Chimico-Carburo di Silicio (NiSiC) Delsic e Nichel-PTFE, presente sin dal 1960, conosciuta per l’ottima qualità e l’enorme capacità produttiva.

Name: Bales Metal Surface Solutions
Description: Since 1978 Bales has tackled the most complex metal surfacing jobs with sophisticated solutions. From sticking mold parts to metal corrosion, and everything in between; we finish what others start.

Name: Hegge Toelevering NV
Description: Since 1893, Hegge has been your reliable B2B partner for customised metal processing and quality aluminium mudguards for trucks and trailers. A range of metalworking products, each one produced with high-quality materials and an excellent finish, that’s our trademark.

Name: Associazione Italiana Zincatura
Description:
L’Associazione Italiana Zincatura, AIZ, costituita nel 1957, è un’associazione senza scopo di lucro che ha per obiettivo principale sviluppare l’uso della zincatura a caldo, come protezione ottimale dell’acciaio contro la corrosione. In quest’ambito partecipa a livello internazionale all’attività dell’EGGA , European General Galvanizers Association. In campo nazionale l’AIZ è associata all’ASSOMET, Associazione Nazionale Industrie Metalli non Ferrosi. Segue le attività scientifiche e di ricerca a livello internazionale; promuove studi per la messa a punto di nuovi prodotti e il perfezionamento di quelli esistenti; collabora con varie Università Italiane; pubblica testi tecnici e divulgativi. Organizza convegni e seminari; promuove la collaborazione e l’interscambio di informazioni fra persone, enti, organizzazioni ed altre istituzioni che perseguono scopi analoghi.

Partecipa all’ elaborazione, stesura e revisione di norme tecniche nazionali ed internazionali nell’ ambito delle attività di Comitati ISO, CEN, ECISS, UNI, Unsider, Unimet, CEI. Promuove l’ uso dell’ acciaio strutturale insieme a Federacciai, ACAI, CTA, AIPEG.

Fornisce un supporto continuo ai progettisti e utenti finali per determinare il migliore risultato dell’ applicazione della zincatura a caldo.

Name: Supreme Steel LLC
Description: With over 20 years of excellence, Supreme Steel is a leading stockist and distributor of ferrous and non-ferrous metals. From high-quality bars and sheets to tailored metal solutions, we deliver what your projects need, when they need it!

Name: VH Metalúrgica
Description:
A VH Metalúrgica é uma empresa com sede em Curitiba- PR, fundada em 2004 por Luiz Paulo Skrzek, com o desejo de transformar ideias em realidade trazendo um novo modelo de manufatura, usinando peças e dispositivos para a indústria Metal-Mecânica e Universidades.

Há 20 anos a VH vem atendendo o mercado metalúrgico regional e nacional, respeitando todos os princípios éticos de crescimento, destacando-se pelo fornecimento de produtos de qualidade.

Usinamos peças de pequeno e médio porte com os mais diversos materiais, oferecemos aos segmentos industriais, os melhores serviços em usinagem, garantindo qualidade e rapidez na entrega de seu projeto.

Name: de Cromvoirtse, snel metaal op maat
Description: de Cromvoirtse is a steel service center whose specialty is the quick delivery of custom steel, stainless steel and aluminum. The custom-make done by laser cutting, plasma cutting, flame cutting, tube laser cutting, folding and cutting. de Cromvoirtse will throughout the Netherlands

Name: VERBRUGGE
Description:
Créée il y a plus de 80 ans, VERBRUGGE est un des leaders en matière de revêtements mécaniques pour la protection de pièces, par nickelage chimique. 
Ses marchés sont les fabricants de machines au sens large (automobile, naval, pompes à vide, ferroviaire, sidérurgie, pétrole, imprimerie, pharmaceutique, hydraulique, etc.).

Grâce à notre expertise en matière de protection anticorrosion, de revêtements et de traitements thermiques, nous garantissons dureté et fiabilité des pièces traitées.

Les technologies et les contraintes évoluant, les produits doivent s’adapter et les moyens doivent anticiper les nouveaux besoins industriels (pour exemple les véhicules thermiques vers l’électrique ou prendre pied dans les énergies nouvelles)

Pour répondre à ce constat, VERBRUGGE à investie 6 M€ en 2021 dans un nouvel atelier.

● Des capacités de production doublées et des nouveaux produits  intégrés en ligne. 

Deux trains de ligne de 55 Mètres, totalisant 77 postes de travail, dont 18 sont des réserves pour s’adapter à des demandes nouvelles. Orientée nickel chimique à 100%, elle passe rapidement d’une série à l’autre, et répond ainsi aux demandes spécifiques tout en augmentant la gamme de services. 

● L’automatisation de nombreuses tâches, des postes de travail revus pour plus d’ergonomie, un cadre amélioré et des nuisances réduites au maximum. 

Avec ces nouvelles capacités de production, Verbrugge peut offrir encore plus de flexibilité (une charge cliente, quel que soit son matériau et la gamme spécifique qu’elle nécessite, peut être introduite en ligne à tout instant) et répondre aux marchés en expansion.

● La prise en compte des questions environnementale dans une seule et même ligne.

Un système d’épuration des eaux qui permet un recyclage intégral, des adductions d’eaux limitées au strict nécessaire, une meilleure gestion de l’énergie ou une protection optimale des sols et des atmosphères.

Name: Mol Cy NV
Description:
Sedert de oprichting van MOL in 1944 profileert ons bedrijf zich als een onderneming die technische uitdagingen niet uit de weg gaat, meer nog dit is ons handelsmerk geworden. Actieve productontwikkeling, een innovatieve aanpak en doorgedreven internationalisering hebben het bedrijf gemaakt tot wat het nu is: meer dan 400 gedreven werknemers die samen instaan voor de realisatie van een hoogwaardig productgamma.

Een team van gespecialiseerde technici staat in voor de dienst-na-verkoop, in binnen- en buitenland. MOL beschikt over het ISO 9001-2008 getuigschrift, het Caterpillar Certified Supplier label en een lasproces certificatie volgens EN 15085 (lassen van spoorweg-voertuigen en componenten).

Deze erkenningen zijn het resultaat van onze voortdurende kwaliteitsbewaking en constante verfijning van productiemethodes.

De industriële voertuigen van MOL vinden een wereldwijde afzet: Europa, Afrika, Het Midden Oosten, het Verre Oosten, … behoren tot het actieterrein.

Name: APS - METRASUR - LORILLEUX COATING SOLUTIONS
Description: Our mission : bring a sustainable value to your parts. APS Coating Solutions is specialized in dry application technologies for surface treatment. From prototypes to very large series, APS COATING SOLUTIONS develops and applies the functional coatings best suited to prolong the performance of your mechanical parts, whatever their environment.

Name: MMC Hardmetal UK Ltd
Description:
Mitsubishi Materials develops innovative tools of the highest quality, precision and functionality.  

A portfolio of products are provided for milling, drilling and turning applications, in addition to other specialised tools to meet industry demands. Customers are offered ideal solutions that raise productivity and reduce tool inventory.   

In the UK, our vision is to deliver to our partners a portfolio of advanced quality products that anticipate technological advancements and satisfies industry's needs.

Name: Phoenix 3D Metaal
Description: Wij zijn Phoenix 3D Metaal. First tier supplier in het vormen van plaatwerk tot 3D product. Dit doen we door gebruik te maken van de rubberperstechniek: dieptrekken in kleine- en middelgrote series.

Name: EXALCO S.A.
Description:
EXALCO S.A. Aluminium Industry was founded in 1973 with its headquarters based in Larissa, Greece. As an integral part of the Greek Aluminium History, the company’s name is linked with the tradition, experience, development and quality of its products and services. 

EXALCO is an integrated industrial unit producing aluminium profiles, having the capability to cover all the modern structural, architectural and customized needs. We are focused to continuous improvement and development of the services rendered, offering quality products with respect towards the natural and social environments. 

EXALCO is a leader within the Greek aluminium extrusion industry and has developed an extended sales network within domestic and foreign markets. 

EXALCO's Process Capabilities:
- Aluminium extrusion lines (1100tn, 1600tn, 1750tn, 2200tn, 2300tn, 2840tn) with annual capacity of 60,000tn
- Thermal-break assembly units with annual capacity of 5,000tn
- Machining units (cutting, punching)
- Anodizing unit with annual capacity of 3,500tn
- Powder coating units (RAL, special colours) with annual capacity of 18,000tn
- Sublimation "wood effect" unit with annual capacity of 3,000tn
- Standard & customized packaging
- Aluminium Recycling

EXALCO's Product Range:
- Aluminium architectural systems (profiles and accessories for building  windows, entrance doors, curtain walls, railings, solar shading) 
- Customized aluminium profiles for structural and industrial applications
- Standard aluminium profiles (Squares, Flats, Angles, etc)
- Aluminium PV mounting systems (for PV parks and building roofs)

EXALCO's certifications according to:
- EN ISO 9001:2015
- EN ISO 14001:2015  
- EN ISO 45001:2018
- EN ISO 50001:2018
- EN 15088:2005 (CE Marking)
- QUALICOAT (Architecture Seaside Class)
- QUALANOD (Architecture & Industrial)
- QUALIDECO (Sublimation)
- Environmental Product Declarations, Reg.: EPD-IES-0008991, EPD-IES-0008992, EPD-IES-0008993

Name: Griffon & Romano S.p.a.
Description: Founded in 1954 and part of SIJ – Slovenian Steel Group, SIJ Griffon & Romano S.p.A. is one of Italy’s leading stainless steel service centres. With facilities in Melzo (MI) and Corte Tegge (RE), we combine tradition, innovation, and sustainability in the processing of stainless steels (austenitic, duplex, super duplex, ferritic, and heat-resistant grades). We offer high-definition plasma cutting, waterjet cutting, mechanical cutting, deburring, and customised machining, certified to ISO 9001:2015 with inspections by RINA, DNV, Lloyd’s Register, Bureau Veritas, and TUV. Serving the automotive, construction, food, pharmaceutical, chemical, petrochemical, marine, nuclear, and water treatment industries, we ensure speed, quality, and a stock of over 3,500 tons.

Name: Nicro Plating Group
Description:
We create solutions for plating and metal finishes using cutting edge technology and achieving the best quality to meet all OEM´s requirements.  
Founded in 1943 NICRO Plating Group has been the leader in plating and coating services in Mexico for over 80 years, supporting most major tier automotive industries through its 3 sites: Tlalnepantla, Mexico State; Cd. Juárez, Chihuahua; Queretaro, Qro.  

All NICRO facilities are certified under: IATF 16949, ISO 14000, handling CQI-11 and CQI-12 standards.

Name: CERATIZIT Nederland & België
Description:
𝐂𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐳𝐢𝐭 𝐆𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐩 CERATIZIT is dé producent en leverancier van gereedschap voor de verspanende industrie. Ons productaanbod omvat een breed scala aan verspanende gereedschappen voor onder meer draaien, frezen, boren, tappen en draadsnijden. 

De nadruk van CERATIZIT ligt altijd op het optimaal ondersteunen van onze klanten, waarbij we streven naar een zo goed en efficiënt mogelijk bewerkingsproces. Dankzij het zeer brede en kwalitatief hoogwaardige productassortiment, in combinatie met onze expertise in het analyseren van bestaande processen en het ontwikkelen van bewerkingsoplossingen, kunnen we klanten te allen tijde optimaal ondersteunen. Een bijkomend voordeel is onze zeer snelle levertijd: vandaag besteld, morgen in huis.

De Ceratizit Group loopt voorop op het gebied van verspanende gereedschappen, bewerkingsoplossingen en know-how.

Name: Driessen BV
Description: Sinds 1979 produceren wij als toeleverancier dunne plaatwerkdelen voor een grote diversiteit aan markten waarbij kwaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en flexibiliteit centraal staan.

Name: Mitsubishi Materials - MMC Metal France
Description: MMC Metal France is one of the 7 European subsidiaries of the Japanese Mitsubishi Materials Corporation cutting tools division (Metalworking Solutions Company) based in Orsay, France. Founded in 1992 the company delivers over the last 27 years precision tools and integrated cutting tool solutions for the automotive, aerospace and medical as well as the general machine building and mould & die industries. Together wiber of local distributors and associates the company offers customised solutions and a wide variety of precision tools for turning, milling and drilling to the French metal working industry. Mitsubishi Materials Corporation employs more than 24,000 people in 77 countries, operating Head Offices in Europe, India, Brazil, China, USA, Japan and Thailand, a modern R&D Centre in Japan as well as various production facilities throughout worldwide, including one in Spain.

Name: GSM Galvanica
Description:
Dal 1986 GSM ci occupiamo di galvanica a telaio, verniciatura protettiva in ottone, zama, ferro e acciaio inox,  pulitura metalli (smerigliatura, lucidatura, satinatura e spalmatura su rame).
La nostra produzione si sviluppa su 5.000 m² con un reparto di smerigliatura e lucidatura attrezzato con quattro isole robotizzate, macchine automatiche e postazioni manuali, due impianti galvanici in linea a sei carri con controllo computerizzato, un impianto dedicato alla ramatura a spessore, due impianti di verniciatura chiusi pressurizzati, di cui uno completamente automatico per verniciature protettive monocomponente o bicomponente e un'area con banchi di controllo, montaggio ed imballaggio.
Abbiamo la certificazione ISO9001 e ISO14000 ed un laboratorio dotato di Fischerscope.

Name: Reginox
Description: Reginox is located in Rijssen in the eastern part of the Netherlands. It is here that all our sinks are developed and manufactured. With ultra-modern machinery, we produce more than 150 different sinks for the national and international kitchen markets. Thanks to its constant innovation and responsible production practices, and with a detailed understanding of people and the environment, Reginox occupies a leading position in the global market.

Name: Allgroupst
Description: ALLGST is a company that provides services in the metalworking and construction sectors. We value quality, safety and environmental protection. We specialize in welding, pipe Line Insulation, metal structures and boilermaking. We have a qualified workforce for our existing and potential partners. ALLGST employees are qualified and authorized to carry out their respective areas of work. Their skills have already been certified and we are always in the process of improving them, guaranteeing quality and performance in line with our clients' needs and the regulations of the country in question.

Name: Advanced Heat Treat Corp.
Description:
Advanced Heat Treat Corp. (AHT) is a recognized leader in providing heat treat services and superior metallurgical solutions to companies across the globe. Our UltraGlow family of processes includes Plasma Ion Nitriding, Ferritic Nitrocarburizing (FNC), Gas Nitriding, UltraOx, Through Hardening, Carburizing, Carbonitriding, Induction Hardening, and many more.

Established in 1981, Advanced Heat Treat Corp. (AHT) is committed to exceeding your expectations with “UltraGlowing” results. AHT is recognized annually by the heat treat industry publication, The Monty, as being a top commercial heat treater due to innovative approaches, multiple heat treatment services, large nitriding size capabilities, and years of experience. But over and over, AHT customers rave about our communication and technical support. So, if you want top-quality heat treatment with that “family feel” customer service, welcome to AHT.

AHT offers the following services: 

UltraGlow Ion (plasma) Nitriding - Nadcap
UltraGlow Gas Nitriding - Nadcap
Ferritic Nitrocarburizing (FNC)
UltraGlow Induction Hardening
UltraOx (environmentally-friendly alternative to Salt Bath Nitriding/QPQ, Melonite, Chrome Plating and/or Nickel Plating)
Carburizing
Carbonitriding
Quench & Temper/Through Hardening
Annealing
Normalizing
Cold Treatment / Cryogenics
Age/Precipitation Hardening
Magnetic Particle Inspection (Magnaflux) 
Tempering/Drawing
Stress Relieve
Duplex Hardening
Assembly
Cleaning Applications
Failure Analysis
Metallurgical Services & Consultation

Quality Certifications:

Numerous military/aerospace approvals, including Merit Status Nadcap (National Aerospace Defense Contractors Accreditation Program - MidPort facility, Waterloo, IA) for heat treating (nitriding) and AQS (Aerospace Quality System)
IATF 16949:2016 certification
ISO 9001:2015
ITAR Registered
Federal Firearms License - Alabama, Iowa and Michigan

Name: The Coatinc Company
Description:
Als ältestes Familienunternehmen schützen wir mit viel Leidenschaft seit Generationen Stahl vor Korrosion – national und international – für Stahl- & Metallbauprojekte und im Automotive-Segment. Nachhaltigkeit und höchste Qualität stehen dabei für uns immer an erster Stelle.

Wir verbinden Oberflächentechniken der Feuerverzinkung (Normaltemperatur-, Präzisions- und Schleuderverzinkung), Pulverbeschichtung, Nassbeschichtung und Anodisieren mit einer großen Vielzahl angeschlossener Dienstleistungen. Das Spektrum der Leistungen fängt mit der Beratung an und geht über alle folgenden Verfahrensschritte, inklusive Anarbeitung bis hin zur termingerechten Verpackung. Hinzu kommen eine umfassende Logistik mit digitalisierter Warenwirtschaft und Exportabwicklung.

Name: Van der Zalm Metaalindustrie B.V.
Description:
Van der Zalm Metaalindustrie levert maatwerk in kleine en grote staalconstructies voor de grond-, weg-en waterbouw, scheepsbouw, offshore en machinebouw. 

Ons dienstenpakket is breed: van engineering en productie tot en met transport en montage op locatie. In onze riante productiehallen is het aantal mogelijkheden voor metaalbewerking nagenoeg oneindig: zagen, zetten, knippen, snijden, draaien, kanten, boren, walsen, frezen… Doordat we blijven investeren in ons machinepark, maken we steeds meer mogelijk voor onze opdrachtgevers. Zo beschikken we over geavanceerde freesbanken en speciale apparatuur voor stiftlassen.

Wij produceren onder meer aanmeersteigers, pontons, bruggen, brugdelen, constructies met hydrauliek, onderdelen voor de scheepsbouw, constructies voor de machinebouw, bordessen, geleiders, doorvoeringen, trappen etc. Van klein tot steeds groter. 

Opdrachtgevers waarderen het complete dienstenpakket, de leveringsbetrouwbaarheid, de kwaliteit, de creativiteit, de no-nonsense mentaliteit én het feit dat we altijd met onze opdrachtgevers meedenken.

We zijn gecertificeerd overeenkomstig VCA ** / ISO 9001 / EN 1090 tm EX4 / ISO 3834 / EN 10204. 
Tevens zijn we een erkend leerbedrijf en bieden we BBL’ers en stagiair(e)s een veilige werkomgeving met volop mogelijkheden om zich verder te ontwikkelen. 
Lid van Koninklijke Metaalunie

Name: MAUCATECH
Description:
MAUCATECH, visa suprir necessidade de nossos clientes tendo à disposição manutenção especializada em Usinagem em Campo/ Alinhamento/ Análise de Vibração) em equipamentos como Secadores de Açúcar, Fornos Rotativos Fertilizantes, Peneiras Rotativas Caldo.

Pontes Rolantes: Atuamos com Manutenção Preventiva e Manutenção Corretiva.

Filtros Rotativos Vácuo: Atuamos com  Manutenção mecânica e Caldeiraria.
Temos equipes treinadas especializadas, para atender nossos clientes visando segurança das atividades e equipamento, qualidade dos serviços e prazo.

Temos experiência de trabalhos realizados: E.U.A Estados Unidos da América, Colômbia, México, Guatemala, Panamá e Argentina.

Atendemos: Usinas Açúcar e Álcool, Indústrias Fertilizantes, Siderurgia e Cimento…

Name: Kusters Precision Parts
Description:
Kusters Precision Parts is in 50 jaar uitgegroeid tot een belangrijke toeleverancier in de verspanende industrie. We leveren dagelijks hoogwaardige fijnmechanische onderdelen van de meest uiteenlopende metaal- en kunststofsoorten aan diverse gerenommeerde internationale bedrijven, waaronder: Halfgeleiderindustrie, Lucht- en ruimtevaart, Optische industrie, Farmaceutische industrie.

Onze expertise ligt in het efficiënt vervaardigen van zowel enkelstuks op korte termijn als seriematig produceren van hoogkwalitatieve onderdelen over een langere termijn. Doordat we onze klanten kunnen ondersteunen bij het volledige ontwerp- en fabricageproces, zijn we erg bekwaam in het vervaardigen van prototypes en pilotseries. Vervolgens kunnen we bij een toenemende klantvraag de productie zonder verlies aan kwaliteit opschalen door gebruik te maken ons riante moderne machinepark en van onze strikte kwaliteitsprocedures.

Kusters is onderdeel van Andra Tech Group, een groep bestaande uit 9 bedrijven in Nederland en Duitsland: Wilting (Eindhoven, Wintelre en Leerdam), Kusters Precision Parts (Oss), Mayer Feintechnik (Göttingen) HFI (Groenlo), Visietech (Schijndel), DKH (Uden), Jatec (Leerdam), Lemmens Metaalbewerking (Bergeijk) en Lucassen (Sittard).

Op dit moment werken we met zo'n 700 medewerkers op 11 productielocaties dagelijks aan fijnmechanische componenten voor diverse high tech industrieën.

Name: Goma BV
Description:
Goma is an international orientated subcontractor, specialized in high quality sheet metal products, as well semi-finished parts as assemblies. 
With co-engineering, automatic sheet metal machines, welding- and spot welding robots, powder coating installation and assembly, Goma offers all of the benefits for the manufacture of e.g. enclosures and coverings for several markets.

Goma has advanced options and skills. For example, we use modern production methods with the aid of CAD/CAM, CNC stamping, laser cutting and bending, MIG, MAG, TIG and WIG welding, spot welding, powder coating and assembly.
 In addition, GOMA has quality improving and cost saving options in the field of work planning and transportation. For example, the completely computerised sheet warehouse supplies the correct material to the correct machine at the correct time, also at night and on the weekend.
 In order to be able to offer you an optimum finished product we have our own powder coating installation and assembly department. We also manage transport in-house. You can rest assured that your products will be delivered on time. 
 
GOMA offers you distinctive quality in small and large series. Due to our specialization on metal processing, our engineer can think along with you from the start in the development of your product. Our slogan " customized sheet metal " is therefore a promise we keep. .

Name: MTC Powder Solutions
Description:
MTC Powder Solutions – Pioneering Near-Net Shape & HIP Technology
 
MTC Powder Solutions is a world-leading expert in Hot Isostatic Pressing (HIP) and Near-Net Shape (NNS) manufacturing. We produce high-performance, wear-resistant, and corrosion-resistant metal components with complex geometries—offering superior strength and efficiency compared to castings, forgings, and conventional materials.
By utilizing advanced powder metallurgy and HIP, we enhance material properties, enabling higher strength, wear resistance, and corrosion resistance while optimizing material efficiency. Near-net shape manufacturing allows us to minimize material waste and reduce machining needs, offering a cost-effective and sustainable solution.
Our ability to manufacture complex, irregularly shaped components provides significant advantages in terms of design flexibility and material performance. With a strong commitment to innovation, precision, and engineering excellence, we continuously push the boundaries of what’s possible in powder metallurgy.
At MTC Powder Solutions, we don’t just manufacture components—we redefine material performance through advanced HIP and Near-Net Shape technology.
 
 Follow us for insights into HIP technology, powder metallurgy innovations, and next-generation material solutions.

Name: BWB Oberflächentechnik
Description: Die BWB-Gruppe bietet eine vielseitige Palette elektrolytischer, galvanischer und chemischer Oberflächenbehandlungen. Alle Standorte der internationalen Firmengruppe haben jahrzehntelange Erfahrung in der funktionellen und dekorativen Oberflächentechnik und bedienen ihre Kundschaft mit lösungsorientierten Leistungen.

Name: PROTEC GROUPE
Description:
Le groupe Protec est un acteur industriel français spécialisé dans le traitement et finitions des matériaux pour les secteurs de l’aéronautique, de la défense, de l’espace, du ferroviaire, de l’énergie et du luxe. 
Notre vocation est de contribuer à une aviation durable, à une défense souveraine et au rayonnement du luxe à la française dans le monde. 

Le groupe emploie 250 personnes et dispose de l’ensemble des équipements techniques et certifications requises par l’industrie et ses clients. Le groupe a créé un centre de formation pour ses besoins internes et ceux de ses partenaires afin d’assurer la transmission de nos savoir-faire. Le groupe Protec bénéfice aussi d’une division Recherche et Développement, équipée d’un laboratoire. 

Nous transmettons des valeurs sûres depuis bientôt 70 ans. Quatre engagements fondamentaux constituent les leviers d’excellence du groupe,  piliers de notre performance et de notre pérennité.

•	Offrir l’excellence en assurant le plus haut niveau de qualité et de fiabilité à nos partenaires.
•	Placer la satisfaction client en tête de nos préoccupations à travers des relations basées sur l’écoute et la réactivité.  
•	Cultiver l’innovation en associant audace, créativité, Recherche & Développement.
•	S'engager pour un impact positif en matière d’éthique, de responsabilité sociale et de respect de l’environnement.

Notre groupe est organisé autour de 6 entités de services structurées et complémentaires pour répondre à des besoins précis. Elles sont basées sur 4 sites de production en Ile-de-France.

De la grande série à la pièce unique, des traitements conventionnels aux prestations les plus complexes, le groupe Protec assure une production française et engagée. Nous offrons notre expertise et des solutions de pointe pour tous les besoins de traitement de surface et de finitions décoratives : 
•	Contrôle non destructif
•	Traitements de surface
•	Peinture
•	Développement de solution 
•	Formation professionnelle

Name: Iondrive (ASX:ION)
Description: Iondrive is a battery technology commercialisation group listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (under ASX ticker “ION”). Iondrive holds three exclusive worldwide licences comprising the next generation battery technologies comprising 1) an enhanced performance non-flammable lithium-ion based battery, 2) a low-cost, environmentally sustainable method for recycling lithium batteries, and 3) a low-cost, high cycle life water-based battery. Iondrive’s mineral exploration business includes 100% interest in a substantial portfolio of REE, Li and precious metals exploration projects in South Korea.

Name: Treatnorte | Tratamentos Térmicos do Norte
Description:
A Treatnorte é uma empresa jovem de tratamentos térmicos, ativa desde abril de 2023 e situada a cerca de uma hora do Porto.

Oferecemos uma gama completa de serviços, com a nitruração como principal, incluindo também nitrocarburação, nitroxidação e oxidação. Estamos a expandir a nossa oferta com investimento em tecnologias de ponta para novos tratamentos.

Utilizamos sistemas modernos para monitorizar com precisão todas as fases dos processos, garantindo flexibilidade e qualidade em cada tratamento.

Com experiência em indústrias como extrusão de alumínio, extrusão de polímeros, estampagem, mecânica de precisão, fundição e moldes e indústria automóvel, a Treatnorte adapta-se às necessidades de cada cliente, oferecendo soluções técnicas confiáveis e personalizadas.

Name: ELECTROPLAST (groupe GALVANOPLAST)
Description: Filiale du groupe français GALVANOPLAST, ELECTROPLAST a vue le jour en 2018 sur la zone franche Tanger Automotive City au MAROC afin de répondre au besoin des industriels en traitement anti-corrosion. Premier site au MAROC certifié IATF16949:2016 dans le traitement de surface.

Name: ESSER TWIN PIPES
Description:
Esser Twin Pipes, headquartered in Germany, is a globally recognized market leader in the manufacture of high quality double-walled pipes and fittings originally developed for concrete pumping systems. With over seven decades of expertise in the industry, the company has built a strong reputation for delivering innovative and efficient solutions for a wide range of requirements. Esser Twin Pipes serves a wide range of industries, including construction, mining, tunneling and power plants, providing them with robust and reliable equipment that can withstand the most challenging conditions.

The company's extensive product range includes twin wall pipes, elbows, reducers, and a variety of other related items. Each product is meticulously crafted using the finest quality materials and the latest technology, ensuring incomparable durability and performance. The twin wall pipes, for instance, are renowned for their high wear resistance and longevity, while the elbows are appreciated for their precision design and excellent functionality. The reducers, on the other hand, are valued for their ability to facilitate a smooth and efficient material flow.

Esser Twin Pipes prides itself on its state-of-the-art manufacturing process, which includes the use of advanced machinery and strict quality controls. This rigorous approach to production ensures that every product meets the highest standards of quality and performance. The company's commitment to excellence is reflected in every piece of equipment that leaves their factory, making them a trusted partner for businesses across the globe.

In addition to manufacturing, Esser Twin Pipes also offers a comprehensive range of services, including consulting, planning, and technical support. The team of experienced professionals is always ready to support customers with their requirements to ensure smooth and efficient operation.

Stay up to date - Connect with Esser Twin Pipes for the latest innovations and developments!

We combine high-quality components and equipment, metallurgical expertise, broad production capacities, and great customer service to be the one-stop-shop supplier you need for all your wear and corrosion needs.

Name: Mitsubishi Materials España
Description:
Mitsubishi Materials España es una empresa líder en la fabricación de herramientas de corte de metal duro de alta calidad (brocas, fresas y placas), con más de 45 años de experiencia. 

Con fábrica ubicada en Valencia, Mitsubishi Materials España está especializada en la producción de herramientas de corte tanto en estándar como especiales, principalmente para la industria de la automoción, aeronáutica, medico-dental, así como molde y matriz y mecanizado en general. 

Nuestro equipo humano está comprometido en ofrecer las mejores soluciones a medida para cada cliente con los más exhaustivos estándares de calidad. 

En el centro de formación Mitsubishi Materials Technology & Education Centre de Valencia (MTEC), ingenieros especialistas del sector, investigan y desarrollan nuevos procesos de mecanizado, colaborando mano a mano con nuestros clientes para conseguir mejoras en todos los procesos.

Name: HÄRTHA GROUP
Description:
We improve what matters.

Perfected heat treatment for precision components made of steel Whether in outer space or upon the stormy sea, under high pressure or at high speed - the components of our customers must stand up to the most extreme situations. HÄRTHA is right at home wherever optimal properties are essential and every micrometre and microgram counts.

As one of the leading service providers for heat treatment and coating processes, we ensure that components used in critical situations and application areas work flawlessly and with perfect reliability. We implement the technologies of the future by joining forces with our customers.

We work as partners at eye level. We lay the foundation for HÄRTHA’s exceptional product quality with a first-rate consultation. In this consultation, we join forces with you to define the framework conditions and select the process that best fits the needs of your project. 

We are proficient in all state-of-the-art processes:

Vacuum hardening I Bright hardening I Quenching and temperingI Salt bath hardening I Annealing I Sub-zero-treatment I Gas nitriding I Plasma nitridingI Nitrocarburizing I Salt bath nitriding I Case hardening I Carbonitriding I Inductive hardening I Oxidation I Burnishing I PhosphatingI Nickel coating, chemicallyI Physical vapor deposition processI Anodic treatment I Abrasive blast cleaning I Straightening I Crack detection

Our goal is to ensure that everything - and not just the processes themselves - goes off without a hitch. This is why we offer you a collection and delivery service. What this means for you is maximum efficiency paired with “just-in-time” delivery and zero downtime. 

Our locations in Germany, Italy, and the Netherlands are equipped with state-of-the-art test laboratories. We ensure the highest quality standards by means of procedures such as hardness tests, hardening depth measurements, metallography, and material analyses.

We regard quality as a commitment.

Name: Industrieverband Massivumformung e. V.
Description:
Wir sind immer dann zur Stelle, wenn es wirklich darauf ankommt. Auf der Autobahn, bei 300 km/h im ICE oder auf hoher See und über den Wolken. Kein Tag, an dem ein Mensch nicht mindestens einem massivumgeformten Produkt begegnet. Oft genau dann, wenn Sicherheit die Hauptrolle spielt. Die Vorteile der Massivumformung sind besonders gefragt, wenn Erstklassigkeit, Zuverlässigkeit und Langlebigkeit entscheiden.

Der Industrieverband Massivumformung ist der Verband für die deutsche Schmiedeindustrie. Wir arbeiten jeden Tag daran, die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit unserer über 110 Mitglieder weiter zu steigern. Durch Informationen, Projekte, Weiterbildung, Erfahrungsaustausch und Interessensvertretung.

Gemeinsam bilden die Unternehmen der Massivumformung einen starken Wirtschaftsfaktor in Deutschland: 3 Millionen Tonnen Material verändern ihre Form beim Gesenkschmieden, Kaltfließpressen, Freiformschmieden und Ringwalzen. 

Massivumformung ist vor Ort: In vielen Regionen Deutschlands entstehen hochwertige Produkte im Gesamtwert von jährlich 9 Milliarden Euro. Damit ist Deutschland in dieser wichtigen Industriesparte der Marktführer Europas und die Nummer 2 weltweit.

Name: 247 Lasersnijden
Description:
247 Lasersnijden is een innovatief bedrijf met ruim 20 jaar ervaring in de metaalbewerking. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het lasersnijden, kanten, tappen en nabewerken van plaat- en buismateriaal. Onze kracht? Volledig geautomatiseerde processen, korte doorlooptijden en constante kwaliteit.

U kunt bij ons terecht voor het snijden en bewerken van staal, RVS en aluminium, maar ook voor specials zoals koper, messing en slijtvast staal. Dankzij ons moderne machinepark (met o.a. geavanceerde Trumpf lasers en de Tube 7000 buislaser) leveren wij complexe onderdelen met hoge precisie, ook in serie.

Via ons online portaal vraagt u 24/7 snel een offerte aan. Upload uw tekening, kies uw materiaal en bewerkingen, en ontvang in enkele minuten een voorstel. 

 Onze diensten:
* Lasersnijden van plaat & buis 
* Kanten, tappen en soevereinen
* Ontbramen en afronden van scherpe randen

Wij werken voor engineers, inkopers en productontwikkelaars in de maakindustrie die snelheid, nauwkeurigheid en flexibiliteit zoeken. Van een aluminium behuizing tot een RVS montageplaat of een koperen contactdeel. Wij leveren wat u nodig heeft, wanneer u het nodig heeft.

 Werken bij 247 Lasersnijden? Dat kan!
Werken met de nieuwste machines, in een nette werkomgeving en met collega’s die vakmanschap combineren met teamspirit. Wij groeien hard en zoeken aanpakkers met technisch inzicht.

 Nieuwsgierig wat we voor uw project kunnen betekenen?
Vraag direct een offerte aan via www.247lasersnijden.nl of neem contact op via info@247lasersnijden.nl

Name: Alanod GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
We are the advanced material company. From anodising to PVD coating to individually developed lacquer systems, we offer a full range of process technologies from a single source. We specialise in modifying surface properties on various metal coils such as aluminium, copper, steel and stainless steel. To do this, we combine various process technologies: Anodising, high-vacuum coating (PVD) and individually developed primer and lacquer systems.

Production on an industrial scale
With four anodising lines, four PVD lines, one lacquering line as well as three slitting lines and two cut-to-length lines at our company location in Ennepetal, Germany, we produce functional and decorative surface qualities for a wide variety of sectors on an industrial scale. Our high-quality products are used internationally in the lighting, solar, automotive and electronics industries and are found as surfaces for façades and ceilings, furniture laminates, signs and name-plates and in household appliances.

Expertise in system development
In addition, we continually strive to design innovative and sustainable products. To this end, our interdisciplinary development team works closely with long-standing industrial partners and international research institutes to develop new solutions that offer real added value to a wide range of industries.

Reliable quality in all processes
The high quality of our products and services is the cornerstone of our customers’ confidence in us. In a specially designed testing and development centre with application-specific testing facilities, our products are evaluated, measured and constantly checked so they are in line with international standards.

Name: Tosec B.V.
Description:
Tosec is een metaalbedrijf en constructiebedrijf gespecialiseerd in plaatbewerking.

Lasersnijden, zetwerk, frezen en lassen zijn onze belangrijkste diensten. Wij bewerken staal, hoogsterkte en slijtvast staal, RVS en aluminium plaatwerk. Wij zijn bovendien ISO 9001:2008 en ISO 3834-2 gecertificeerd en zijn in het bezit van de EN 1090 certificaat en door Lloyds bevoegd tot overstempelen. 

Plaatbewerking
Wij hebben een uitgebreid machinepark en jarenlange ervaring met plaatbewerking. Wij snijden, buigen, verspanen en verbinden plaatwerk. Onze plaatbewerkingen zijn; lasersnijden, plasmasnijden, autogeensnijden, frezen, kanten/zetten en lassen.

Tosec Plaatbewerking
Tosec is een ISO 9001:2002 gecertificeerd metaalbedrijf en een ISO 3834-2 gecertificeerd lasbedrijf. Gespecialiseerd in plaatbewerking; het snijden, kanten, frezen en lassen van plaatwerk. Naast ons uitgebreide machinepark, staat onze snelle en betrouwbare levering centraal.

XXL Plaatwerk
Wij hebben veel ervaring met plaatbewerking van grote producten. lasersnijden tot 20 x 3 meter. Kanten/zetten tot 16 meter, groot freeswerk tot 7.000 x 1.200 x 1.300 en lassen tot 40 meter lang!

Sectoren
Wij zijn toeleverancier van plaatwerk en daar zijn we goed in. Wij leveren plaatwerk, halffabricaten, prototypes, klein seriewerk en grote constructies aan de grond, weg en waterbouw, on- & offshore, agrarische industrie, machinebouw, scheepsbouw, trailer en chassisbouw, universiteiten en constructiebedrijven.

Plaatbewerking - Snel & Veelzijdig:
• Autogeensnijden • Lasersnijden • Plasmasnijden • Frezen • Kanten/zetten • Lassen • Knippen • Walsen • Boren • Ruimen •  Kotteren • Tappen • Flowdrillen • Flowtappen • Knabbelen • Ponsen • Slijpen • Trommelen • Zagen • Richten

Name: ZINQ France
Description:
ZINQ France est le spécialiste de la galvanisation, de la peinture et du traitement duplex. Toujours plus proche de vous, nos 17 sites de galvanisation et 4 de peinture sont à votre disposition sur tout le territoire français. Pour vous servir, près de 800 collaborateurs sont là pour répondre à vos besoins. 

Grâce à nos 21 lignes de galvanisation, nous avons la possibilité de traiter vos pièces contre la corrosion de toutes les dimensions. Nos bains de galvanisation permettent de galvaniser vos structures les plus longues grâce à des bains allant jusqu'à 16,5 m de long ! La technique maîtrisée de la galvanisation par centrifugation nous permet de traiter vos petites pièces comme les écrous, boulons, vis... 

Afin de vous faciliter la livraison et réception de vos pièces, nous vous faisons profiter de notre société de transport intégrée. 

Vous souhaitez apporter une finition esthétique durable à vos aciers ? 9 lignes de thermolaquage vous offrent la possibilité de peindre vos aciers galvanisés. Notre prestation duplex (galvanisation + peinture) vous permet de protéger vos aciers durablement contre la corrosion en leur ajoutant la finition esthétique de votre choix. 

Notre système de management est performant. Tous nos sites sont certifiés ISO 9 001 (qualité), 14 001 (environnement) et 45 001 (sécurité). 

#galvanisation
#ZINQ

Name: A/S HAI Horsens

HAI Horsens is a leader within surface treatment. We can deliver countless combinations of pre-treatments, surface treatments and finishing treatments. Anodizing is an effective treatment used when there are special requirements for aluminum's corrosion resistance and decorative appearance.
We can also offer professionally performed wet painting and technical special painting of almost all large and small aluminum parts, as part of our standard range. Our completely new and top professional wet painting facility is fully equipped with robot systems, paint booths, curing ovens, temperature control and extraction systems.
We are organized and certified according to international standards for quality, environment and energy. The certifications are the cornerstones of our daily work and in our relationships with each individual customer.
Our processes and tests comply with MIL, DIN, EN, ISO, BS, ASTM standards and specifications. In addition, we have a Qualanod license and we can deliver according to Qualanod architecture and hard anodizing.

Name: The Coatinc Company Holding B.V.
Description:
Wij veredelen dromen
Bij The Coatinc Company hebben we alles in huis om ieder droomproject te laten slagen. Thermisch verzinken, hoge temperatuur verzinken, poedercoaten, natlakken, duplex of anodiseren. Ieder project, groot of klein, krijgt altijd de beste bescherming en precies die uitstraling die nodig is. Gegarandeerd. Van advies tot productie en logistieke perfectie: wij zijn de one-stop-shop die dromen duurzaam en in kleur veredelt.

Profiteer van meer dan 500 jaar ervaring
Wij werken alleen met de beste specialisten in oppervlaktebehandeling en conservering. Dit komt voort uit een jarenlange traditie en innovatie. De wortels van ons familiebedrijf gaan terug tot in de zestiende eeuw, nog ver voor het begin van de industriële staalproductie. Zo ontwikkelden we een diepgaande kennis van staal, het materiaal waarin we al meer dan 500 jaar gespecialiseerd zijn. Met 24 dochterondernemingen en ons netwerk van internationale samenwerkingspartners, brengen wij ervaring en specialisme in bij uw project.

Innovatief en klantgericht
Wij bieden meerdere innovatieve processen en (nieuwe) coatingtechnologiëen: Naast het thermisch en hoge temperatuur verzinken, bieden wij ook poedercoaten en natlakken evenals duplex, het anodiseren van aluminium, passiveren en centrifugaal verzinken aan. Daarnaast onderscheiden wij ons door ook een uitgebreid pakket aan gerelateerde diensten aan te bieden, waaronder transport en logistiek. 

Over The Coatinc Company Holding B.V.
The Coatinc Company Holding GmbH behoort in Europa tot de belangrijkste ondernemingen voor oppervlaktebehandeling en levert optimale kwaliteit. Als onderdeel van The Coatinc Company opereert The Coatinc Company Holding B.V. al 150 jaar voornamelijk in de Benelux. The Coatinc Company verbindt traditie met innovatie, internationaal denken met regionale verbondenheid, duurzaamheid met continue procesverbetering en aanpassing op dynamische marktontwikkelingen met het doel om medewerkers én klanten tevreden te stellen.
