Name: SIRELLI-FILIPPONI SRL
Description:
L’azienda è stata fondata nel lontano 1972 per iniziativa di Davide Sirelli, un imprenditore dalla visione avanguardista. Fin da quei primi giorni, la sua collaborazione con l’esperto socio Arnaldo Filipponi ha segnato l’ingresso deciso dell’azienda nel settore della pulitura e lucidatura dei metalli.

Nei decenni successivi, l’azienda ha mantenuto salda la sua struttura familiare, mantenendo un approccio unitario e solidale all’interno della famiglia, che si è rivelato uno dei punti di forza e di successo più significativi..

La nuova generazione, attenta alle nuove tecnologie e alla crescita.
Attualmente, la guida dell’azienda è affidata a William, Silvia e Michele, che rappresentano la seconda generazione di questa impresa a conduzione familiare.

Sirelli-Filipponi srl
La nuova generazione ha introdotto una strategia di crescita mirata attraverso l’acquisizione di macchinari all’avanguardia per la realizzazione di diverse lavorazioni, trasformando l’officina in un moderno centro di lavorazione, altamente funzionale e competitivo.

L’azienda oggi
La nostra presenza nel settore ha ormai superato il mezzo secolo, durante il quale abbiamo costruito una reputazione solida basata sulla qualità e la precisione dei nostri servizi, rendendola il nostro autentico marchio distintivo.

Collaboriamo con aziende leader in svariati settori industriali, tra cui il settore nautico, farmaceutico, ascensoristico, alimentare, motoristico, dell’arredamento, meccanico e farmaceutico, posizionandoci come partner di fiducia e riferimento.

Oltre a servire con dedizione il mondo industriale, offriamo anche soluzioni di alta qualità ai clienti privati.

Attualmente, la Sirelli – Filipponi dispone di un team altamente specializzato nella lavorazione della finitura dei metalli, con competenze avanzate sia nell’utilizzo di macchinari di precisione che nelle tecniche manuali, specialmente nelle fasi in cui l’arte e l’occhio esperto sono imprescindibili per ottenere finiture di eccellenza.

Mit unserem engagierten Team und modernsten Anlagen garantieren wir Ihnen höchste Qualität und Effizienz. Wir setzen auf maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, um Ihre spezifischen Anforderungen zu erfüllen und Ihre Produkte optimal zur Geltung zu bringen.

Name: Zippy´s Coating Factory GmbH
Description:
Die Geschichte für unser Lohnbeschichtungsunternehmen geht bis in das Jahr 1996 zurück. Gegründet als Einzelunternehmen Holdys Pulverbeschichtung und später auch Holdys Pulverbeschichtung GmbH blickt das Unternehmen auf eine erfolgreiche Zeit zurück.  

Im Januar 2024 fand ein Eigentümerwechsel statt. Nach einer Orientierungsphase des neuen Gesellschafters in der ersten Hälfte des Jahres 2024 wurde das Unternehmen in Zippy´s Coating Factory GmbH umbenannt. Die Umbenennung spiegelt unseren Wandel und unser Streben nach Innovation wider, ohne das sich im Kern etwas für unsere Kunden ändert. Unsere hohen Qualitätsstandards und unser Engagement für ihre Zufriedenheit wollen wir stetig verbessern und ausbauen. 

Wir verfügen über ein junges, dynamisches und engagiertes Team von qualifizierten Mitarbeitern, welche Ihre individuellen Beschichtungswünsche erfüllen wird.

Egal ob klassische Geländer, Fensterrahmen oder komplexe Maschinenbauteile – wir bringen jedes Bauteil zum Strahlen. Ob Einzelstück oder Serienproduktion, wir beschichten Bauteile nicht nur in RAL-Farben, sondern auch in zahlreichen NSC- und Sondertönen. 

Bei uns sind alle Kunden willkommen, egal ob Handwerksunternehmen, Industrieunternehmen oder Privatkunde.

Für uns gibt es keine Grenzen, doch das zu beschichtende Material hat anlagenbedingt seine Limitierungen. Die maximalen Abmessungen betragen 7000 x 2500 x 3200 mm (bis zu 500 kg).
Neben der Pulverbeschichtung bieten wir Zusatzleistungen, wie Feuerverzinken, Sandstrahlen, Entlacken und Entzinken an.

Als ihr Partner für ihre Bedarfe freuen wir uns schon heute auf ihre Anfrage. Wir beraten Sie ausführlich und gehen individuell auf Ihre speziellen Wünsche ein.

Verder zijn we zeer trots op onze nieuwbouw die we in 2019 in gebruik genomen hebben. Ons gebouw en infrastructuur voldoet aan de strengste eisen en is klaar voor de toekomst. 

Digitaal zijn we reeds jaar en dag ver vooruitstrevend! 
De industrie 4.0 is bij Tilkin Powder Coatings sinds 2015 afgerond en werpt zijn vruchten af.

Online kunnen er orders geboekt en opgevolgd worden. 
De gebruikers hoeven er niets voor te betalen, sterker nog, ze worden ervoor beloond per order dat ze boeken!

De familie Tilkin is steeds op zoek naar een efficiëntere manieren om het werk en de methodes van onze 39 vakbekwame medewerkers te verbeteren. 
Dit stelt ons in staat om goede werkkrachten aan te trekken zonder al teveel moeite hiervoor te doen! 
Een tevreden medewerker zal het werk dan ook steeds met veel goesting uitvoeren en dat merk je dadelijk in de kwaliteit die ze dagelijks aan ons afleveren.

Name: MESCEL
Description:
Since the beginning of the 20th century, hard metals (HMs), also known as cemented carbides, have played a crucial role in both industrial and everyday life. They are utilized in a wide range of products, from cars and airplanes to electronic devices and household appliances. HMs also find applications in agriculture, food processing, textiles, construction, and industries such as oil and gas extraction, as well as in biomedical and surgical tools.
Since 2011, the European Union has classified the primary components of HMs—tungsten (W) and cobalt (Co)—as Critical Raw Materials (CRMs) due to their significant industrial importance and high supply risks. As a result, it is urgent to maximize the recovery of W and Co from HM scraps. Currently, the industrial recovery rates for these materials stand at approximately 40% for W and 20% for Co. However, there is still substantial progress needed to meet the environmental and economic sustainability targets that are now mandatory.
The MESCEL project aims to tackle this challenge by developing an innovative and environmentally friendly electrochemical method for recovering W and Co from HM scrap. The primary objective of this project is to create an electrochemical cell that facilitates the recycling of tungsten carbide-cobalt (WC-Co) scrap, to completely separate W and Co. This process will utilize a neutral pH reactant and require low electric power, making it compatible with solar panel energy generation.
The main justification for this approach is the status of W and Co as Critical Raw Materials, combined with the limited number of mines in the EU, new China export control regulations (November 2024) and the high environmental impact associated with ore mining and refining. Recycling scrap with minimal environmental impact presents an ideal solution to ensure that the supply of these materials aligns with the principles of a green economy.

The company’s proprietary TX Treatment process is used in demanding applications where it may achieve as much as 30 times the wear resistance as untreated surfaces, and easily surpasses the capabilities of other processes. TX treatments are unique thermal diffusion surface transformation technologies that improve the toughness of steel without creating brittleness. Description:
ABF Zakład Obróbki Skrawaniem powstał w 1984r. i do dnia dzisiejszego stał się największą i najbardziej dynamiczną krajowa firmą specjalizującą się w produkcji form szklarskich – matryc dla przemysłu spożywczego, kosmetycznego, czy farmaceutycznego.

Obróbka odbywa się na obrabiarkach sterowanych numerycznie CNC z nowoczesnymi systemami sterowania (Heidenhein, Fagor, Siemens). Korzystamy ze sprawdzonych i wysoko wydajnych narzędzi renomowanych firm takich jak: Sandvik, Wurth, Guhring, Tormet, Perschmann. Proces produkcji jest wdrażany i nadzorowany przez system ERP – CDN XL, a procesy technologiczne są przygotowywane i diagnozowane przez systemy typu CAD/CAM: Unigraphics, Alpha Cam. Dzięki długoletniemu doświadczeniu i ciągłemu rozwojowi zakładu jesteśmy w stanie wykonać trudne technologicznie formy szklarskie o skomplikowanych kształtach. 

Dostarczamy komplety części formujących do każdego typu automatów. Skład stopów, z jakich wykonana ma być dana część formująca, może być ustalona przez zamawiającego Klienta. Oferujemy dodatkowe wzmocnienia krawędzi i powierzchni części formujących poprzez napawanie proszkami metalicznymi. Kształt formy może zostać ozdobiony poprzez wygrawerowanie dowolnych kształtów. Jesteśmy nie tylko wykonawcą części formujących, ale także ich projektantem. Produkty są możliwie jakościowo najlepsze, konkurencyjne i zgodne ze światowymi standardami. Potwierdzeniem tego jest posiadany przez nas certyfikat jakości ISO 9001:2000.

ABF Zakład Obróbki Skrawaniem dostosowuje swoją działalność do potrzeb i wymagań rynku. Systematycznie doskonalimy program produkcyjny, stale podnosząc jakość wytwarzanych wyrobów. Nieustannie unowocześniamy park maszynowy i usprawniamy procesy produkcyjne w trosce o zadowolenie Klienta.

Name: NK Vacuum Heat Treatments

Since 1996 this journey has started and today we have the largest Nitriding facility in Gujarat and may be in India. We are having seven Gas Nitriding furnaces of various sizes (height and diameter). The legacy of skill, care and techniques is taken ahead by his son, CEO, Mr. Harsh Pujara, B.E. (Mechanical) for more than 12 years.

After providing quality heat treatment in Gas and Liquid Nitriding process for many years, in the year 2020 we have started the “Vacuum Heat treatment“ process in a company named “NK Vacuum Heat treatments”, the sister concern of “Nitrotech HT shop“. We are constantly achieving desired hardness, wear resistance and other mechanical properties in different tool steel materials like high speed steel, hot work steel, cold work steel, plastic mold steel and many other tool steel materials.

By demand of the customers, we have also added heat treatment processes like Hardening, carburizing, Nitro-carburizing, carbonitriding & annealing. And we are delighted to mention that we are achieving desired results in all these processes and our customers are highly satisfied.

Nasza historia to przede wszystkim opowieść o zaufaniu klientów, którzy polegają na nas, realizując swoje projekty – od prostych detali po najbardziej skomplikowane konstrukcje.

Każdego dnia dostarczamy szeroką gamę metali, dbając o to, aby każdy dostarczany materiał spełniał najwyższe standardy jakościowe, umożliwiając naszym klientom pewną realizację ich wizji.

Bezpieczeństwo i terminowość dostaw są fundamentem naszej pracy. Dzięki zaawansowanym technologiom – od cięcia laserowego, przez gięcie CNC, aż po precyzyjną obróbkę water-jet – zapewniamy realizację nawet najbardziej wymagających zadań z wyjątkową dokładnością i troską o detale.

Za każdym projektem stoi zespół ekspertów, którzy są gotowi doradzić i zaproponować optymalne rozwiązania techniczne. Jesteśmy dumni z tego, że nasi klienci traktują nas jako partnera, któremu można zaufać zarówno w kwestiach technicznych, jak i biznesowych.

Dołącz do grona firm, które stawiają na pewność i precyzję Impressmetal. Zrealizujmy razem Twoje najważniejsze projekty.

Name: Projeto Power WAAM
Description:
O Projeto WAAM - Wire and Arc Additive Manufacturing é uma parceria com a multinacional PowerMig e o IFSC, com duração de três anos e com uma proposta inovadora de manufatura aditiva com resfriamento por ar comprimido. O intuito é incrementar a qualidade e a taxa de deposição em kg/h, resfriando as camadas das peças metálicas produzidas. 




A Powerming é a única empresa que representa a Panasonic no Brasil, comprada recentemente pela multinacional americana Lincoln Electric que se prepara para expandir para outros países. E foi acreditando na estrutura e possibilidades de investir no IFSC que a referida empresa aplicou 3 milhões de reais nesse projeto para que haja uma pesquisa de incremento de competitividade da manufatura aditiva.




Sendo assim, além do investimento, a empresa montará uma célula robotizada de soldagem completamente nova no IFSC, para o desenvolvimento do projeto, prevendo também, o estreitamento entre a sede do programa de Subvenção Econômica de Fluxo Contínuo - Caxias do Sul / RS, como em outras instituições de ensino pelo mundo, na qual podem auxiliar em conhecimentos.




O WAAM é um processo relativamente novo, que consiste na colocação de cordões de solda em cada camada para a formação de uma determinada peça metálica, como uma impressão 3D de plástico. Entretanto, diferente das máquinas de adição a plástico, o metal exige uma temperatura extremamente maior para a fusão. Para garantir a qualidade dimensional, há a necessidade de tempo de espera para o resfriamento natural entre camadas depositadas, o que reduz a produtividade.



Para suplantar a perda de produtividade, o objetivo do projeto WAAM com resfriamento por ar comprimido, aplicará a patente desenvolvida no IFSC e depositada no INPI para reduzir ou até mesmo eliminar o tempo de espera para o resfriamento das camadas depositadas.

Description:
Świadczymy usługi w zakresie nowoczesnych technologii obróbki metali. komponenty do maszyn i urządzeń, które wymagają precyzyjnego cięcia elementów o skomplikowanych kształtach
prototypy elementów do maszyn i urządzeń z dużym wsparciem doradczym naszych technologów
 
U nas zamówisz m.in.:
elementy ogrodzeń i balustrad
elementy konstrukcji stalowych
części nadwozi samochodowych
części składowe maszyn i urządzeń – np. dla przemysłu spożywczego
komponenty do mebli i wyposażenia sklepów, gabinetów weterynaryjnych, etc. 
 
Dlaczego warto z nami pracować?
Rozbudowany park maszynowy, który pozwala nie tylko na cięcie laserem, ale i na usługi dodatkowe m.in. jak gięcie i walcowanie blach. W ten sposób nasi klienci mają gwarancję realizacji gotowego elementu w jednym czasie i pod jedną datą odbioru.
Przestrzeń produkcyjna na realizację dużych kontraktów i elastyczne procesy pozwalają  nam łatwo zwiększać wolumeny. Dzięki temu nasi klienci mają krótki czas realizacji i stały dostęp do produktu (cykliczne dostawy) bez magazynowania u siebie.
Jesteśmy otwarci na prototypowanie maszyn i urządzeń. Odbywa się to z dużym wsparciem naszych technologów, dzięki czemu możemy podpowiedzieć naszym klientom jak zoptymalizować koszty poprzez zastosowanie innych materiałów i/ lub zmiany w samej konstrukcji.

Name: EKOM S.C.
Description:
Nasza firma działa od 1998 r. świadcząc usługi w zakresie mechanicznego cięcia różnorodnych materiałów techniką laserową i wodną. Przez pierwsze lata działalności funkcjonowaliśmy na rynkach usług związanych z surowcami wtórnymi oraz cięciem strumieniem wodnym. Kilka lat temu poszerzyliśmy naszą ofertę o obróbkę materiałów techniką laserową, gięcie i frezowanie. Przez ten czas zdobyliśmy duże doświadczenie w realizacji różnorodnych zleceń naszych Kontrahentów. Nasze obecne zaplecze techniczne pozwala nam na świadczenie szerokiego wachlarza usług o najwyższej jakości. Oferujemy szybki czas realizacji zamówienia i profesjonalne doradztwo techniczne. Na zamówienie klienta jesteśmy w stanie wyciąć dowolny materiał.
Nasza oferta obejmuje cięcie: stali czarnej, blachy nierdzewnej, aluminium, metali kolorowych, plexi, PCV, gumy, skóry, kolorowych laminatów, szkła i kamieni syntetycznych.

Name: probas.plating GmbH
Description:
World-Class Plating Technology.

We are experts in gold- and electroplating surface finishing for decorative and functional purposes.

In accordance with your requirements, we electroplate the surfaces of your products in gold (Auruna) and bronze (Miralloy) fully & semi-automatically or as individual single pieces. Our finished products – from microparts in series to large-area, geometrically sophisticating parts – are characterized by maximum precision and outstanding quality. 

Unique dimensions – all over the world!

With our 16.0 transformer we set new global standards in electroplating production. Individual products made of gold-plated stainless steel are manufactured by us in dimensions of 16,000 x 600 x 1,000 mm with a weight of up to 3,000 kg. 

Our innovative capacity is your advantage. Benefit from our plus in dimension, flexibility, speed and precision. 

Each of your requirements and ideas will meet the best solution. We offer to you our full service – comprehensive advice on site, prompt preparation of an appropriate concept, a collection of samples and detailed quotes. We are at your disposal anywhere and anytime. 

Take advantage of our offer of surface plating from one source. We look forward to getting into contact with you.

Name: J&A Burghaus GmbH
Description:
Seit über 60 Jahren stehen wir für Qualität „Made in Germany“ und haben uns durch stetiges Engagement und kontinuierliche Verbesserung als führender Anbieter von Aluminiumgussteilen etabliert. Was als kleiner Familienbetrieb begann, ist heute ein modernes Unternehmen, das fortschrittlichste Produktionstechnologien, eine kundenorientierte Organisation und umfassendes Fachwissen im NE-Metallguss vereint.
Wir sind auf die Herstellung von Gussprodukten in Klein- und Mittelserien spezialisiert und bieten Ihnen ein umfassendes Leistungsspektrum: von der Gussproduktion über mechanische Bearbeitung und Oberflächenbehandlung bis hin zu Montage und Logistik einbaufertiger Teile. Eine enge persönliche Betreuung durch einen festen Ansprechpartner ist für uns essenziell für eine erfolgreiche Partnerschaft.
Unser Erfolg gründet sich auf mehreren Säulen, die uns zu einem unverzichtbaren Partner für unsere Kunden machen. Kundenzufriedenheit hat bei uns oberste Priorität. Wir streben danach, die Erwartungen unserer Kunden nicht nur zu erfüllen, sondern zu übertreffen, indem wir maßgeschneiderte Lösungen und erstklassigen Service bieten.
Qualität ist das Herzstück unseres Unternehmens. Durch strenge Qualitätskontrollen und modernste Technologien stellen wir sicher, dass unsere Gussteile höchsten internationalen Standards entsprechen und in jeder Hinsicht zuverlässig und langlebig sind.
Unsere langjährige Erfahrung in der Gießerei- und Metallverarbeitung ermöglicht es uns, komplexe Projekte effizient und präzise umzusetzen. Wir investieren kontinuierlich in umweltfreundliche Technologien und nachhaltige Produktionsverfahren, um unseren ökologischen Fußabdruck zu minimieren und einen positiven Beitrag zum Umweltschutz zu leisten.

Description:

For over 25 years under our leadership, we have maintained our position as the national reference through quality, precision, and a commitment to excellence.

Services:
-Vacuum Heat Treatment – High-precision hardening and treatment of steels and superalloys for maximum performance.
-Atmosphere Heat Treatment – Oil quenching, carburizing, and other processes to boost strength and durability.
-Gas Nitriding – Advanced surface hardening to improve wear resistance.
-Induction Hardening – Localized treatments for specific high-wear areas.
-Surface Finishing – Zinc plating in white, yellow, or black finishes, and hot bluing for corrosion protection.
-Industrial Cleaning – Professional oil and solvent degreasing for parts before and after treatment.

Name: dsp Pulverbeschichtung GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Sind Sie im Einkauf oder leiten Projekte in der Metallverarbeitung – und Ihr größter Frust beginnt beim letzten Fertigungsschritt?

Beschichtungen, die nicht halten, Farbfehler, Rückläufer, Produktionsstillstand? 

Für viele Unternehmen leider Alltag.
Während Lieferanten mit günstigen Preisen werben, zahlen Sie am Ende doppelt:

Durch Ausschuss, Reklamationen und verärgerte Kunden. 
Besonders kritisch, wenn Liefertermine platzen – und Ihre Produktionsplanung ins Wanken gerät.

DSP Pulverbeschichtung in NRW beendet genau das.
Wir liefern große, schwere und komplexe Bauteile in garantiert hoher Qualität.

Geprüft, zertifiziert und pünktlich.
Unsere Teile kommen fertig – ohne Nacharbeit. 
Die Kommunikation? Direkt, schnell, lösungsorientiert.

Expressoptionen und Konsignationslager sind selbstverständlich möglich.
Was andere nicht leisten können, ist bei uns Standard: Pulverbeschichtung bis 6,5Meter Länge und 1Tonne Gewicht, mit planbaren 7–10 Werktagen Lieferzeit.

Und wenn’s brennt: Wir reagieren – nicht irgendwann, sondern sofort.
 Schluss mit Rückläufern und Lieferärger. 

Jetzt anfragen: info@dsp-pulver.de

Name: Martin Schleiftechnik AG
Description:
Die Firma Martin Schleiftechnik AG in Olten gehört zu den führenden Schleifbetrieben in der Schweiz. Mit der Konzentration auf das Lohnschleifen - gerne auch von komplexen Werkstücken - bietet Martin Schleiftechnik seiner Kundschaft viel Flexibilität in der Auftragsabwicklung, ist in der Lage, einfachere wie komplexe Schleif-Aufgaben kurzfristig, gründlich und zuverlässig auszuführen und steht für seine Kunden im ganzen Schleifprozess stets zur Seite. Dabei können wir auch ganze Teile der Wertschöpfungskette übernehmen, was mit der Rohmaterialbeschaffung beginnt.

Auf diese Weise sind wir seit Jahrzehnten für verschiedenste Branchen wie der Papier- und Druck, Metallbearbeitung, Maschinenbau, Messer- und Schneidetechnik, Stanzereien oder Anlagen für Bau und Landwirtschaft die erste Adresse vom ersten bis zum letzten Schliff.

Einige Highlights: 

- 10 erfahrene Mitarbeitende 
- Standort Olten, Schweiz
- Flachschleifen bis 6800mm
- Profilschleifen bis 2100mm
- Durchlaufschleifen in Hochleistung
- Nachschleifen statt wegwerfen 
- Vorgelagerte Rohmaterialbeschaffung und Logistik
- ...und wir lieben spezielle Schleif-Herausforderungen

Wenn es ums Schleifen geht, kommen Sie an uns nicht vorbei. Wir sind sehr gerne für Sie da. Martin Schleiftechnik AG - Schleifkompetenz aus Olten seit über 55 Jahren.

Stejně jako byl přímočarý název, byl jasný i Priknerův záměr – vybudovat malou zakázkovou kalírnu, která bude tepelně zpracovávat ocel a další kovy v nejvyšší možné kvalitě, zavádět speciální procesy a vyvíjet a zdokonalovat technologie ve prospěch svých zákazníků i životního prostředí. Této myšlence zůstává naše kalírna, známá dnes jako firma PRIKNER – tepelné zpravování kovů s. r. o., věrná i po letech.

Twenty years after its establishment, a new business facility with over five hundred square meters of space was constructed. Later, in 2017, a new business unit was added in nearby Kisovec.

Name: StraalserviceGLD
Description:
Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het professioneel stralen van metalen onderdelen met aqua blast-techniek en zandstralen.

Denk aan auto- en brommeronderdelen, decoratieve objecten of technische componenten. Met aqua blast verwijderen we roest, verf en vuil op een milde maar effectieve manier. Het resultaat is dat jouw onderdelen weer klaar zijn voor lak, coating of hergebruik.

 Wat is Aqua Blast? (natstralen)
Aqua blast stralen is een natstraaltechniek waarbij water, straalmiddel en luchtdruk gecombineerd worden. Dit zorgt voor een grondige reiniging zonder het oppervlak te beschadigen.
Voordelen:
– Glad en egaal resultaat
– Geen vervorming of krassen
– Milieuvriendelijk en stofvrij proces

 Wat we stralen:
– Brommeronderdelen: carters, carburateurs, beugels, aluminium delen
– Auto-onderdelen: kleppendeksels, inlaatspruitstukken aluminium, motorbeugels, aluminium delen
– Velgen

Name: Deka Galvano Technic
Description:
30 yılı aşkın bir süredir, Deka GalvanoTeknik olarak metal yüzey kaplama sektöründe öncü bir misyonla varlığımızı sürdürüyoruz. Metalin Güvencesi ve Kalite Kaplama Sanatı ilkelerini benimseyerek, her adımda mükemmelliği hedefledik ve sektördeki deneyimimizi adım adım geliştirdik.

1993 yılında başladığımız bu yolculuk, elektro çinko kaplama prosesiyle başladı ve zaman içinde kazandığımız derin bilgi ve tecrübeyle şekillendi. Her müşterimiz, her proje, bize yeni bir öğrenme ve gelişme fırsatı sundu. Metal yüzey kaplama alanında liderlik iddiamızı, 30 yıllık bu tecrübeyle temellendirdik.

Metalin Güvencesi prensibi, tam otomatik SIYANÜRSÜZ alkali çinko kaplama hatlarımızın arkasında yatan güvencedir. 30 yıl boyunca kazandığımız deneyim, metal yüzeylerin parlaklığını artırmak, dayanıklılığını sağlamak ve estetikle fonksiyonelliği birleştirmek konusundaki uzmanlığımızı pekiştirdi.

Kalite Kaplama Sanatı, her projeye özenle yaklaşmanın ve metalin her yüzeyinde estetik ile mükemmelliği bir araya getirmenin adıdır. 4 adet tam otomatik askı hattı ve 1 adet tam otomatik dolap hattımız, bu sanatı en üst düzeyde yaşattığımızın bir ifadesidir. 30 yıllık deneyimimizle, her projeyi bir sanat eseri gibi şekillendiriyoruz.

Name: Y-TECH YTBEHANDLINGSTEKNIK AB
Description:
Välkommen till [Y-TECH YTBEHANDLINGSTEKNIK] –Vår specialistkompetens omfattar Elförzinkning och Ytbehandling där vi skyddar och förbättrar materialens hållbarhet och estetik. Med avancerade tekniker och noggrannhet i varje steg säkerställer vi att våra produkter är rustade att motstå korrosion och miljöpåverkan. Genom Korrosionsskydd ser vi till att material håller enastående prestanda under lång tid och bidrar till en mer hållbar framtid.

Vår målsättning är att vara din pålitliga partner och leverantör för alla dina behov inom Legotillverkning, , Elförzinkning, Ytbehandling, Passivering och Korrosionsskydd.

Y-tech ytbehandling är ett företag som erbjuder kvalitativ ytbehandling och rostskyddsbehandling med hjälp av elförzinkning. Elförzinkning är en process där man lägger på ett tunt lager av zink på stål eller gjutjärn för att skydda dem mot korrosion och ett ytskikt med passivering i gult, blått och svart. Y-tech ytbehandling utför även väteutdrivning och kan förse produkterna med en Sealer eller Rostskyddinhibitor.

Of u nu een specifiek project heeft of extra capaciteit zoekt voor tijdelijke pieken in uw productie, wij zorgen ervoor dat uw laswerk altijd perfect wordt uitgevoerd!

•	Flexibele lasoplossingen voor tijdelijke en langdurige projecten

Jesteśmy ekspertami w jednostkowej i seryjnej produkcji precyzyjnych części wykonywanych za pomocą obróbki skrawaniem. Frezowanie CNC i toczenie CNC to nasza specjalność. Nasze części metalowe są wykorzystywane w kluczowych elementach z wielu branż, takich jak: lotnictwo, kolej, motoryzacja, elektronika, medycyna czy automatyka. 

Świadczymy usługi obróbki CNC w Bydgoszczy, ale nasze elementy trafiają do wielu odbiorców w Europie.

SBX subcontracting

Door onze expertise kunnen onze las engineers u adviseren bij het kiezen van de juiste lasmethode. Hierbij houden we rekening met de kostprijs en kwaliteit.

Met onze uitgebreide “industrie 4.0” productielijn en CE-certificering staan wij voor een constante kwaliteit van uw laswerk. In 2021 installeerden we een automatische poederlaklijn deze is voorzien van een voorbehandelingstunnel en een totale capaciteit van 1350m² (dubbelzijdig) per dag. Poederlakken kan tot stukken van 6600 x 3500 x 2800 mm. Behalve poederlakken kan u ook bij ons terecht voor natlakken, fosfateren en stralen.

Name: Sonaca Industries Pvt Ltd
Description:
Sonaca Industries Pvt. Ltd. is a leading aluminium scrap recycling company based in Chakan, Pune, Maharashtra. With a robust monthly melting capacity of 1,200 MT, we operate a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility powered by advanced German technology to convert aluminium scrap into premium-quality aluminium ingots.

We specialize in the production of low iron (Low Fe) aluminium alloys, engineered specifically for Gravity Die Casting (GDC) applications. Our alloys are trusted across both automotive and non-automotive industries, where consistency, metallurgical precision, and performance are critical.

Driven by innovation, sustainability, and uncompromising quality standards, Sonaca Industries is committed to delivering reliable alloy solutions while promoting responsible recycling and circular manufacturing practices.

Contamos con acabados de pintura electrostática, galvanizado, tropicalizado, reparamos moldes y herramentales relacionados con el ramo, para lo cual contamos con soldadura de micro alambre de aluminio, acero al carbón e inoxidable.

En la línea de producción contamos con una gama de máquinas convencionales como: fresadoras universales, tornos paralelos, rectificadora plana, prensas hidráulicas, máquinas de inyección de plástico, rotomoldeadora, dobladora de cortina CNC, máquinas de control numérico y también tenemos procesos productivos como la fabricación de diferentes tipos de cajuelas para el autotransporte.

Para ver nuestro catálogo de productos y maquinaría lo invitamos a que nos visite en nuestras instalaciones.

Name: Metatreat Industries
Description:
Material Transformation Experts: Forging Excellence in Metals

Our company is a trusted up and coming name in metallurgical solutions, specializing in a range of transformative services that elevate metals to their utmost potential. Armed with cutting-edge techniques, we engineer material properties that meet the exacting standards of diverse industries.

Strength Unleashed:
Our expertise spans a gamut of processes that empower metals with unmatched strength and endurance. Anchored by hardening and tempering, our methodology imparts toughness and robustness. Case hardening enhances surface durability, while normalizing ensures uniformity. Annealing imparts malleability, stress relieving reduces tension, and our precision quenching solidifies structures for peak performance.

Broad Horizons:
Our proficiency is agnostic to metal types – whether ferrous or non-ferrous, our mastery ensures excellence across the board. We don't stop at metals; our skills extend to T4 and T6 heat treatments, reshaping alloys for efficiency and precision.

Traditional Wisdom, Modern Mastery:
Marrying age-old metallurgical wisdom with advanced facilities, we orchestrate transformation. Our engineers possess an intimate grasp of material dynamics, skillfully controlling temperature and time. Equipped with cutting-edge equipment, we execute precisely controlled thermal cycles, ensuring tailored excellence.

Pioneering Progress:
From aerospace to automotive, from industrial to innovation, our services drive progress across sectors. Beyond enhancing materials, we empower innovation. By crafting metals that redefine limits, we're integral to engineering success stories that resonate globally.

In a realm where materials matter most, precision prevails. Welcome to a space where metals cease to be mere elements; they become the very foundation of brilliance.

Name: Eurozincrom
Description:
Eurozincrom è specializzata nella realizzazione di zincature elettrolitiche a freddo professionali, eseguite grazie a macchinari automatici di precisione e personale altamente qualificato che opera nell’osservanza delle norme di qualità e sicurezza, allo scopo di fornire lavorazioni accurate per soddisfare a pieno ogni cliente e le sue esigenze.

Eurozincrom è una giovane realtà imprenditoriale, nata nel 2004, sulla base trentennale esperienza e capacità imprenditoriale del suo fondatore Antonio Dini. Tale esperienza, assieme alle certificazioni di qualità (ISO 9001 e  ISO 14001), a macchinari sempre aggiornati e allineati allo stato dell'arte tecnologico, è una delle garanzie offerte ai clienti dall'azienda, che possiede tutto il know-how di un gruppo affermato.
Le lavorazioni vengono effettuate con impianto a telaio e impianto a rotobarile, i controlli di qualità vengono effettuati con strumenti moderni e tecnologicamente adeguati e volti a garantire il rispetto delle specifiche dei nostri clienti.

Name: Tecnostrutture Italia
Description:
Tecnostrutture Italia – Artigiani del Metallo per Edilizia, Infrastrutture e Luxury Design

Tecnostrutture Italia è una realtà specializzata nella lavorazione del metallo per il settore edilizio, infrastrutturale e del design di alta gamma. Coniugando competenze artigianali, tecnologie d’avanguardia e una visione orientata all’eccellenza, l’azienda realizza strutture, componenti e creazioni metalliche completamente su misura.

Operiamo nella produzione di elementi per cantieri edili, opere infrastrutturali e progetti di carpenteria metallica, garantendo soluzioni flessibili, affidabili e di elevata precisione. Grazie alle capacità maturate dal nostro team, siamo inoltre in grado di progettare e realizzare pezzi unici di luxury design, dove estetica, innovazione e qualità dei materiali si fondono per dare vita a prodotti esclusivi e distintivi.

La nostra missione è supportare imprese, professionisti e designer offrendo manufatti che rispettano gli standard più elevati di sicurezza, efficienza e durabilità, senza rinunciare alla bellezza e alla cura del dettaglio. L’obiettivo è creare valore attraverso una lavorazione sartoriale del metallo, alimentata da passione, ricerca e sostenibilità.

Tecnostrutture Italia: dove la tradizione del saper fare incontra l’ingegneria del futuro e l’eleganza del design.

Description:
Angers Nickel Chrome est une entreprise à taille humaine présente sur les Pays de la Loire et plus globalement dans le Grand Ouest grâce à son implantation à Avrillé, dans le Maine-et-Loire. 

Angers Nickel Chrome cultive le goût de satisfaire aux exigences de ses clients et aux tendances du marché dans le respect des normes environnementales.

Toujours à la pointe de l’innovation et à la recherche des meilleures techniques, Angers Nickel Chrome fait évoluer son offre de  traitements de surface en harmonie avec les besoins de ses clients issus de différents secteurs d’activité comme l’électronique, l’aéronautique, le bâtiment, la connectique, la mécanique ou encore l’agriculture à travers une expertise sur 7 traitements de surface électrolytiques et 5 traitements de surfaces chimiques.

Name: Stara Hi-Tec

Description:
Van Mierlo Staalwerken is gespecialiseerd in het realiseren van complete staalconstructies, met dak- en gevelbekleding. En alles in eigen huis: tekenen, produceren, monteren, transporteren en monteren. 

Van Mierlo Staalwerken maakt en monteert ook kleinere constructiewerken, zoals hekwerken, trappen, overkappingen. Altijd maatwerk, in elke gewenste vorm of afmeting.

Name: ACP Metal Finishing Pte Ltd
Description:
Since 1981, ACP has evolved from a mass volume provider of chemical and surface finishing services to established companies such as Apple, Mitsubishi, Philips, Seagate and Western Digital, to the current high precision and strict conformance to specifications industries from Aerospace, Bio-medical, Optical and Ordnance markets. These surface finishings serve the functions of corrosion resistance, scratch and wear resistance, electrical insulation, cleanliness and aesthetic enhancement.

Current major customers include Boeing, Collins Aerospace, Excelitas, GE, Honeywell, Leica, Moog, SIA Engineering, ST Group of Companies, Stryker, Thales and other established names in the market.

We offer various surface finishing processes according to established standards or customer specifications. Today ACP operates with 190 trained personnel in Joo Koon Circle, Singapore.

Name: OVTech B.V.
Description:
OVTech B.V. is gespecialiseerd in complex CNC freeswerk van RVS, Aluminium en Kunststof. U kunt bij ons terecht voor producten met de maximale afmetingen van 300x300x200mm. Zowel enkelstuks als middelgrote series maken we graag op onze hypermoderne Hermle C250 met HS Flex automatisering.

Bent u op zoek naar een betrouwbare partij om uw freeswerk bij onder te brengen? Neem dan contact met ons op en vraag naar de mogelijkheden.

Name: G.M.S. S.r.l.
Description: Dopo anni di esperienza nel settore stampaggio ottone, il Sig. Trevisan Giacinto ebbe l’intuizione di sviluppare un progetto che è al giorno d’oggi l’attuale G.M.S. Srl. L’idea imprenditoriale partì nel 1977 con lo stampaggio dell’ottone a caldo, che nel 1985 si ampliò, costituendo la G.M.S. Snc, assieme ai figli Gianfranco, Mario e Stefano; abbinando allo stampaggio dell’ottone a caldo la pressofusione dell’alluminio. Nel 1999 si è costituita la G.M.S. Srl, inserendo nella società l’ultimo figlio, Andrea. Nel 2014 nasce il reparto di lavorazioni meccaniche a integrazione dello stampaggio e della pressofusione. L’azienda si è evoluta nel corso degli anni, aumentando il pacchetto Clienti e la diversificazione dei prodotti, arrivando a fornire in tutta Europa, arrivando fino all’America e all’Asia.

Name: Laswerken Buermans - staaldesign
Description:
Bij Laswerken Buermans maken we staaldesign op maat dat gezien mag worden. Van stalen deuren en balustrades tot trapleuningen, handgrepen en overkappingen – alles met oog voor detail en een high-end afwerking.

Met meer dan 20 jaar ervaring in de laswereld weten we precies hoe we ideeën omzetten in stijlvol en duurzaam staalwerk. In 2024 hebben we de overstap gemaakt naar een besloten vennootschap, om als bedrijf nog verder te groeien en onze dienstverlening naar een hoger niveau te tillen.

Of het nu voor architecten, aannemers, interieurprofessionals of particulieren is: wij denken graag mee om elk project tot een succes te maken. In onze toonzaal kun je alles bekijken en bespreken, in een familiale en toegankelijke sfeer, waar vakmanschap en persoonlijke service centraal staan.

Heldere communicatie, flexibiliteit en vakmanschap staan bij ons centraal – zo bouwen we niet alleen sterke constructies, maar ook sterke samenwerkingen.

Uw betrouwbare partner voor staaldesign op maat – krachtig in afwerking, warm in samenwerking.

Name: Coating Plus B.V.
Description: Bij Coating Plus staan de begrippen 'hoogwaardige kwaliteit' en 'afspraak is afspraak' hoog in het vaandel. Door het gehele coatingproces worden er constant kwaliteitscontroles uitgevoerd door ons eigen deskundige medewerkers en door een extern bureau, hierdoor kunnen wij een hoog kwaliteitsniveau garanderen. Ook zorgen wij ervoor dat de levertijden kort zijn en dat er flexibel wordt gereageerd op uw vragen, uiteraard tegen een goede prijs-kwaliteitsverhouding. Dit maakt ons een betrouwbare partner! U bent van harte welkom bij ons in Schaijk.

Name: LBD d.o.o.
Description:
LBD Welding company offers processing, assembly, and welding services for all types of metal materials. We have over 20 years of experience in welding various structures on large projects. As well we provide professional training for welders and offer employment opportunities after training.

Many years of experience in the metal processing industry guarantees high quality welded joints regardless of the thickness of the material and the purpose of the finished product.

Welding is performed by MIG-MAG, TIG and REL processes. 
We perform works in workshops covered with seven cranes with a capacity of 10, 7, 5 tons. 

LBD offers plasma and flame cutting services as well. Our educated engineers can prepare complete planning and drawing documentation for the clients. We can also offer NDT weld inspection services.

Name: DYNAXO
Description:
DYNAXO is a place where passion meets precision and development meets consistency. This is where ideas are born and take real shape.

As a provider of complex technological solutions, we manufacture various types of ready-made products. Striving for continuous improvement and consistently implementing the company's strategy, we have formed our own Research and Development Department. Currently DYNAXO consists of a team of over 150 qualified employees, 2600 m2 production halls, 800 m2 storage halls, 1000 m2 administration building and 12 ha of land for further investments.  We also have a complete research laboratory equipped with the latest equipment.

DYNAXO is a brand established to meet the needs of our customers in a professional and comprehensive manner. We are a symbol of the highest quality, which is proven by the functioning of the company based on the certified quality management system ISO 9001:2009.

Description:
ASTROMET Sp. z o. o. posiada wieloletnie doświadczenie  i uznaną pozycję na rynku dostawców wyrobów ze stali czarnych, stali nierdzewnych, aluminium oraz tworzyw sztucznych, które znajdują zastosowanie przede wszystkim w technice transportu publicznego, motoryzacji, budowie maszyn, urządzeń i innych konstrukcjach przemysłowych.
Bogaty park maszynowy oraz wykwalifikowana kadra pracownicza z wieloletnim doświadczeniem branży metalowej, pozwala nam na wykonanie bardzo skomplikowanych i trudnych technologicznie wyrobów.
Zajmujemy się również projektowaniem, stosując zaawansowane techniki oraz oprogramowanie CAD 2D i 3D.
Posiadamy certyfikaty potwierdzające funkcjonowanie Systemu Zarządzania Jakością ISO 9001:2015, spełnienie wymagań normy PN-EN ISO 3834-2:2007 oraz PN-EN 15085-2 na poziomie CL1

Nasza pasja to tworzenie precyzyjnych rozwiązań dla naszych klientów, dążymy do najwyższej jakości usług, stale poszukując nowych rozwiązań.

Name: Box Steel Containers
Description:
Box Steel es una extensión directa de la experiencia en transformación de metales que Grupo Fox y Fox Steel han desarrollado durante décadas. Con una sólida trayectoria en la industria metalúrgica y del acero, Box Steel está estratégicamente posicionado para convertirse en un líder en soluciones de contenedores para una amplia variedad de sectores.

En el corazón de nuestras operaciones están los contenedores intermodales de 53', que sirven como base para ofrecer nuestros servicios en otros sectores. Estos contenedores son fundamentales para integrar de manera eficiente nuestras soluciones en diversas industrias y aplicaciones.
–––––––
Box Steel is a direct extension of the expertise in metal transformation that Grupo Fox and Fox Steel have developed over decades. With a strong foundation in the metalworking and steel industries, Box Steel is uniquely positioned to become a leader in container solutions across a variety of industries. 

At the core of our operations are 53’ intermodal containers, which serve as the foundation for delivering services across other sectors. These containers are essential to enabling the seamless integration of our solutions into diverse industries and applications.

Name: MI-AL SRL
Description:
Welcome to Mi-Al, a company specialized in the metalworking industry and offering a range of surface treatment services, including sandblasting, micro-finishing, deburring, grinding, and automated cutting with robotic cells. We can assist customers from technical drawings to finished products, ensuring the highest quality and efficiency.

Our mission is to provide our customers with the best possible metalworking solutions. With our extensive experience in the industry, we offer personalized and innovative solutions tailored to each customer's needs, using the latest technology and high-quality materials to guarantee reliable, durable, and long-lasting results.

We pride ourselves on our attention to detail, dedication to quality work, and excellent customer service. We strive to create a safe, comfortable, and inclusive work environment for our employees, visitors, and customers. We are committed to sustainability and reducing waste, both in our operations and the materials we use.

Contact us today to discuss your metalworking needs and discover how we can help you achieve your goals.

Description:

By collaborating closely with our customers, we understand specific requirements and develop solutions that enhance hardness, improve wear resistance, and optimize performance. Our central location ensures quick and efficient service to clients throughout the Southeastern United States, reinforcing our commitment to responsive customer service and logistical excellence.

At American Heat Treating Alabama, quality is non-negotiable. We adhere to strict ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System standards and meet or exceed customer standards. Our rigorous quality control processes, combined with our industry certifications, provide our clients with the assurance that their components will perform exceptionally under any conditions. Name: OBS Groep
Description:
De OBS Groep opent deuren naar de wereld van techniek en is dé toegangspoort tot de maakindustrie. Als netwerk van gespecialiseerde bedrijven in productie en dienstverlening binnen diverse technische disciplines, combineren we expertise om innovatieve oplossingen te bieden. Gelieerd aan de groep behouden de aangesloten bedrijven hun zelfstandigheid om flexibel in te spelen op de behoeften van hun klanten.
 
De bedrijven binnen de OBS Groep bieden niet alleen hoogwaardige technische oplossingen, maar vormen ook een inspirerende werkomgeving waar talent zich kan ontwikkelen. Via initiatieven en mogelijkheden die we delen op www.werkenbijobsgroep.nl leggen we een solide basis voor een duurzame toekomst in de techniek.

De aangesloten bedrijven: 247 Watersnijden, CNC Verspanen, OBS Techniek, 247 Lasersnijden, Velux Elektrotechniek, Oudshoorn Elektrotechniek, Intellistore en OBS LinQ.

Verbinding met techniek en industrie. De aangesloten bedrijven inspireren nieuwe generaties technici en ondersteunen productie- en dienstverleningsbedrijven in hun innovatiekracht. Met initiatieven zoals de "Doedag in de Techniek" en samenwerkingen met onderwijsinstellingen en instanties brengen zij techniek dichter bij de samenleving.
 
Samen sterker door expertise. De combinatie van samenwerking waar nodig en de autonomie van onze bedrijven zorgt ervoor dat ieder bedrijf gericht kan inspelen op zijn markt. Dit versterkt hun vermogen om innovatieve oplossingen te leveren en klanten optimaal te bedienen, terwijl de diversiteit binnen de groep behouden blijft.

Ein gut sortiertes Blechlager ist die Basis einer flexiblen und termingerechten Auftragsabwicklung.
Auch die vor- und nachgelagerten Herstellungsprozesse wie die Beschaffung des Materials sowie die spanende Bearbeitung und das Stanzen oder Laserschneiden übernehmen wir.
Wir unterstützen Sie bei Ihrer Projektentwicklung und realisieren mit Ihnen qualitativ hochwertige Serienfertigungen

Vogelmann Metallumformtechnik besitzt langjährige Erfahrung in der Umformung von Edelstahl, Aluminium, verzinkten und blanken Stählen und vielen anderen Werkstoffen.
Ist Zulieferer für:

Com uma equipe qualificada e processos controlados, nos dedicamos a fornecer resultados consistentes e eficientes, atendendo às necessidades específicas de nossos clientes nos setores automotivo, aeroespacial, metalúrgico, energia, indústria de ferramentas, petroquímico e mineração.

Nosso portfólio inclui uma variedade de tratamentos térmicos, como têmpera, revenimento, envelhecimento, recozimento, normalização, alívio de tensões, solubilização, têmpera por chama, entre outros. Todos esses processos são projetados para aprimorar as propriedades mecânicas e físicas dos materiais, garantindo a máxima performance, durabilidade e confiabilidade dos produtos.

Name: Jamalex Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Jamalex Sp. z o.o. is a modern and dynamically-developing company operating in the sector of anti-corrosion of steel constructions. We have been gaining knowledge and experience continuously since 1999. Over those years we have built a qualified team willing to provide a suitable level of custom service.

Our core activity is providing hot-dip galvanizing services according to the PN-EN ISO 1461 norms. We own two galvanizing plants in the Rydzyńska Industrial Zone. In 2008 we opened the first plant which has the kettle with the working dimensions of 5.4m x 1.4m x 2.6m (length x width x depth). The other plant opened in 2014 has the kettle with the dimensions of 9.7m x 1.4m x 2.6m. Having two plants enables us to galvanize small, medium-size and large steel constructions.

Since 2011 we have been offering an innovative zinc passivation method that protects the zinc layer from unfavourable weather conditions. For clients who require high aesthetics of ready elements, we recommend the DUPLEX system that involves applying a special paint over the galvanized zinc coating.

We aim at satisfying our clients. We strongly believe that only a high standard of service, knowledge and experience of our employees, high quality materials and state-of-the-art equipment of our plants guarantee that the service we provide lives up to our clients' expectations.

Implementing and continuous improvement of our management system which complies with ISO 9001 quarantee the achievement of our aims.

Name: mbw group

Zielsetzung war es, den Kunden aus der Automobil-, Beschlag- und Bauindustrie eine perfekte und bedarfsgerechte Lösung für die Oberflächenbeschichtung der zu verarbeitenden Metall- und Gussteile anzubieten. Heute bedienen wir mit standardisierten Verfahren unterschiedlichste Zukunftsmärkte und sind europäischer Marktführer im Bereich Chrom III-Beschichtung.

𝐌𝐚𝐚𝐭𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐤 𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬:

FK Metaaltechniek B.V. maakt metalen constructies, maatwerk in alle soorten en maten. Wij werken op basis van een eenvoudige schets of door u aangeleverde detailtekeningen. Wanneer gewenst verwerken wij uw ideeën tot gedetailleerde ontwerp/werktekeningen.

Name: HERNEE HARTANODIC GmbH
Description:
HERNEE HARTANODIC – wir machen Ihre Aluminium-Werkstücke zu Multitalenten.

Unser Spezialgebiet sind Oberflächenbeschichtungen und -behandlungen für Aluminium-Werkstücke. Durch unterschiedliche Verfahren veredeln wir sie für verschiedenste Einsatzgebiete mit unverzichtbaren Eigenschaften wie z. B. Oberflächen hart wie Stahl, Korrosionsbeständigkeit, Langlebigkeit oder besondere thermische Widerstandfähigkeit. 

Seit 1990 helfen wir Kunden aus anspruchsvollen Branchen wie z.B. der Luft- und Raumfahrt dabei, sowohl die passende Beschichtungslösung für ihre speziellen Projekte zu finden als auch die hohen Anforderungen ihrer jeweiligen Branchen zu erfüllen. Dabei sind Qualität, Pünktlichkeit, Schnelligkeit und Zuverlässigkeit in der Abwicklung unsere oberste Priorität. 

Mit unseren eigens entwickelten Verfahren beschichten wir Bauteile vollflächig oder einzelne Teilflächen präzise und detailgenau nach Wunsch. 

Harte Schale – leichter Kern
Das Hartcoating-Verfahren macht die Oberflächen von Aluminium-Teilen hart wie Stahl und damit besonders robust und verschleißfest.

Dekoration trifft Funktion
Unser einzigartiges Mittelhartcoating-Verfahren verbindet die Vorteile funktionaler Oberflächenbeschichtung mit dekorativer Farbgebung. Genau richtig für Bauteile, bei denen trotz der Ansprüche an die Optik auch noch Widerstandsfähigkeit eine Rolle spielt.

Viel mehr als nur Farbe
Farblich ansprechende Eloxal- und Glanzeloxalverfahren garantieren nicht nur sehr gute Korrosionsbeständigkeit für die Werkstücke, sondern sichern auch eine geringe Wärmeleitfähigkeit, eine gute elektrische Isolierung und hohe Haftfähigkeit. 

Wir beraten Sie als Experten von Anfang an – von der Auswahl der passenden Legierung Ihrer Bauteile über die optimale Vorbehandlung (mechanisch oder chemisch) bis hin zum idealen Verfahren. Die beste Oberfläche mit idealen Eigenschaften für Ihre Produkte.

Lassen Sie uns mehr aus Ihren Bauteilen machen – schreiben Sie uns gerne eine Nachricht!

Steel is one of the most recycled materials in the world. Steel plants can optimize loading intervals and reduce tap-to-tap times by using shredded scrap which results in a better production performance while reducing specific energy consumption.

In‑house technology

 Milling, turning and other machining processes
 Band‑saw cutting and blasting
 TIG/MIG/MAG welding
 Powder coating

Key business areas
 Industry & Offshore – industrial halls, platforms, trusses, machine support structures, deck equipment and R&D projects with patent potential in the marine sector
 Architecture – structural stairs, balustrades, façades and loft systems for developers and general contractors
 Interior & Design – loft systems, contract furniture, custom shelving and metal‑ceramic installations for HoReCa, offices and premium interiors
 Public & Art – urban sculptures and installations, signage and visual identity elements, exhibition structures for cities and cultural institutions

R&D and partnerships
 In‑house R&D team with international patent applications in marine engineering
 Close collaboration with architectural studios, interior designers, artists and academic partners
 Support from concept and prototype through to repeatable series production

Who we work with
 Shipyards, industrial and energy companies
 Real estate developers, general contractors and design offices
 HoReCa brands, premium retailers and cultural institutions

We focus on detail: hidden fixings, refined welds, the right anti‑corrosion systems and repeatable production. Looking for a long‑term B2B technology partner? Send your drawing, sketch or 3D model – we will prepare a tailored proposal.

Name: Wolverine Plating Corp
Description:
Wolverine Plating Corporation (Wolverine or WPC) began operating in 1956 in Warren, MI.  The Company moved to its present Roseville, MI location in 1968. Wolverine expanded its facilities in 2006 and 2007 to 71,000 sq. ft., and recently completed an approximately 40,000 sq. ft. addition in February 2021.  The new addition expands WPC’s warehouse facilities and provide needed space for additional state-of-the-art plating and robotic post-treatment equipment.

Wolverine specializes in zinc and zinc-nickel barrel electroplating. Zinc-nickel plating was added in 1995. WPC currently runs six plating lines — three zinc-nickel and three zinc. We run five days a week, 24 hours a day, and add additional weekend shifts to meet our customers’ needs when necessary. Wolverine is well known for its quality and on-time performance.

Wolverine Plating is privately owned and is on the third generation of owners. The current owners have been with Wolverine for over 35 years. We have grown to nearly 60 employees and consider everyone to be part of the family. The Company also has an Employee Stock Ownership Plan, which owns part of the Company.

Through consistent investments in technology and people, we continue to strengthen our position as a trusted partner for companies seeking reliability and precision in every detail. Our ongoing modernization and facility expansion enable us to respond to evolving market demands and take on even the most complex machining challenges.

Our story began in 1986 – from traditional metalworking to becoming a leader in modern CNC manufacturing.

Bünyesinde barındırdığı faaliyet alanları ile müşterilerinin gereksinimlerini minimum maliyete göre gideren firmamız, bir çok farklı sektörün ihtiyaçlarına çözüm odaklı bakış açısıyla farklı bir boyut kazandırmaktadır. 

Bizimle çalışmaya başladığınız anda sadece bir müşteri değil aynı zamanda ailemizin bir parçası olacaksınız çünkü müşteri memnuniyeti bizim en büyük referansımızdır.

Zincado, como protección esencial contra la oxidación y el desgaste, fundamental en entornos industriales exigentes.

Desde nuestras instalaciones en Murcia, trabajamos con tecnología avanzada, un equipo altamente cualificado y un firme compromiso con la calidad y la satisfacción del cliente.

Name: Blast-Innov
Description:
Our know-how has been developed through innovation, adaptation, and ecological commitment in partnership with our customers for over 13 years.

The goal of Blast-Innov, our company today, is to become one of the leaders in the surface treatment market.

Our services are focused on water conservation, the sustainability of our techniques and the preservation of stakeholder health.

Our technique of blasting without water or dust allows us to preserve our historical heritage and works of art, just as we do in industrial, nuclear, maritime, and the most challenging environments.

Our distinction and power is attributed to our 'Blast Media' system, which consists of 19 different sponges, which permits us to operate at low or high pressures and select them based on the coating and desired rendering. Unlike hydrogame or aerogommage, this work method doesn't need water or sand and doesn't produce any dust, which allows:

-Save water resources
-Preserve the natural properties of the coating
-Coactivity on the job site of the various players
-A reduction in working time
-Improved working conditions for workers by providing better protection.

We are proud to contribute to environmental issues in the future and offer you adaptable solutions based on your needs.

Name: Estampos Qualytec
Description:
A Estampos Qualytec foi fundada  em 2001 com objetivo de atender as indústrias de aço da região metropolitana de Belo Horizonte.
Oferecemos serviços especializados em Usinagem Geral, com uma ampla gama de capacidades para fabricação e manutenção. Nossos equipamentos permitem realizar uma variedade de operações essenciais como tornear, fresar, furar, alargar, serrar, plainar e retificar, entre outras técnicas de usinagem de precisão. Nosso foco principal está na fabricação e manutenção de moldes utilizados em processos críticos como injeção plástica, fundição de poliuretano e vulcanização de borracha, garantindo a qualidade e durabilidade dos produtos finais.

Além das técnicas convencionais de usinagem, utilizamos também o avançado processo de eletroerosão a fio. Este método emprega descargas elétricas controladas para remover material da peça de trabalho. Durante o processo, dois eletrodos são submersos em um líquido dielétrico e aplicados sob uma tensão elétrica, criando uma série de descargas que cortam com precisão materiais condutores. Isso nos permite produzir peças com geometrias complexas e detalhes finos, atendendo às demandas rigorosas de nossos clientes.

Name: Gysin AG Blechtechnik
Description:
Die GYSIN AG Blechtechnik (ehem. PAUL GYSIN AG) schaut auf eine über 70-jährige Firmengeschichte zurück und ist in der Schweiz der Ansprechpartner in Sachen Lochbleche.

Als einzige Firma in der Schweiz produzieren wir auf speziellen Stanz- und Perforierpressen, sowie top modernen und voll automatisierten CNC-Stanzmaschinen Lochbleche in den verschiedensten Materialen, Lochungen, Abmessungen und für die unterschiedlichsten Anwendungsbereiche.

Ob Standardlochbleche, Einzelanfertigungen, Blechteile oder komplette fertige Elemente, wir liefern Ihnen dank unseres grossen und vielseitigen Maschinenparkes auf Wunsch Ihre Bestellung montagefertig an den gewünschten Ort. Von Egerkingen aus, gut gelegen am Knotenpunkt des Landes, wird in die ganze Schweiz geliefert.

In den letzten Jahren haben wir unseren Maschinenpark stetig ausgebaut und mit modernster Technik erweitert. Zum Teil können wir Bleche bis 2'000 x 6'000mm Abmessung und bis 25mm Dicke bearbeiten. So konnten wir uns schweizweit als ein modernes Blechbearbeitungscenter, welches ganzheitliche Dienstleistungen anbietet, etablieren. Neben unserem breiten Maschinenpark und Angebot, punkten wir mit kurzen Lieferfristen und attraktiven Preisen.

Zu unseren Kernkompetenzen gehören Lochblechproduktion, Laserschneiden, Stanzen, Umformen, Abkanten, Schweissen und Streckmetalle.

Zu unseren Kunden gehören Firmen aus den Unterschiedlichsten Branchen und Bereichen. Unsere Produkte werden hauptsächlich für Architekturprojekte, allgemeinem Bau oder industrielle Anwendungen verwendet.
Suchen auch Sie den perfekten Partner für Ihr Projekt, dann kontaktieren Sie uns und profitieren Sie von unserem grossen Lager, der grossen Produktpalette oder der schnellen Einzelanfertigung.

GYSIN AG Blechtechnik - Ihr kompetenter Partner für Lochbleche, komplette Blechbearbeitung und Streckmetalle.

Name: Pessina Tubi spa
Description:
La Pessina Tubi è una società commerciale che distribuisce dal pronto in tutta Italia tubi di acciaio di ogni tipo caratterizzati da un’ottima qualità e da una vasta gamma di diametri (da 4 a 914 mm) e di spessori (da 1 a 80 mm).

I suoi centri di servizio a Sesto San Giovanni (in attività dal 1979) e Trezzo Sull'Adda (MI) contengono migliaia di tonnellate di tubi marcati con certificati, tutti custoditi al coperto su stalli e bancali, protetti da corrosione mediante oleatura e tappatura delle estremità.

L’acciaieria Tenaris Dalmine e altre acciaierie primarie europee provvedono alla punzonatura del numero di colata su ciascuna barra all'origine. La ditta ha iniziato l'attività nel 1932 come trafileria per prodotti di precisione extrafine e mantiene ancora oggi come punto di forza aziendale proprio i tubi trafilati a freddo con tolleranze molto strette, garantite tanto sui diametri (sia esterni che interni) che sugli spessori dalle nuove EN 10305-1 (ex UNI 7945).

La Pessina Tubi è al servizio della clientela per qualsiasi esigenza e richiesta e per fornire dati inerenti applicazioni tecniche. Tubi di grosso spessore, tubi bollitori, tubi di precisione, tubi trafilati, tubi di acciaio al carbonio, tubi d'acciaio legato, tubi levigati, tubi laminati a caldo, tubi saldati e tanto altro ancora: Pessina Tubi è in grado di soddisfare qualsiasi esigenza del settore!

Soda blasting is effective for:
Removing paint from metal elements
Removing all dirt and stains from paving and driveways
Removing wooden varnishes
Removing impregnates from bricks
Corrosion protection
Removing surface rust and corrosion
Removal of plaster and plaster residue
Removing UV burn from surfaces
Removal of oils, greases, adhesives

Name: Orifil S.A.S
Description:
Orifil è una tra le più avanzate carpenterie metalliche a Padova. Eseguiamo componenti in lamiera per l’elettronica industriale e lavorazioni di meccanica di precisione.

La nostra tecnologia per la lavorazione del metallo è completamente automatizzata. Questo significa che passare da un prodotto ad un altro richiede tempistiche minime che ci permettono di incrementare la nostra produttività.

Offriamo un servizio completo al cliente, dalla fase di progettazione della lavorazione dei materiali metallici alla sua produzione in serie, rispettando sempre le tempistiche. Ottenere la fiducia del nostro cliente è per noi obbiettivo primario.

Name: Egal Srl Unipersonale
Description:
Nati nel 1958, vantiamo l'esperienza di tre generazioni nel campo della lavorazione galvanica. L'elevata qualità del nostro lavoro ci consente di offrire una variegata gamma di prodotti. Il che ci rende un'azienda leader nel settore dei trattamenti galvanici su plastica in rotobarile.

Effettuiamo metallizzazioni con materiali di ogni tipo e preziosità: dalla nichelatura e rodiatura, alla cromatura, fino alla doratura e argentatura. I nostri trattamenti hanno una vasta tipologia di applicazione: dalla cosmesi agli strumenti tecnici, oggetti promozionali e accessori per la moda. Settore, quest'ultimo, nel quale abbiamo lavorato per importanti marchi di livello mondiale.

Ci siamo sempre adoperati, nel corso degli anni, per migliorare la tecnologia del rotobarile. Così siamo riusciti a tenere insieme un alto livello di qualità e la possibilità di ottenere tirature elevatissime di minuterie in plastica. Come, ad esempio, le borchie spesso utilizzate nel settore dell'abbigliamento e del lusso.

Dal 1989 un impianto statico automatico, per i trattamenti su telaio, affianca le linee a rotobarile e ci consente di operare anche su oggetti di dimensioni maggiori. In questo settore, come nelle altre linee produttive, la qualità è mantenuta costantemente a massimi livelli, con analisi quotidiane delle soluzioni di lavoro e procedure di manutenzione a scadenze prestabilite.

Seguiamo gli oggetti in ogni fase della lavorazione, attraverso un sistema di tracciabilità totale, che ci permette di risalire, in qualsiasi momento ai singoli lotti. In questo modo, nell'eventualità di una qualsiasi imperfezione, possiamo intervenire immediatamente nel segregare tutti gli articoli che potrebbero presentare il medesimo difetto.

Con massima flessibilità e velocità andiamo incontro a tutte le esigenze del cliente. Su sua richiesta, possiamo fornire anche la certificazione degli spessori dei metalli depositati e l'analisi colorimetrica.

Name: Yogi Industries
Description:
"YOGI INDUSTRIES - Heat Treatment Process” a leading name in heat treatment service providers in Saurashtra region of India, started their journey in 2012 with only 3 persons & limited working space & equipments. Nowadays, we are capable to heat treat about 300 tons / Month of ferrous material with work force of 20 persons at sites of company. We, at YOGI METAL, believes in to achieve total customer satisfaction, professional approach for continual technological up gradation & consistency in quality without compromise.
We have gained strengths & reputation in all kind of after forging heat treatment processes just like normalization, soft annealing, isothermal annealing, spheroids annealing, stress-relief annealing, hardening and tempering are carried out in our in-house metal treatment shop. Heat treatment of forgings is carried out in 4 electric and gas fired bell type furnaces with oil and water bath for quenching and tempering. All furnaces for heat treatment are equipped with automatic temperature control, measuring and recording instruments like 1600* microscope, hardness testers etc. Bell type gas fired furnace with 2 base, for spheroids annealing normalizing.
We have established various types of Heat Treatment process, All of them are well equipped with various type of furnaces, high precision instruments like O2 Probes, PID controllers, Digital Temperature Controllers, Data Logger, etc. for smooth operation & optimum process control. We look after our plants & process equipments to keep them Everyday in the best condition, and for this, regular & planned Preventive Maintenance is done. Our task forces are highly experienced, well trained & self motivated. Top management is committed to provide the best resources to perform the work successfully.

Name: Morigi Bullets
Description:
Na Morigi Bullets, acreditamos que precisão é mais do que um resultado técnico — é o reflexo de uma jornada feita com paixão, responsabilidade e excelência.
 
Nosso propósito é elevar o nível do tiro esportivo no Brasil, oferecendo projéteis de alta performance desenvolvidos com engenharia própria, atenção aos detalhes e um compromisso inegociável com a qualidade.
 
Nascemos da curiosidade de um jovem apaixonado por armas e da vontade de transformar conhecimento em resultado. Crescemos ouvindo os atiradores, entendendo suas necessidades reais e construindo soluções que respeitam a técnica, o equipamento e, principalmente, a confiança de quem está por trás do gatilho.
 
Nossa missão vai além de fabricar insumos: buscamos entregar confiabilidade em cada disparo, apoiando o desenvolvimento do esporte, promovendo a legalidade no setor e construindo uma comunidade que valoriza a responsabilidade no uso de armas.
 
Somos uma marca feita por atiradores, para atiradores.
E é por isso que fazemos questão de que cada projétil carregue nossa história, nosso cuidado e nosso padrão de excelência.

Name: POLY-TECH
Description:
Sie haben immer wieder mit mechanischen Bauteilen zu tun? Sie beschaffen CNC Frästeile? Dann kennen Sie folgende Situationen allzu gut: 

•	Sie erwarten Ihre Bestellung mit CNC Frästeilen. Kurz vor Feierabend poppt die E-Mail Benachrichtigung auf: «Guten Tag, leider können wir Ihnen die bestellten Bauteile nicht rechtzeitig liefern… Bitte entschuldigen Sie die Umstände…» 
•	Sie benötigen Expressfrästeile – finden aber keinen Lieferanten, der flexibel genug ist um Ihren Auftrag zu erledigen? 
•	Sie haben einen Maschinenausfall und benötigen schnellstmöglich ein Bauteil um die Maschine wieder in Betrieb zu nehmen? 
•	Wenn Sie bei Ihrem Lieferant nach Plattenbearbeitung fragen, folgt: «Ja das können wir, nur das Spannen der Platten ist mühsam und benötigt aufwendige Vorrichtungen, das dauert…» 
•	Sie haben Teile erhalten welche nicht Ihren Anforderungen entsprechen und möchten so schnell wie möglich Ersatz?

«Termingarantie», schon gehört? Ich bin Silvan Marxer, Geschäftsführer der Poly-Tech und unterstütze Sie dabei, Ihre Fertigungsteile und Komponenten rechtzeitig zu erhalten. Wir stehen für höchste Kompetenz in Aluminium: Fräsen 3-Achs, 5-Achs oder Platenbearbeitung. 

Ihr Mehrwert mit uns als Fertigungspartner: 

	Knallharte Termingarantie: Wir versichern, dass Ihr Auftrag pünktlich geliefert wird. 
	Beste Prozesszeiten durch perfekt abgestimmten Maschinenpark auf die Aluminiumzerspanung
	Verformungsfreie Plattenbearbeitung auf dynamischen HSC-Bearbeitungscentern, ausgestattet mit einer Vakuumspannplatte.  
	Kostenoptimierte Lieferung, dank hochautomatisierter Fertigung
	Express-Service, auch für beschichtete Teile. 
	Angebot innert 24h 

Möchten Sie mehr über unserer Fertigung und Arbeitsweise erfahren, dann kontaktieren Sie uns über www.poly-tech.ch, per E-Mail: info@poly-tech.ch oder via Telefon: +41 81 511 65 70

Name: Boriani-08 Ltd.
Description:
Boryani - 08 EOOD was established in 2008. by engineer Plamen Tsonev - manager and sole owner. He graduated from the "Technology of mechanical engineering and metal cutting machines" specialty at VMEI, Varna. He has many years of experience as a technical manager, he participated in the construction of compressor stations, technological workshops, repair and maintenance of chemical plants.

Boryani-08 EOOD performs activities such as design, manufacture, installation and repair of metal structures, technological pipelines, pressure vessels, portal and bridge cranes, non-standard equipment and facilities with increased risk (SPO). We carry out maintenance and repair activities for turbochargers and pumps. The company carries out its activities for clients such as Solvay Sodi AD, Sol Bulgaria EAD, Oiltanking Bulgaria AD and others.

Name: METAL FINISH SRL
Description:
Metal Finish Srl è un'eccellenza nel settore della Vibrofinitura Metalli. Con uno stabilimento all'avanguardia di 2.500 mq, di cui 1.600 mq coperti, siamo leader nell'applicazione di Mass Metalfinishing, un insieme di lavorazioni su pezzi in massa. I nostri impianti all'avanguardia ci consentono di offrire soluzioni di finitura di alta qualità ai nostri clienti.

La nostra strategia si basa su pilastri fondamentali: la costante adozione di tecnologie all'avanguardia, investimenti mirati per un sistema produttivo sempre più performante e un'operatività precisa e rapida, anche per le commesse più piccole. Questi principi e valori sono il cuore pulsante della nostra attività imprenditoriale, sostenuti da un team di professionisti e collaboratori altamente qualificati.

Name: TH.OR Lavorazioni Metalli
Description:
TH.OR lavorazioni metalli opera nel settore della finitura superficiale dei metalli ormai da TRE generazioni.

La passione, la tecnica e l’arte di questo mestiere sono state tramandate insieme all’esperienza acquisita che, con l’ausilio di macchinari moderni e di personale altamente specializzato, hanno consentito di garantire un servizio di lavorazione metallica di qualità costante nel tempo.

Quella di TH.OR è una cultura del lavoro che coniuga artigianalità e industrializzazione, che conserva immutati nel tempo però i valori e le tradizioni di un tempo.

Siamo infatti in grado di affrontare e GESTIRE QUALSIASI
CASISTICA di finitura relativa a pezzi provenienti da pressofusione e stampaggio.

Costruiamo un rapporto di stretta collaborazione con il nostro cliente,
offrendo un servizio puntuale e di qualità e proponendo le migliori soluzioni.

Tutte le fasi di produzione svolte all’interno dell’azienda garantiscono ai nostri clienti il massimo controllo della qualità e contribuiscono alla realizzazione di prodotti di altissimo livello.

Name: União Estruturas Metálicas
Description:
QUEM SOMOS

A vontade de prestar um serviço cada vez melhor, aliada a uma sólida experiência de mercado, resultou na fundação da UNIÃO ESTRUTURAS METÁLICAS. Seus idealizadores, Daniel Cambiaghi e Wanderley Franco, se conheceram em uma obra em que ambos eram prestadores de serviço autônomos. Nessa ocasião, viram que a UNIÃO de suas forças de trabalho teria grande potencial de sucesso.

E estavam certos!

Iniciaram suas atividades em um local com pouca estrutura e sem colaboradores, mas a persistência, constante qualificação e o respeito com o cliente, tem trazido muitos resultados positivos. Hoje a UNIÃO está instalada em um ponto estratégico na cidade de Araraquara (SP) em um barracão totalmente equipado para o desenvolvimento de suas atividades e conforto de seus colaboradores, conta com uma equipe multidisciplinar, máquinas e equipamentos próprios, frota veicular e um portifólio de peso de clientes atendidos e satisfeitos.

Sempre atentos as novidades e tendências do mercado de ESTRUTURAS METÁLICAS, a equipe se dedica a procurar os melhores fornecedores para garantir uma matéria prima de boa qualidade e entregar um excelente trabalho. Estão presentes nas mais diversas obras, pequena ou grande, civil ou industrial e em todas as etapas, desde o projeto até a instalação final.

SOMOS A UNIÃO ESTRUTURAS METÁLICAS, uma empresa brasileira, que acredita no potencial de sua gente, sabe de sua importância social, possui responsabilidade ambiental e busca sempre prestar o melhor serviço a seus clientes.

Name: FEY
Description:
Fundada em 1977, a Fey Indústria e Comércio LTDA construiu uma sólida reputação ao longo de décadas. Sua trajetória é marcada pela confiança de seus clientes e parceiros comerciais, conquistada por meio de: profissionais capacitados; constantes investimentos em tecnologia e equipamentos de ponta; um compromisso contínuo com um atendimento excepcional.

A Fey tem como principal objetivo superar as expectativas de seus clientes desde o primeiro contato, oferecendo atendimento técnico especializado e qualidade em todas as etapas do serviço.

A empresa garante a excelência na qualidade de seus serviços por meio de rigorosos processos industriais; operadores experientes e altamente capacitados; maquinário robusto e atualizado.

Segmentos de Atuação:

Usinagem Média e Pesada: 
A Fey atua com mandriladoras, tornos verticais e horizontais, atendendo empresas de diversos setores como energia,  sucroalcooleiro, petróleo e gás, mineração, agroindústria, energia renovável, entre outros.

Fabricação e Reforma de Equipamentos de Mineração:
A Fey é especializada na fabricação e reforma de equipamentos como britadores; peneiras; alimentadores; redutores, etc.

Com mais de 45 anos de experiência, continuamos a evoluir, buscando inovação e excelência para atender às demandas do mercado e oferecer soluções completas que agreguem valor aos nossos clientes.

Name: KSA Kugelstrahlzentrum Aachen GmbH
Description:
KSA Kugelstrahlzentrum Aachen GmbH was founded in 1993 as a spin-off of RWTH Aachen University. We specialize in the Automated Peen Forming (APF) of large metallic components for space launchers. 

Peen forming is used to shape metallic sheets into defined geometries so that they can be assembled to create larger structures such as fuel tank barrels and bulkheads. Our Automated Peen Forming (APF) is a CNC-controlled closed loop process which is recognized as a benchmark in industrial peen forming.

Name: Dongguan Victor Metal Products Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Dongguan Victor Metal Products Co.,Ltd (formerly known as Mingyi Hardware), is a company specializing in the design and production of magnesium alloy, aluminum alloy, zinc alloy die castings and aluminum profile CNC processing parts. It provides all-round production services from mold design and development to die casting product molding, post-processing and surface treatment. The products are mainly used in 3C industry, lighting, electronic appliances, auto parts, furniture and bathroom, electric tools, medical machinery, intelligent automation equipment and other industries, and are exported to Europe, America and Southeast Asia.

Founded in 2010, the company has more than 11 years of R & D and production management experience, has more than 20 patented technologies (including 2 invention patents), and was identified as a national high-tech enterprise in November 2017. As early as May 7, 2012, it passed iso9001:2015 quality system certification. The company always adheres to the business philosophy of "customer-oriented, technology and management innovation as a means, continuous improvement of service, continuous cost reduction" to seek development. No matter the size of customers, the company will continue to provide customers with accurate and perfect die-casting and CNC process solutions, and also undertake OEM and ODM cooperation.

The company's production workshop consists of mold department, die casting department, processing department, CNC department, paint baking department, etc., with a total of 12 professional mold design engineers, senior mold opening technicians, die casting adjusters and CNC programmers. There are 8 people with bachelor degree or above and 10 people with college degree. There are more than 200 production employees in the peak period.

Our vision is to become an expert in die casting industry. Welcome your inquiry and visit!

Name: ALIT Service Portugal | Serviço de Decapagem Química
Description: A ALIT Service é a unidade operacional da ALIT Technologies em Portugal. Fazemos parte do grupo ALIT, com sede central em Itália. Para conhecer melhor a nossa realidade internacional, segue também a página principal da ALIT Technologies Spa e visita o site oficial alit-tech.com para detalhes técnicos, brochuras e casos de estudo.  Decapagem química de alta precisão para terceiros. A ALIT Service é especializada na decapagem química industrial de componentes metálicos sob encomenda. Todos os dias decapamos até 1.800 peças em diferentes ligas (alumínio, aço, bronze, teflon), garantindo superfícies prontas para nova pintura em tempo recorde, sem retrabalhos manuais, com máxima precisão, qualidade e economia operacional.  O QUE TEMOS  Decapagem por pulverização vertical para todo o tipo de peças  Decapagem por imersão para ganchos, quadros e estruturas complexas  Sistemas de filtração e recuperação de produto (até 80%)  Máquinas para enxaguamento e limpeza pós-decapagem  BENEFÍCIOS PARA O CLIENTE  Superfícies como novas, sem stress mecânico ou térmico  Eliminação completa dos defeitos de pintura  Redução de desperdício e retrabalho, sem lixagem  Peças prontas em pouco tempo, com qualidade e continuidade produtiva  Poupança real de tempo, custos e recursos internos  SETORES SERVIDOS  Automóvel, e-mobility, acessórios e prototipagem  Serralharia metálica, restauro, pintura industrial  Torneiras, iluminação, videovigilância e muito mais  TECNOLOGIA E QUÍMICA AVANÇADA  Ampla gama de decapantes específicos para diferentes materiais e tintas  Filtroprensa para recuperação de produto (mais de 80%)  Máquinas Fastrip S (pulverização a 120°C, alta capacidade)  Máquinas Fastrip T5 (imersão a 75°C, versátil e compacta)  Baixo consumo, longa duração dos banhos, baixo impacto ambiental  O NOSSO COMPROMISSO Ajudamo-lo a melhorar a eficiência, a reduzir os custos e a garantir resultados superiores com a nossa decapagem de tinta.

Description:
Die Pinter Signum GmbH ist ein in der 4. Generation familiengeführtes Unternehmen. 
Seit über 115 Jahren sind wir im Bereich der Metall- und Kunststoffverarbeitung tätig. 

Wir produzieren, entwickeln und vertreiben Beschilderungen und Kennzeichnungen aller Art. 
Dazu zählen beispielsweise Firmenschilder, Typenschilder, Frontplatten sowie Leit- & Orientierungssysteme aber auch diverse Etiketten und Fahrzeugkennzeichnungen (Straße + Schiene).

Dank der Kombination aus erfahrenen Fachkräften und modernen Maschinenpark können wir sowohl in der Einzel- als auch Serienfertigung die verschiedensten Fertigungsverfahren kundenindividuell abbilden.
 
Darüber hinaus können mehr als 3.000 verschiedene Artikel sofort ab Lager geliefert werden. 
Durch eine EDI-Anbindung bieten wir unseren Kunden und Lieferanten dabei die perfekte Möglichkeit für einen reibungslosen elektronischen Datenaustausch. 

Egal ob Industrie, Handel oder öffentliche Hand, durch unser hervorragendes Know-how und unser hohes Maß an Qualität haben wir zufriedene Kunden in über 39 Ländern – also machen auch Sie sich ein Bild von uns!
