Description: Las-technische projecten kunnen een uitdaging zijn, ik sta klaar om deze last te verlichten. Name: IfEP GmbH | Institute for Proficiency Tests
Description:
The Institute for Proficiency Tests, IfEP, is an independent German service institute providing proficiency tests and reference materials in the field of mechanical testing, metallography and related areas.

It is IfEP’s aim to be considered by our customers as the best provider of proficiency tests.

Name: Roto-Tools s.c.
Description:
We are a team of specialists with over 15 years of experience in metallurgy. Our company has been operating and developing continuously since 2006. We are constantly gaining experience by carrying out various projects as part of cooperation with partners on the Polish and foreign market.
- Our main field is sheet metal processing and production of elements of the broadly understood metal industry
- We specialize in making small-size steel constructions. We have machines for the production of steel profiles
- We have a black and stainless steel welding shop

Name: ORLANDONI METALLI SRL
Description: ORLANDONI METALLI SRL distribuisce dal 1967 acciai speciali ed inossidabili, leghe di ottone e di alluminio, e pani di zama per le più svariate applicazioni industriali. L'attività viene svolta in conformità alla ISO 9001 ed ai Reg. UE 333/2011 e 715/2013 ed in collaborazione con primari produttori Europei tra i quali spiccano Rodacciai ed Olarra Acciai Inossidabili, Trafilerie Carlo Gnutti e Trafigura (Nyrstar). Il centro di distribuzione è organizzato nel plant di Castelfidardo dove su una superficie di 15.000 mq, di cui 7.000 coperti, uffici e magazzini modernamente attrezzati sono quotidianamente al servizio della clientela. L'elevata qualità dei materiali trattati, la rapidità di consegna e la disponibilità a magazzino di una vasta gamma di semilavorati in barre nei formati e nelle finiture standard e fuori standard ne fanno un importante punto di riferimento per le industrie metalmeccaniche di tutta Italia. Una competente organizzazione commerciale è in grado di assistere il cliente nella risoluzione di qualsiasi problema tecnico relativo all’utilizzo, al trattamento termico e alle varie modalità di allestimento. L’esperienza pluridecennale e la caratteristica impronta familiare sono garanzia di soddisfazione per tutti gli stakeholders.

Name: ZACCARIA BRUNO S.R.L.
Description:
La ditta Zaccaria Bruno srl è presente sul territorio della provincia di Vicenza dal 1964, occupandosi di carpenteria metallica per conto terzi.

In questi sessant'anni e oltre, siamo stati in grado di divenire un vero e proprio sinonimo di innovazione nel settore, non solo per la continua evoluzione di metodologie e lavorazioni, ma soprattutto per l'adozione delle più avanzate tecnologie.

Questa nostra innovazione nella carpenteria ci ha portato a essere un punto di riferimento diversi settori industriali, come l'automazione, la robotica e la componentistica elettronica.

Name: ATSAPI
Description:
ATSAPI, acronyme d'Atelier de Traitement de Surface et d'Application de Peintures Industrielles, est une société clé du Groupe V, spécialisée dans les finitions de haute qualité pour une vaste gamme de produits industriels. Avec un accent particulier sur les traitements de surface et les applications de peinture, ATSAPI apporte une expertise technique inégalée et des solutions sur mesure pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client.

Notre établissement offre un éventail complet de services, allant de la préparation de surface à des traitements anticorrosifs avancés, en passant par des finitions esthétiques et protectrices personnalisées. Grâce à des installations modernes et à une équipe de professionnels dédiés, ATSAPI garantit des résultats exceptionnels qui respectent et dépassent les standards de l'industrie.

La force d'ATSAPI réside dans sa capacité à associer technologie de pointe et savoir-faire artisanal, assurant une qualité et une durabilité sans compromis pour des secteurs aussi divers que l'agroalimentaire, l'aéronautique, l'automobile et le pharmaceutique. Notre engagement envers l'excellence et la satisfaction client fait de nous un partenaire de choix pour toutes vos exigences en traitement de surface et en peinture industrielle.

Name: Smederij Meerkerk
Description:
Smederij Meerkerk is een veelzijdig metaalbewerkingsbedrijf gespecialiseerd in smeed- en constructiewerk op maat. Wij ontwerpen, produceren en monteren hoogwaardige producten voor zowel particuliere als zakelijke klanten. Vakmanschap, maatwerk en kwaliteit staan bij ons centraal.

Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het vervaardigen van trappen, hekwerken en diverse staalconstructies, waarbij functionaliteit en uitstraling hand in hand gaan.
Ook In onze werkplaats beschikken wij over moderne machines voor draaien en frezen, knippen en zetten en walsen, waardoor wij een breed scala aan bewerkingen in eigen huis uitvoeren.

Wij werken met verschillende materialen, waaronder staal, aluminium en RVS, en beheersen diverse lastechnieken om duurzame en nauwkeurige constructies te realiseren. Van traditioneel smeedwerk tot moderne constructies: elk project wordt met zorg en precisie uitgevoerd.

Dankzij onze flexibele werkwijze en jarenlange ervaring leveren wij maatwerkoplossingen die perfect aansluiten bij de wensen van onze klanten.

Name: JML metaal
Description:
Bij JML Metaal B.V. draait alles om kwaliteit en vakmanschap in de metaalbewerking. Wij zijn jouw partner in het ontwerpen, produceren, afwerken en assembleren van producten in ferro- en non-ferrometalen, en technische kunststoffen.

We starten met het visualiseren van jouw idee. Met geavanceerde 3D-tekeningen of prints brengen we jouw concept tot leven. Na goedkeuring maken we een proefmodel of een kleine serie, zodat je de kwaliteit en functionaliteit kunt ervaren voordat we echt gaan produceren. Gedurende het hele proces staan we voor je klaar met een team van specialisten die je helpen en adviseren.

Bij JML Metaal B.V. zijn we ook altijd op zoek naar nieuw talent! We geloven dat ons succes komt door de passie en expertise van ons team. Daarom willen we graag in contact komen met professionals die onze waarden delen en ons kunnen helpen groeien.

Of je nu nieuwsgierig bent naar onze diensten of wilt samenwerken, we horen graag van je. Samen bouwen we aan de toekomst van metaalbewerking!

Name: ARİ MADENCİLİK METAL SANAYİ VE TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ.
Description: Ari Madencilik Metal Ltd., etik metal ticareti yaparak, tedarikçiler ve tüketiciler arasında güvenilir bir aracılık hizmeti sunmaktadır. Yurt içi ve yurt dışında metal alım-satımıyla, taraflar için güven ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı çözümler üretmeyi hedefler.

Name: Laga S.r.l.
Description:
𝗖𝗵𝗶 𝗰𝗼𝘀𝗮 𝘀𝗶 𝗼𝗰𝗰𝘂𝗽𝗮 𝗹𝗮 𝗻𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗮?
Organizzazione, coordinamento e gestione delle produzioni di manufatti in metalli, leghe e materiali plastici di tutte le fasi di processo:

𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹 è 𝗶𝗹 𝗻𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗼 𝗼𝗯𝗶𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗼?
Migliorare la qualità e ridurre costi e tempi di produzione grazie al nostro sistema proprietario delle attrezzature.

𝗔 𝗰𝗵𝗶 𝗰𝗶 𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗼𝗹𝗴𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗼?
Molteplici sono i settori produttivi che si rivolgono a Laga, fra i principali sono: 
→ aerospace, 
→ elettronica, 
→ mobili, 
→ medicale. 

Qualunque prodotto che si intenda realizzare o che necessita di un miglioramento produttivo che sia estetico o qualitativo può esserci sottoposto e cercheremo di trovare la soluzione per migliorarlo al giusto prezzo.

𝗖𝗵𝗶 è 𝗟𝗮𝗴𝗮?
Laga nasce nel 2006 dall’intuizione di Antonio Cinelli che decide di rendere disponibile il know-how costruito in oltre vent’anni di esperienza in importanti aziende multinazionali.

Name: Colorblast BV
Description:
Wij geloven in het opbouwen van langlopende relaties met onze afnemers door uitsluitend goede kwaliteit te leveren en te doen wat we beloven.  

Onze fabriek voorziet in het gehele oppervlakte behandel proces. We kunnen uw half fabricaten ontlakken, stralen en chemisch voorbehandelen. Vervolgens coaten of poedercoaten. Het poetsen van uw verzinkte halffabricaten behoort tot de mogelijkheden.  Bij series kunnen wij ook assemblage en verpakking werkzaamheden voor uw uitvoeren. 

Vanaf 01-11-2015 zijn wij operationeel met onze poedercoat werkzaamheden. We hebben 3 opstellingen :

1)    De XXL Straat, hier kunnen we chemisch ontvetten en poedercoaten in de afmetingen 7,60m lang bij 2,40m breed en 3,60m hoog 

(bij hoogtes < 3.00 is 2,90m breed mogelijk, profielen kunnen we tot 8,50m)

2)    De kameroven, hier kunnen we Stralen, chemisch ontvetten, coaten en poedercoaten in de afmetingen 4,10m lang  bij 1,35 breed en 2,20 hoog.

3)    De mini route, Hier kunnen we grit stralen, soda stralen, nat stralen, coaten en poedercoaten in de afmetingen 1,00m lang bij 1,00 breed en 1,50 hoog.

Name: Michigan Metal Coatings
Description: MMC is dedicated to the continued progression of our speed, quality, and innovations—core values essential to remaining a proud leader in the metal finishing industry. As a specialized zinc-flake applicator, we are an ISO 9001:2015 certified and A2LA 3271.01 accredited provider of Geomet and Doerken coating systems. Backed by an experienced team and state-of-the-art technology, MMC consistently delivers exceptional results for customers who expect both performance and precision. Whether protecting components from corrosion or meeting tight turnaround times, MMC brings trusted expertise and industry-leading quality to every project.

Name: IMS recycling
Description:
Over the years, IMS recycling has become the most trusted recycling company active for four generations in non-ferrous metal scraps, ferrous scraps, e-waste and shredder residues mainly in Europe Asia and South America.
IMS was able to grow through times thanks to the knowledge and experience in the recycling market. 
IMS’s goal is to work closely with our suppliers and buyers. We are taking new technology and environmental protection as our initial and fundamental starting point. 
We are looking forward to do business with you.

Name: Rüge Galvano-Technik
Description:
Unser Unternehmen ist einer der führenden und innovativsten Oberflächenveredler in Deutschland. Mit unserem Firmensitz in Ellerau/Quickborn, nördlich von Hamburg, sind wir optimal positioniert, um unseren Kunden herausragende Dienstleistungen anzubieten.
Unser Fokus liegt auf der präzisen Oberflächenveredlung und Bearbeitung von technisch anspruchsvollen Produkten. Durch unsere Expertise und fortschrittliche Technologien erzielen wir optimale Ergebnisse und setzen neue Standards in der Branche.
Gerne stehen wir Ihnen für eine persönliche Beratung zur Verfügung. Kontaktieren Sie uns, um mehr über unsere Leistungen und individuellen Lösungen zu erfahren.

Name: Aluminium Op Maat
Description: Aluminium op Maat biedt u de gemakkelijkste manier om aluminium online te bestellen! Kies uit ons brede assortiment en bereken uw prijs direct online. Wij maken alles tot de mm op maat, voor bedrijf en particulier.

Name: Stamperia Italforge di Sirone S.R.L.
Description:
Stamperia Italforge si colloca tra le aziende italiane leader nello stampaggio a caldo dell'acciaio, acciaio inossidabile, acciai speciali duplex e superduplex, titanio, ottone, alluminio e rame. 
Produciamo articoli stampati a caldo dal peso di 20 gr fino a circa 30 Kg personalizzati sulla base delle richieste del cliente.
Tramite l'utilizzo di software avanzati produciamo internamente le attrezzature, garantendo al cliente un'elevata qualità estetica e dimensionale. 
Siamo certificati ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, Norsok.

Stamperia Italforge is one of Italy's leading companies in the hot forging of steel, stainless steel, duplex and superduplex special steels, titanium, brass, aluminium and copper. 
We produce hot forged items from a weight of 20 g up to around 30 kg customised according to customer requirements. 
Through the use of advanced software we produce the tooling in-house, guaranteeing the customer high aesthetic and dimensional quality. 
We are ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, Norsok certified.

Name: SIM GREEN Srl
Description:
Sim green s.r.l. è un’Azienda iscritta all’Albo Nazionale dei Gestori ambientali ed è specializzata nel ritiro, nello smaltimento e nel trattamento finale dei rifiuti elettro-elettronici (R.A.E.E.).

Sim Green svolge la propria attività secondo la legge, come previsto nell’art. 208 D. Lgs. 152/2006 ART. 6 L.R.T. 25/1198 e successive modifiche ed integrazioni L.R.T. 9/2010 nei limiti e nelle modalità previste dalle autorizzazioni di cui dispone ed è assoggettata alla vigilanza degli organi istituzionali competenti.

Sim Green dispone di due sedi operative, la principale ha 10˙000 metri quadrati coperti e 10˙000 mq scoperti, e si può stoccare fino a 38˙500 tonnellate annue di rifiuti elettronici (RAEE). La sede legale situata in località San Zeno dispone di 2000 metri quadrati coperti, di più di 2000 mq scoperti, con uno stoccaggio fino a 373 tonnellate al giorno di rifiuti elettronici (RAEE).

SIM Green ha anche una divisione dedicata al recupero e alla valorizzazione dei materiali di scarto provenienti da aziende galvaniche e manifatturiere che utilizzano impianti galvanici. Ci occupiamo del ritiro e trattamento di residui, soluzioni esauste e prodotti non conformi contenenti metalli preziosi, offrendo un servizio rapido, tracciabile e conforme alle normative, con l’obiettivo di trasformare gli scarti in valore e sostenibilità.

Name: Vario-Metall GmbH & Co.KG
Description:
VARIO–Metall ist der Spezialist für die Tiefbohr- und Fräsbearbeitung von Formplatten- und Einsätzen, Maschinenbauteilen oder Hydraulikaggregaten, egal, ob Kleinserien oder Einzelanfertigung.

Seit der Gründung von VARIO-Metall vor 12 Jahren, haben wir uns als Dienstleister auf dem Formenbaumarkt etabliert, was nicht nur auf die hohe Qualität der abgegeben Arbeit zurückzuführen ist, sondern vor allem auch auf den exzellenten Service am Kunden. Dazu ist die schnelle Abgabe von Angeboten, meist am gleichen Tag des Anfrageeingangs, das notwendige Fachwissen der Mitarbeiter, sowie eine schnelle und zuverlässige Lieferung zum vereinbarten Termin unbedingte Voraussetzung.

Dass diese Eigenschaften erfüllt werden, zeigt vor allem eine Vielzahl von Weiterempfehlungen der Stammkunden von VARIO-Metall.

Im Vordergrund steht der Service
Langfristige Partnerschaften mit unseren Kunden stehen im Mittelpunkt unserer Arbeit. Für das Tiefbohrzentrum VARIO-Metall resultiert dieses Ziel an der Seite der RSB Rationelle Stahlbearbeitung GmbH & Co. KG aus Merkers vor allem in einem ganz besonderen Service für unsere Kunden und wird täglich mit höchster Qualität und Termintreue bestätigt. Mit neuester Tiefbohrtechnik, modernen CAD CAM Systemen, geschultem Personal und flexiblen Arbeitszeiten hat es VARIO-Metall innerhalb kürzester Zeit geschafft, sich auf dem Markt der Formen- und Maschinenbauer zu etablieren.

Name: Complete Metal Finishing Ltd
Description: At Complete Metal Finishing Ltd, we pride ourselves on our attention to detail, versatility, and commitment to excellence. Our broad range of skills, combined with state-of-the-art equipment and a passion for quality, ensures that we deliver exceptional results every time. Whether you need polishing or finishing services, we’re here to bring your vision to life. Contact us today to discuss your project and discover how we can meet your metal finishing needs.

Name: TPM Saint rémy
Description:
TPM SAINT REMY fondée en 1982, est située à Vernouillet, à proximité de la région parisienne. Spécialisée dans le traitement des pièces métalliques, nous vous proposons une gamme de traitement pour vous accompagner sur la protection de vos pièces. Nous savons nous adapter sur des petites ou grandes séries, en aluminium et acier.

Name: HPrC - High Protection Coatings
Description:
HPrC – High Protection Coatings

Nascendo de uma aliança estratégica liderada pela ARFIT e com o apoio técnico especializado da MEPTEK e a visão internacional do consultor Juan José de la Mora, a HPrC – High Protection Coatings, Lda é uma empresa especializada no revestimento anticorrosivo para sistemas AVAC/R, empenhada em manter os mais altos padrões de qualidade, com soluções personalizadas que aumentam a durabilidade e eficiência de equipamentos de climatização e refrigeração.

Formulados para proteger equipamentos em ambientes altamente exigentes — desde plataformas offshore e plantas químicas até instalações industriais e comerciais. Como aplicadores certificados dos Revestimentos Spray Applied da MODINE, garantimos uma aplicação precisa que maximiza a resistência à corrosão e prolonga a vida útil das unidades AVAC/R.

Name: Hi-Tech Finishing Ltd Wolverhampton
Description:
Hi-Tech Finishing provide a high quality‚ fast and cost effective polishing operation for a wide cross–section of components and parts. The companies reputation has provided continual growth to the extent that they are now one of the most respected operators in the United Kingdom and claim several blue chip companies amongst their customer base.
Hi-Tech Finishing helps clients enhance their business through the use of innovative‚ cost effective product design. Tackling the complete design process from creative concept generation and visualisation through to elegant mechanical detailing and design for manufacture. Rapid development times with superbly styled and engineered solutions.

Name: AXE Promotion
Description:
AXE Promotion specjalizuje się w wycinaniu laserowym przy zastosowaniu najnowocześniejszych systemów.
Naszym priorytetem jest dostarczyć produkt najwyższej jakości w jak najkrótszym czasie.
Aby sprostać wysokim wymaganiom rynku oraz naszych klientów do procesu cięcia wykorzystujemy wycinarkę laserową typu FIBER, która jest obecnie najbardziej innowacyjny na rynku. Jako pierwsi w Polsce zakupiliśmy laser światłowodowy o mocy 10 kW KIMLA.

Name: Slipehuset AS
Description:
Hos oss tar vi sliping til nye høyder! Med ekspertise innen sliping for industrien, kokker og hverdagslige behov, er vi de rette til å gi liv til dine verktøy. Enten det er kniver som trenger presisjon eller frisørsakser som trenger skarphet, er vi her for å levere førsteklasses slipetjenester.

Vi streber etter å forbedre ytelsen til dine verktøy og redusere kostnadene ved å forlenge deres levetid. Ikke bare tar vi oss av kniver og frisørsakser, men vi sliper også en rekke andre gjenstander som trenger den rette skjærekanten.

Name: Armadillo Metal Coatings
Description:
Introducing Armasmart - Ground-breaking door hardware that eliminates over 99% of viruses and other harmful microbes, including those that cause COVID-19.

Armadillo has developed and patented a smart additive technology that can be applied within an existing metallic plating process to provide excellent in-service protection.

Why choose Armasmart?
● Kills over 99% of viruses including SARS-CoV-2 (as verified in a Cat 3 testing facility)
● Greater than 10x times corrosion resistance in a high UV Humidity chamber compared to Copper
● Greater than 10x times corrosion resistance in a Salt Spray chamber compared to Copper

Armadillo is proud to partner with UAP Ltd, a renowned leader in the door hardware industry with an unrivalled reputation for product excellence, innovation and quality. 
 
When you choose the new Armasmart product range, you can rest assured that you will benefit from the synergy between Armadillo’s cutting-edge technology and UAP’s unparalleled expertise in door hardware. 

We bring you a winning combination that delivers outstanding performance, durability, and style.

 Sustainable. Strategic. Future focused.

Description: At QT International Trading W.L.L, we pride ourselves on being a dynamic and innovative player in the dismantling, demolition, metals trading, and marine services. Name: East Side Plating
Description:
With over 75 years of experience, East Side Plating in Portland, OR is a trusted leader in metal surface finishing services, helping businesses enhance the durability, appearance, and performance of their parts. As a one-stop shop for plating, powder coating, polishing, and laser marking, we serve businesses of all sizes, delivering high-quality results that meet industry standards. Our customer-focused approach ensures precise finishes and timely delivery, making us a reliable partner in the manufacturing process.

Since our founding, we have continually expanded our services and capabilities to meet the changing needs of our customers. What started as a small job shop has evolved into a full-service surface finishing company, offering proven plating, powder coating, and polishing solutions. Over the decades, we have invested in surface finishing technologies, allowing us to provide cutting-edge solutions that extend the life and functionality of parts.

As a responsible Pacific Northwest company, we take environmental stewardship seriously. When you choose East Side Plating, you’re partnering with an experienced team that prioritizes quality, efficiency, and customer satisfaction. Name: SAS CAPY
Description:
SAS CAPY Récupération de fers et métaux depuis 1983
Installation classée pour la protection de l'environnement

La récupération et le recyclage sont le cœur de notre métier. Nous attachons une importance particulière à vous apporter un service de qualité. Tous nos services et prestations sont ouverts aux professionnels et aux particuliers.

La récupération des ferrailles et des métaux : 
Nous rachetons vos ferrailles et métaux en vue de leur recyclage. La récupération s’effectue de diverses façons en fonction de vos besoins. 

La vente de fer neuf et de fer de réemploi : 
Notre magasin de fer neuf dispose de stock permanent de poutrelles, profilés et tôles. Nous proposons également la vente de ferrailles d’occasion (fer de réemploi). 

La déconstruction de Véhicule Hors d’Usage (VHU) : 
Centre agréé pour la déconstruction de véhicules hors d'usage, nous effectuons l'enlèvement gratuit sur tout le Bassin d’Arcachon et le nord des Landes des véhicules destinés à la destruction. Nous prenons en charge les véhicules de fourrières. Nous gérons les démarches administratives pour la “désimmatriculation” des véhicules et nous vous assistons dans la gestion des dossiers à problème. 

La destruction et le démantèlement :
Nous intervenons sur des démolitions et démantèlements de sites industriels et structures métalliques de tout type. Cette activité est une source de récupération de ferrailles et de métaux. Nous assurons aussi le démantèlement de bateaux.
 
La location de bennes à déchets : 
Nous réalisons la collecte de vos déchets banals et déchets non dangereux en bennes via la mise à disposition de bennes sur vos chantiers, dans vos magasins ou à votre domicile pour collecter vos déchets (tout venant, bois, palettes, cartons, gravats, ...)

La SAS CAPY est engagée envers la qualité et la transparence pour assurer une traçabilité de tous vos déchets. Nous répondons aux exigences de la QSE (Qualité Sécurité Environnement).

Name: VEP87 - Verniciatura a Polvere
Description:
Nasciamo a Sassuolo, nel cuore del vivace polo ceramico mondiale.
L’intuizione ci è venuta nell’ormai lontano 1987, quando abbiamo compreso che le industrie locali necessitavano di rifinire i propri prodotti con una verniciatura di pregio, oltre che dalla resistenza impeccabile.

É iniziata così la nostra avventura al servizio di conto terzi, con un percorso di crescita che negli anni ci ha portato ad integrare il portafoglio clienti e servizi, mantenendo la nostra impiantistica al passo col settore e investendo in manodopera sempre più specializzata.

Nel 2000 abbiamo inaugurato il primo impianto in Italia di Verniciatura a Polvere per MDF, pionieristico per l’industria di quegli anni. 

Nel 2023 abbiamo portato il nostro impianto al livello successivo, dotandoci dei più recenti sistemi di automazione industriale 4.0.

Oggi, con uno staff di 20 professionisti e più di 30 anni di consolidata esperienza, perseveriamo nel quotidiano impegno di garantire un servizio di verniciatura completo sotto ogni aspetto, curato con professionalità in ciascuna fase.

Nasza przewaga? To ludzie. Technicy, doradcy i specjaliści, którzy wierzą, że sukces klienta to również nasz sukces. Wierzymy w relacje, które budują się na zaufaniu, rzetelności i wspólnych celach.

Name: Integrated Heat Treating Solutions (IHTS)
Description:
Integrated Heat Treating Solutions provides its customers with complete “Lean-Integrated” Heat Treating Solutions that are concurrently engineered with their customers’ lean part manufacturing processes, all in the proper sequence of operations; from optimizing the part design and material selection that is “upstream” of heat treating, to the elimination of the waste downstream of heat treating. IHTS consultants assist the part designer to select the optimal raw material to obtain the needed mechanical properties; whether wrought, forged, powdered metal or cast raw material, the goal is to provide better wear resistance, longer cyclic fatigue life, better corrosion resistance, higher power density, etc., all at a total lower cost of manufacture.

IHTS assists the customers with concurrent engineering of “upstream” machining and fabricating steps before heat treatments, as well as all “downstream” steps after heat treating, with due consideration for all of the “intended” as well as the “unintended” end-use requirements for the part. IHTS will also help with considerations for additive or subtractive manufacturing of the part for the specific end-use, in the proper sequence of operations relative to heat treating. By examining each and every step of the part making value stream, as it relates to the heat treating processes, IHTS consultants help to specify the optimal heating and cooling processes and the optimal equipment that can eliminate waste caused by the heat treating processes. IHTS works to assure that each heat treating process is truly delivering value to its customer, as well as for the part end-users, while eliminating waste “downstream” of heat treatment – part cleaning, cold straightening, hard turning, grinding, etc.

IHTS consultants recommend the optimal heating methods, whether by controlled atmosphere furnace, molten salt bath, vacuum furnace or by induction or flame heating, as well as the optimal quench cooling methods (air/gas, molten salts, oil or intensive water quench). IHTS consultants also help their clients to evaluate the heat treating services and equipment that are available to their customer; either within a part maker’s organization (their “captive” heat treat department), or at a high quality commercial heat treater, such as ASTC. If a particular part heat treatment can be integrated into the part-machining cell or forging operation for single part flow, IHTS teaming partners can assist with the sourcing of the needed methods and equipment that are optimized to each part.

Name: Sakhtafza (سخت افزا)
Description:
شرکت عملیات حرارتی سخت افزا در سال 1368 با همت فارغ التحصیلان نخبه رشتههای متالورژی و مکانیک دانشگاه صنعتی اصفهان و با هدف ارتقاء کیفیت قطعات صنعتی ساخت داخل تاسیس شد. این شرکت در 35 سال گذشته با تکیه بر دانش علمی و فنی اعضا در راستای هدف فوق همت گمارده و تجهیزات لازم برای اجرای عملیات حرارتی حجمی و سطحی و نیز پوششهای محافظ سطح (مقاوم به سایش) را خریداری کرده و یا ساخته است. 
Sakhtafza Heat Treatment Company was established in 1989 with the efforts of elite graduates of metallurgy and mechanics of Isfahan University of Technology with the aim of improving the quality of domestically manufactured industrial parts. In the past 35 years, relying on the scientific and technical knowledge of its members, in line with the above goal, this company has purchased or manufactured the necessary equipment for volume and surface heat treatment, as well as surface protective coatings (wear-resistant).

Name: Mi.Va. Srl
Description:
Mi.Va. S.r.l. Microfusioni è un'azienda a conduzione familiare nata a Valenza nel 1989, affermata come leader nella microfusione di metalli preziosi per l’oreficeria. Sin dalla sua nascita, l'azienda ha mantenuto una costante attenzione alla qualità, all'innovazione e alla soddisfazione del cliente, valori che le hanno permesso di costruire una solida reputazione nel settore.

Mi.Va. S.r.l si distingue per la sua capacità di unire l'artigianalità tradizionale alle più moderne tecnologie di produzione, garantendo prodotti di altissima precisione e qualità. Integrità, competenza e discrezione sono valori alla base dell’azienda, che hanno permesso di instaurare rapporti di fiducia duraturi con i clienti. 

Al centro della filosofia di Mi.Va. S.r.l vi sono innovazione e sviluppo tecnologico: l'azienda investe continuamente in ricerca e sviluppo per migliorare i propri processi e introdurre le nuove tecnologie e macchinari, mantenendosi sempre all'avanguardia nel settore della microfusione. 

Mi.Va. S.r.l. si distingue proprio per la capacità di combinare artigianalità e innovazione tecnologica, offrendo tutte le attività complementari alla microfusione, cioè la produzione di cere, la realizzazione di stampi in gomma e la prototipazione. 

L’utilizzo di una vasta gamma di leghe permette alla ditta un approccio molto soddisfacente alle richieste del cliente e alle fusioni dei vari colori dell’oro, bianco, giallo, rosa, si aggiungono fusioni in argento, bronzo, acciaio e infine, ma molto importante, fusione di platino, per oggetti di grande pregio e fusioni al palladio (oro nichel free).

Grazie a questa combinazione di innovazione tecnologica, capacità e dedizione di tutti i collaboratori, l'azienda è in grado di adattarsi alle diverse esigenze del mercato, producendo articoli che rispettano i più alti standard.

Name: MetalcoCNC
Description:
Vision 

Our vision is based on continuous improvement and overcoming the barriers imposed by traditional policies in this industry. We can adapt to times of crisis and manage them efficiently, as demonstrated by our algorithm that eliminates production interruptions.

Metalco CNC's journey towards organic growth began in 2019, driven by our unwavering commitment to deliver exceptional service to our valued customers. This dedication has not gone unnoticed as we have received a number of recommendations and recognitions from industry peers.

For those who dare to embrace the future and break through conventional boundaries, we are catalysts, providing access to the benefits of the present and promising an even brighter future. Together, we celebrate shared success on this remarkable journey.

Mission

Our mission is to empower the industry by establishing a robust supply chain. In the current business environment, the need for adaptability, precision and fast delivery has become essential for manufacturing companies. We are driven by a pioneering spirit and strive to set the benchmark for excellence. We value speed, economy, punctuality and an unwavering commitment to delivering world-class quality.

Our dedication extends to maintaining stability in disrupted supply chains. We go beyond traditional roles and actively contribute to the recovery of affected companies and regions, with the firm goal of preventing market imbalances. Our unwavering commitment to balance extends beyond the industry to the communities that depend on it.

Name: Einhäupl Plus
Description:
Ihr Spezialist für Korrosionsschutz und Autokrane

EINHÄUPL zählt zu den größten Unternehmen in Deutschland für Feuerverzinkung mit großem Zinkbecken. Von kleinsten Schrauben bis zu großen Stahlkonstruktionen wie Parkhäuser - mit unserer technologisch modernen Anlage verzinken wir alle Ihrer Bauteile. 

In unseren Beschichtungsanlagen werden Ihre Teile in einem Arbeitsgang – ohne Drehen und Wenden und sozusagen aus demselben Farbtopf – bearbeitet. Selbstverständlich werden wir die zu beschichtenden Oberflächen normgerecht vorbereiten – entweder durch strahlen oder „sweepen“ (mit nichtmetallischem Strahlgut).

Unsere moderne Fahrzeugflotte im Autokranservice bietet vom 25t-Kran bis zum 250t-Kran das richtige Arbeitsgerät für jedes Ihrer Projekte. Gerne beraten wir Sie individuell und sorgen dafür, dass Ihnen keine Last zu schwer ist.

Unsere drei Standorte und Leistungsbereiche lassen uns flexibel und äußerst effizient arbeiten. In unseren großen Arbeitshallen arbeiten wir unabhängig von der Witterung und nach strukturierten Abläufen. In Zusammenarbeit mit unserer Logistik profitieren Sie so von schnellen Lieferzeiten und fairen Terminierungen.

Name: MIEXAL Extrusión
Description:
State-of-the-art 650 TN extrusion line (built in 2022), for 4’’ billets with capacity to produce profiles from 40 per meter. Profile thickness from 0,8mm. Profile length up to 6 meters. Alloy options: 6005 6060 6063 6082.

We also manufacture aluminum profile separator platens with thermoplastic insertion resistant to high temperatures and long-lasting. It doesn’t scratch or erode the profile. It can be used in an automatic stacker or as a profile row separator. There are two models, flat and tubular, for high weight profiles.

In addition, in our factory we have injection presses ranging from 60 to 500 TN, which allow us to inject thermoplastics up to a weight of 1400 grams.

Na jarenlange ervaring bij Ploegmakers en Gritstra en het zien van de behoefte van onze klanten aan betere brandwerende coating kwaliteit, besloot ik Jordy van Grinsven, een nieuw bedrijf op de markt te lanceren.  Ik ga zelf toezicht houden en zorgen dat werk volgens aanvraag verloopt. Naast het eigen bedrijf blijf ik zeker @Ploegmakers ondersteunen.

Hieronder wil ik Brandwerende Coating introduceren zodat klanten weten wat Brandwerende coating inhoud. 

Passieve bescherming van staalconstructies is essentieel voor de veiligheid bij brand. In een gevaarlijke situatie die de omgeving en de mensen in het gebouw bedreigt, neemt het volume van de verf onder invloed van hitte 40 tot 200 keer toe. Brandwerende coating is een speciale verf of coating die wordt aangebracht op materialen om ze te beschermen tegen vuur en hitte. U bereikt een brandwerendheid van 30, 60, 90 of 120 minuten conform de Europese normen. Bij temperaturen van 400 tot 700 graden Celsius, waarbij in het geval van staal een kritieke toestand wordt bereikt, wordt het risico op gezondheidsrisico's door instorting van het gebouw geminimaliseerd en kunnen de mensen in het gebouw snel genoeg worden geëvacueerd.

Daarnaast zijn we er voor organisaties die de volledige uitvoering van een project willen uitbesteden. Wij gaan op zoek naar de grenzen van de techniek en bieden nieuwe inzichten en innovatieve oplossingen die de maakbaarheid van samenstellingen verbetert en met heel veel precisie gemaakt worden. 

Onze visie
Wij gaan voor goud. We willen de beste kwaliteit leveren. Dat is onze focus. En dat gaat niet zomaar. Wij blijven nadenken. Is dit echt hoe het gemaakt moet worden? Hoe kunnen we de maakbaarheid verbeteren? Hoe kan het beter? Slimmer? Makkelijker? Zeker wanneer grotere series gemaakt worden. Wij gaan pragmatisch op onderzoek uit. We spelen met mogelijkheden en leren proefondervindelijk wat wel of niet werkt. Niet door theorie, maar door goed te kijken in de praktijk. We blijven doorzetten om samen tot de beste oplossing te komen.

We pay attention to detail, since we are used to work with precision and we can fit to any specification. We make it our business to understand the customer needs, what he wants and why he wants it. Name: Erogal
Description:
Elektrolytisch verzinken heeft als doel de metalen onderdelen te beschermen tegen corrosie. Ook uit decoratieve overwegingen kan dit worden aangebracht. Door middel van elektrolyse wordt zink aangebracht en zo krijgt het onderdeel een glanzend uitzicht. Daarna wordt de zinklaag gepassiveerd in een van volgende kleuren: wit, dickschicht of zwart. Hierna kan, indien gevraagd, nog een bijkomende seal worden aangebracht om hogere corrosiebestendigheid te bekomen.

De afwerking wordt zowel in trommel als in hangwerk uitgevoerd. In ons goed uitgerust labo worden dagelijks de nodige controles uitgevoerd en kunnen we ook zelf zoutneveltesten uitvoeren. Ook onze waterzuiveringsinstallatie wordt steeds op de voet gevolgd. 

Samen met onze leveranciers worden de nieuwste technologieën opgevolgd en streven we ernaar vragen van de klanten optimaal te beantwoorden.

Erogal onderscheidt zich binnen de galvanowereld omwille van de sterke kwaliteit, flexibiliteit (3-ploegen), technische kennis en jarenlange ervaring.

Name: Ngb Recuperacao E Comercio De Metais

Com gestão pautada na Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos (PNRS), a NGB conta com um processo de produção que atende todos os requisitos e normas, fornece Certificado de Reciclagem com as respectivas destinações e controle de rastreamento do resíduo.

A NGB Reciclagem tem o compromisso de entregar o contratado com o cliente dentro dos prazos estabelecidos, cumprindo todos os processos e formalizações determinadas pela legislação vigente, produzindo resultados positivos para o cliente, empresa e meio ambiente.

A NGB Reciclagem fornece de maneira responsável produtos e serviços relacionados à coleta, transformação e reciclagem de resíduos ferrosos e não ferrosos, por meio de constante aperfeiçoamento do processo de produção, dos sistemas de gestão da qualidade e gestão ambiental, com foco no atendimento das necessidades e expectativas de seus clientes e fornecedores, com respeito ao meio ambiente.

As matérias primas originadas de uma correta atividade de desmontagem, separação e classificação, são tratadas ou destinadas a parceiros homologados por critérios da NGB Reciclagem e de seus respectivos clientes geradores. Dessa maneira, a NGB Reciclagem entende que o instituto da corresponsabilidade, instituído na legislação vigente (PNRS), implica em documentar e acompanhar a destinação de seus resíduos, mantendo a rastreabilidade de todo o processo.

Nos expertises :

Mesure de tension de surface : Vérification du niveau de dégraissage et de l’adhérence des traitements de surface à l’aide d’encres test.
Audit et préconisation : Optimisation des procédés de nettoyage, réduction des contaminations croisées et amélioration de la qualité des pièces.
Emballage en salle propre ISO 5 : Protection des pièces après nettoyage pour garantir leur intégrité jusqu’à leur utilisation finale.
Pourquoi externaliser le nettoyage de vos pièces ?

Assurer une propreté conforme aux exigences normatives et industrielles

Optimiser les coûts en évitant l’investissement dans du matériel dédié
Libérer les ressources internes pour se concentrer sur le cœur de métier
S’appuyer sur une expertise et des équipements spécialisés

Name: Viemetall Galvanic GmbH
Description:
Viemetall Galvanic GmbH, founded in April 2025, took over the operations, customer base, and technical know-how of the former Viemetall, a company with 75 years of experience in metal galvanizing.

The objective is clear: to preserve local expertise by retaining key operators, while introducing new standards of quality, efficiency, and traceability.

The company specializes in electrolytic surface treatments for metal parts:

Zinc

Zinc-nickel

Passivation

Sealing

These processes are available through rack plating (discontinuous mode) and barrel plating, allowing Viemetall to serve a wide range of applications, particularly small to medium-sized production series, with a strong focus on customization.

Based in Viersen (North Rhine-Westphalia), Viemetall Galvanic GmbH positions itself as a reliable, agile, and committed industrial partner for demanding sectors such as automotive, construction, tooling, and precision components.

Name: SARL BARDEY

Qualité, réactivité et devis gratuit.

Les différents traitements possibles : 
 

Décapage en traitement par immersion ou par pulvérisation.
Passivation en traitement par immersion ou par pulvérisation.
Polissage électrolytique
 

Toutes ces opérations permettront d'augmenter la durée de vie de vos produits

 

Nous disposons de nombreuses références dans :

l’industrie, l'agroalimentaire, l'automobile, le nucléaire ....etc.

Nous répondrons avec réactivité et rigueur à vos contraintes techniques et esthétiques.

Name: Grupo Kataforesis
Description:
Grupo Kataforesis was founded in 1998 as an initiative by a group of businesspeople from the automotive sector.

We are a group of three companies engaged in coating metal parts with an autonomous and independent way of operating and managing. We work for different sectors such as: Automotive, motorcycle, construction, hardware and urban furniture, among others.

We are dedicated to the provision of paint coating services, which include a wide range of applications such as cataphoresis, liquid painting and powder coating.

We have presence at European level serving our customers in Western Europe from our plants in Spain and Eastern Europe from our plant in the Czech Republic.

Euskal Kataforesis is located in Iurreta, in the province of Biscay, in an ideal strategic point to serve customers in the north of the country. In EKT we have the latest technology in application by cataphoresis.

Kataforesis Burgos is located in Burgos, in an ideal strategic point to serve customers in the north and center of the country. In KTB we have the latest technology in applications by cataphoresis, liquid painting and powder coating.

Kataforesis Ceská Republika is located in Dasice, Bohemia's area between Hradec Kralove and Pardubice, strategic point to serve the markets of Poland, Germany, Austria, Slovakia and Hungary. In KTCz we have the latest technology in application by cataphoresis. We have large warehouses which ensure an excellent logistic service.

Nel corso degli anni, l’attività si è distinta per un costante sviluppo in termini di innovazione e produttività.

Una crescita caratterizzata:

 • in seguito, dall’installazione di nuovi macchinari come un robot automatico per le operazioni di sbavatura e taglio, nuovi macchinari per il trattamento termico dell’alluminio fino ai forni di solubilizzazione

 • e da importanti commesse per rinomate aziende del settore automotive.

In poco più di dieci anni, Temprall è cresciuta diventando leader nel settore del trattamento termico delle leghe leggere, specializzandosi anche nelle attività di sbavatura, sabbiatura, raddrizzatura e impregnazione.

Da sempre leader nei trattamenti di tempra bainitica, la S.T.T. si occupa di tutti i trattamenti termici degli acciai. 

Per trattamento termico di un acciaio s’intende il ciclo termico di riscaldamento effettuato in determinate condizioni e temperature a cui devono seguire raffreddamenti più o meno controllati con lo scopo di far assumere all’acciaio quelle strutture cristalline che gli conferiscono determinate proprietà meccaniche e/o tecnologiche.

Nella nostra officina troverete l’attenzione e la disponibilità di cui avete bisogno. I nostri tecnici sono a Vostra disposizione per cercare di risolvere sempre al meglio ogni tipo di problema legato ai trattamenti termici ed alla tipologia dei materiali.

Per avere maggiori informazioni tecniche e qualititative sul lavoro da noi svolto rimandiamo al seguente articolo pubblicato sulla rivista "Quaderni Tecnologici" del mese di ottobre 2002 TRATTAMENTI TERMICI PER GLI STAMPI CONSIDERAZIONI E CONSIGLI di Franco Trombetta.

qnl.nl

qnl.nl

qnl.nl

qnl.nl

Onze meerwaarde

Als afgestudeerden van de Leidse Instrumentmakers School (LiS) combineren we diepgaande technische kennis met praktische ervaring. We begrijpen zowel de theoretische onderbouwing als de praktische toepassing van uw ideeën en vertalen deze naar werkbare oplossingen.
qnl.nl

Voor wie we werken

Onze klanten zijn onder andere universiteiten, onderzoeksinstituten, technische bedrijven en het MKB. We hebben ervaring met diverse sectoren, waaronder de medische technologie, hightech industrie en kunststofonderzoek.
qnl.nl

Waarom kiezen voor QNL Manufacturing?

Persoonlijke benadering: We werken nauw met u samen en denken actief mee in uw ontwikkeltraject.
qnl.nl

Kwaliteit en precisie: Onze werkplaats is uitgerust met hoogwaardige machines en gereedschappen van topmerken.
qnl.nl

Flexibiliteit: We kunnen snel inspelen op uw wensen en leveren op maat gemaakte oplossingen.

qnl.nl

Name: Industrial Precision Coatings, Inc.
Description:
IPC is the most versatile metal finishing company in New England. Since 1980, the company has grown in both size and capabilities and has built an outstanding reputation in the painting, powder coating, stenciling, and silk screening fields. For over three decades, we have delivered quality finished products over a wide variety of applications. Industrial spray painting is our specialty and we are passionate about helping you meet your deadline. 

Since 1980, Industrial Precision Coatings has been building an extensive quality control program. We have improved our Military Coating System to include the C.A.R.C. (Chemical Agent Resistant Coating). In order to fully comply with missile command specifications MIS-20007 and MIS-37252, fully qualified MIL-SPEC materials are used. We have been surveyed and approved to the mil-I-45208a inspection system requirements for all government projects. The same high standards are being maintained in our calibration system which meets the requirements of MIL-STD 45662.

Our brand new state of the art powder coating facility has been constructed separately from our current operation to avoid any airborne contamination. It is fully equipped with a 270-foot conveyor, on-line convection oven, temperature controlled environment, and electronically controlled spray guns. Our new powder facility is backed by technical support from the nation's leading powder manufacturers. Powder coating is not for all applications, but by adding it to our already existing liquid process we can service a full range of customers' needs.

Name: Brändle Präzisionsteile GmbH
Description:
Precision Metal Finishing – the hallmark of Brändle Präzisionsteile GmbH for more than 60 years.

Our components are used in mechanical engineering, aerospace, hydraulics, motorsports, and many other industries where reliability and dimensional accuracy are essential.

Our core competencies include honing, deep hole drilling, and combined machining processes that meet the highest standards for surface finish and geometric precision. From single-part production and small series to complex prototypes, we deliver components that stand out both technically and economically.

We machine virtually all industrial materials – from Inconel, hard metal, and ceramics to hardened and coated steels.

Surface finishes of Ra < 0.05 µm and precise process control are our standard, not the exception.

Customers value our direct communication, on-time delivery, and uncompromising quality – values that define us as a family-owned, owner-managed company.

Our commitment: not theory, but results – precise, reliable, and repeatable.

Description:
Firma Fludra świadczy kompleksowe usługi z zakresu obróbki metali.

Na rynku działamy już od 1930 roku. 
W tym czasie zdążyliśmy zdobyć bardzo cenne doświadczenie, które dziś sprawia, że nie ma dla nas rzeczy niemożliwych. 

W skład naszej obecnej oferty wchodzą: wycinanie laserowe, spawanie, obróbka plastyczna,  obróbka skrawaniem, malowanie proszkowe oraz wiele innych.

Jesteśmy nowoczesnym, prężnie rozwijającym się przedsiębiorstwem z bardzo bogatą historią. 
Założycielem firmy był Jan Fludra, który w roku 1930 otworzył zakład kowalski przy ulicy Górki. W pierwotnej lokalizacji istniał on aż do roku 2006.

Stosujemy Zintegrowany Systemem Zarządzania zgodny z PN-EN ISO 9001, PN-EN ISO 14001 oraz system zarządzania jakością w spawalnictwie ISO 3834-2.

Usługi wykonujemy na podstawie dokumentacji technicznej dostarczonej przez klientów lub stworzonej przez pracowników firmy. Dzięki bardzo rozbudowanej ofercie zapewnimy kompleksowe usługi z zakresu obróbki metali.

Name: Metalúrgica Aurélio
Description:
Em 02/08/1999 a Família Aurélio começou uma história de comprometimento e qualidade em Santa Rosa.

José e Iria inicialmente tiveram mercado, em 2005 iniciaram no ramo de eventos, ampliando em 2011 seus negócios com o restaurante Empresarial.

Com o sucesso alcançado e consolidado no ramo da alimentação, José com seu olhar empreendedor, deixou a esposa Iria no comando dos negócios do ramo de alimentação e foi em busca de novos mercados iniciando assim em 02/01/2019 a Metalúrgica Aurélio.

A empresa iniciou com o propósito de prestador de serviços com apenas 06 colaboradores, visionários e empreendedores buscaram lugar no mercado investindo em máquinas e mão de obra qualificada, em pouco tempo conquistaram confiança de grandes empresas no setor rodoviário ( usinas de asfalto) , pela sua Qualidade, pontualidade e principalmente pelo respeito a seus colaboradores.

Hoje a empresa conta com 38 colaboradores numa área fabril de 2500 metros quadrados, contemplando todos os processos: corte laser e plasma, dobra, usinagem, caldeiraria e pintura.

Nosso parque de máquinas moderno, nos permite entregar produtos de altíssima qualidade com precisão e eficiência.

Na Usiffer, cada projeto é uma parceria. Trabalhamos lado a lado com nossos clientes para entender suas necessidades específicas, garantindo que cada peça atenda aos mais rigorosos padrões de qualidade, sempre com preços competitivos. Nosso compromisso é com a inovação contínua e a satisfação do cliente, posicionando-nos como referência no setor.

Junte-se a nós no LinkedIn e descubra como a Usiffer pode elevar o padrão das suas operações industriais.

Name: SONITHERM
Description:
Sonitherm is a SME active in the heat treatment of metals since 1999.
Our speciality is the hardening of steel for armament, tooling and precision mechanics. Some of our customers are also active in fields related to the automotive or aerospace industries.

The use of molten salt baths allows the highest quality in terms of homogeneity and repeatability of the heat treatment. Our processes also ensure reduced deformation.

Our strengths are the quality of our work, the flexibility and the rapidity of our treatments (from 24 to 48 hours except for the treatments carried out externally (1 to 2 weeks)) 

With its long experience, Sonitherm can also advise and guide you in the choice of steels and treatments best suited to your applications or your customers' requirements.

With our network of partners, we can also offer you complementary treatments such as: gas or ionic nitriding (plasma), carburizing, carbonitriding, nitrocarburizing, surface hardening by induction.

Name: CERTIFIED METAL FINISHING INC
Description: Certified Metal Finishing, Inc., located at 1420 S.W. 28th Ave, Pompano Beach, FL 33069, is a premier metal finishing company with over 43 years of expertise. We specialize in delivering high-quality surface treatments for the military, defense, and aerospace industries, offering services such as Chromic Anodize (Type I), Sulfuric Anodize (Type II), Hardcoat Anodize (Type III), Chromate Conversion Coatings, Passivation of Stainless Steel, Vacuum Impregnation, and advanced testing (e.g., humidity, salt fog). Our state-of-the-art facility, equipped with tanks ranging from 24 x 24 x 36 inches to 96 x 48 x 60 inches, supports a wide range of part sizes, ensuring precision and reliability. CMF holds NADCAP accreditation for chemical processing (AC7108), a globally recognized standard managed by the Performance Review Institute (PRI), alongside ISO 9001 and AS9100 certifications. This underscores our commitment to the highest quality and safety standards, making us a trusted supplier for critical aerospace and defense components. Our mission is to deliver unbeatable quality, attentive customer service, and trusted turnaround times, driving innovation to enhance national security and industry leadership.With a dedicated team, we foster a safe, collaborative workplace, investing in employee training and advanced technology. We are exploring expansion, including new facilities and processes like painting or critical chemical treatments, to meet growing demands. Our values—excellence, integrity, and sustainability—guide us in serving clients, creating jobs in Florida, and contributing to the community. For more, contact us at (954) 979-0707 or info@certifiedmetalfinishing.com.

Galvano Market sektörü ve müşteri doğru analiz ederek, mühendislik çözümleri sunan sektöründe lider global markalarla iş birlikleri kurmuş ve distribütörlük anlaşmaları yapmıştır.

Metallerin yüzey işlem süreçlerinin filtreleme, arıtma, geri dönüşüm, sıvıların ısıtılması, soğutulması ve kontrolünde, ihtiyaca özel plastik malzemelerin tedariğinde, yüksek teknolojik elektro kaplama işlemi ekipmanlarının tedariğinde, ultrasonik temizleme cihazlarının tedariğinde kaliteli ürün ve sürdürülebilir mühendislik hizmeti sunmaktadır.

Neem de proef op de som; we bewijzen ons graag met een kleine opdracht.

Name: Meja
Description:
Een goede poedercoating kan een product maken of breken. Het is de extra laag die het product tot leven brengt. Van koud en kaal metaal, naar volle kleur. 

Jij ontwerpt met aandacht en ontwikkelt met vakmanschap. De kleurlaag verdient hetzelfde. Zodat het hele proces ervoor zorgt dat design echt gaat werken. 

Het liefst starten we bij het einde: bekijken eerst het geheel en kijken daarna naar de losse onderdelen. Om zo verder te kunnen denken aan een op maat gemaakt plan. Want geen product is hetzelfde. Dus wij zeggen weg met dat uniforme lopendebandwerk! Laten we slim zijn in productie en transport. In assemblage en verpakking. In de kleur- en coating- keuze. Alleen zo wordt het verschil gemaakt. 

Wij durven onszelf inmiddels echte kleurexperts te noemen. We delen de nieuwste kleurtrends in design, interieur en industrie dan ook graag met iedereen die het horen wil. Of horen moet. 

Met eerlijk vakmanschap en een scherp oog voor detail doen wij bij Meja iedere dag waar we goed in zijn en waar we blij van worden. 

Het bedrijf wordt al vier generaties met veel plezier gerund door familie Jansen. Dat unieke familiegevoel leeft binnen het hele Meja team. Onze klanten, die zien we net zo. We weten wat we aan elkaar hebben, zeggen waar het op staat en werken vanuit vertrouwen. 

Niks eenheidsworst maar bijzonder handwerk voor unieke producten. Met zo min mogelijk waste, chemicaliën en geneuzel. Beter voor het milieu, jouw product en onze samenwerking. 

Samen met Meja vorm jij een kleurrijk en ijzersterk team.

Seit Frühjahr 2017 produzieren wir unsere Produkte in unserer neuen Betriebsstätte in Pommersfelden, Gewerbegebiet Limbach.


Unser familiengeführtes Unternehmen ist robust und branchenunabhängig aufgebaut. Wir wollen das traditionelle Hierarchiedenken aufbrechen und unserer Mannschaft den Raum geben sich selbst kreativ einzubringen und zu entfalten. Egal ob Metall-Profi oder Metall-Neuling – für uns ist die Motivation und der soziale Faktor viel wichtiger. So konnten wir in der Vergangenheit schon motivierte Mitarbeiter aus komplett anderen Bereichen als Quereinsteiger gewinnen und längerfristig anstellen – all dies in Hinblick auf beste Qualität und Kundenzufriedenheit!

Onze drie kernactiviteiten:
 Metaalconstructies – Prefabricatie van staalstructuren in eigen atelier, inclusief montage op locatie.
 Industriële piping – Prefabricatie van leidingtrajecten en nauwkeurig geplaatst on site.
 Stralen & industriële coating – Industriële oppervlaktebehandeling voor duurzame bescherming.

Dankzij ons eigen technisch tekenbureau gespecialiseerd in 3D-modellering, bieden we een geïntegreerde aanpak, van ontwerp tot uitvoering. Deze aanpak resulteert in betrouwbare doorlooptijden, technische precisie en een efficiënte projectopvolging.

Onze vaste kern van gespecialiseerde medewerkers zorgt voor continuïteit, kwaliteit en een hoge betrokkenheid op elke werf.

Euroweld – uw betrouwbare partner voor industriële totaaloplossingen.

Description:
At Shiv Heat Tech, we are dedicated to delivering precision vacuum heat treatment services and metallurgical process solutions that meet the highest global standards.

Our facility is equipped with advanced vacuum furnaces and process control systems, enabling us to serve demanding industries such as automotive, aerospace, tool & die, energy, and engineering. Beyond processing, our team offers metallurgical consultancy and design support, helping clients optimize heat treatment parameters, material performance, and product life.

Driven by innovation, discipline, and integrity, Shiv Heat Tech continues to be a trusted partner for industries seeking precision, reliability, and technical excellence in every cycle.

Name: Saayman Danks Electroplating C.C.
Description:
SDE operates a fleet of trucks and delivery vehicles, ensuring daily collections and deliveries across Durban's industrial areas and weekly services to Pietermaritzburg. Most customers benefit from a 24-hour turnaround, thanks to our round-the-clock operational shifts. Our facility includes a fully equipped laboratory that conducts daily tank composition checks and analyses to optimize performance and control. Additionally, we offer thickness testing and corrosion evaluation through our in-house salt spray chamber.

SDE is proud to be among the few in the industry equipped with an EDXRF Spectrometer, enabling precise analysis of metals and alloys. This advanced tool not only tests element thickness but also detects substances of concern, meeting the stringent requirements of the Motor Industry. Our fully automated Barrel Zinc plant has a production capacity exceeding 8 tons per day, catering to bulk users, while smaller barrel units handle specialized loads with precision.

Our Zinc Nickel plating line is a pioneering innovation in KwaZulu-Natal and one of the few in the country. This cutting-edge system meets the exacting standards of the Motor Industry, delivering over 35 electroplating coatings, including Electroless Nickel, Anodizing, and highly corrosion-resistant Kalgard finishes. As an ISO 9001-certified company, SDE ensures top-tier quality and reliability across its services.

Name: Betzmann Galvanik - Real Gold
Description:
Wir verkaufen hochmoderne Geräte für die mobile und stationäre Galvanik (Stift- und Tampongalvanik) an Jedermann und das komplette Zubehör von der Elektrode bis zum Gold- oder Chromelektrolyt.  Auch vergolden oder veredeln wir Ihre Teile mit anderen Metallen. Egal ob leitfähig oder nicht, egal welche Materialien, ob Holz oder Kunststoff, egal welche Größe, alles ist machbar.

Sie sind bei uns in jedem Fall GOLD-richtig!
Wir liefern Ihnen garantiert die passende Lösung für Ihre Vorhaben zu akzeptablen Preisen. Mit unseren Geräten können Sie zuhause und auch unterwegs Gegenstände mit sämtlichen bekannten Metallen wie Gold, Silber, Chrom, Palladium, Platin, Schwarzchrom, Rosegold und vielem mehr beschichten.

Der Vorteil? Egal wie groß, egal wo, auch in eingebautem Zustand, im Freien, direkt am Fahrzeug, im Haus. Und alles ohne Tauchbäder, ohne giftige oder gefährliche Stoffe und ohne spezielle Werkstätten oder Vorrichtungen. 
Beispiele: Schiffe und Yachten deren Messingteile ständig dem Salzwasser ausgesetzt sind, sind vergoldet davor geschützt. Badezimmeramaturen müssen nicht ausgebaut werden,somit kann das Bad während dem Vergolden noch genutzt werden. Silberschmuck der ständig anläuft kann rhodiniert werden. Unedler Edeltahlschmuck kann mit Weißgold oder Rosegold beschichtet werden. Abgewetzte Uhrenbänder, Schmuck und sonstige antiken Gegenstände können neu beschichtet werden und erstrahlen im neuen Glanz.
Weiterhin liefern wir Ihnen das komplette Zubehör und sämtliche Verbrauchsmaterialien aus der Tampon- und Stiftgalvanik.

progrind arbeitet gemeinsam mit erfahrenen und motivierten Spezialisten als zuverlässiger Partner, Lieferant sowie als Unterstützer zahlreicher  Werkzeughersteller im Bereich Präzisionsschleifen.

progrind berät, schult und stellt ganzheitliche Lösungen bereit. 
Ein breitgefächertes Schleif‐Know-How aus über 35 Jahren Erfahrung

Name: M J Bull Industrial Services Limited
Description:
M J Bull Industrial Services Ltd has been established since 1972 by the director Mr. Michael Bull. The company specialises in industrial cleaning, chemical cleaning, specialist cleaning, pickle and passivation, blasting, painting and metal work. Working for small businesses to big named brands and even working overseas, we take pride in our business and ensure that our work is always completed to the best of our abilities. All of our members of staff are trained in First Aid and have certified licences to work at height, in confined spaces and use high powered machinery and equipment.

Industrial Cleaning
We can carry out from a simple clean to an hygienic clean depending on what the standard of cleaning is required. Whether it be from removing dust and dirt from a warehouse, floor cleaning, high level cleaning, cleaning a tank, plant room, removing surface rust from metals such as stainless steel, change of products or chemical trace removal as examples.

Pickle and Passivation
We carry out a pickle and passivation process on stainless steel and provide certification. This allows the stainless steel to be de-scaled and making the surface more passive and corrosion resistant by restoring the surface of the metal to its original characteristics with a protective oxide film.

Blasting
Grit blasting, shot blasting, bead blasting etc, we can make old, tired equipment and metal work look like new again. This includes restoring brickwork whether this be on outside or inside walls, fireplaces etc. We use this technique on tanks, car frames, houses etc.

Painting
Industrial painting, specialist epoxy resin coats, tank lining and lacquer treatments. From painting a floor within a warehouse, metal pipework that needs painting, metalwork that needs anti-slip paint, the inside of a tank which needs to be re-lined, legs on a tank that need painting and specialist lacquer treatments to metals such as copper, brass or gun metal for preservation, again the list goes on!

Name: FerroWorks | Maatwerk in metaal
Description:
FerroWorks is een metaalbewerkings- en constructiebedrijf voor staal, RVS en aluminium.
Wij werken voor aannemers, projectleiders en calculators die behoefte hebben aan overzicht, duidelijkheid en zekerheid in hun staalprojecten.

Waar veel partijen instappen bij productie, beginnen wij eerder:
in het voortraject, waar keuzes worden gemaakt die grote impact hebben op prijs, planning en uitvoering.

 Dat doen we door:
- Aannames en onduidelijkheden expliciet te maken — en te vertalen naar concrete gevolgen
-Tekeningen, details en kilo’s te beoordelen op maakbaarheid en uitvoerbaarheid
- Open punten vast te leggen en samen op te lossen, vóórdat ze het project vertragen
- Technische kennis te combineren met praktijkervaring uit productie en montage

 Wat ons anders maakt
- Wij denken als partner, niet als leverancier
- Transparantie staat centraal: geen verrassingen achteraf
- We verbinden calculatie, engineering, productie en uitvoering tot één logisch geheel
- We spreken de taal van de bouw én van de werkplaats

 Het resultaat:
- Betere grip op kosten, planning en risico’s
- Minder faalkosten en minder stress tijdens het project
- Een staalconstructie die klopt — op papier én in de praktijk

Name: Betel Galvanização
Description:
Uma Jornada de Décadas na Excelência em Galvanização e Compromisso com a Inovação.

Há mais de 35 anos, a Betel Galvanização Ltda tem liderado o setor de zincagem por imersão a quente, conhecida como galvanização a fogo. Esse método eficiente de proteção contra corrosão é a base de nossa especialização, e temos orgulho em ser reconhecidos como referência nesse mercado.

Temos a Maior Cuba na Região Sul

Com uma capacidade de produção de 2000 toneladas por mês, nos destacando pela posse da maior cuba na região Sul, com dimensões impressionantes de 10m de comprimento, 2m de profundidade e 1,80m de largura. Essa infraestrutura foi projetada para atender setores diversos, incluindo Estruturas Metálicas, Irrigação, Telecomunicações, Sinalização Rodoviária, Refrigeração, Eletrificação e Iluminação. Nosso compromisso com a qualidade é evidenciado pelo cumprimento rigoroso da norma NBR 6323 (ASTM A123/ASTM A153).

Nossa Missão

Na Betel Galvanização, nossa missão é oferecer galvanização a fogo de alta qualidade, protegendo o aço contra a corrosão. Buscamos ser referência no mercado, proporcionando confiança e excelência aos clientes. Nossa visão é ser reconhecidos como líderes no segmento de galvanização a fogo, impulsionando inovações e elevando continuamente os padrões de qualidade. Nossos valores fundamentais incluem excelência, integridade, inovação, sustentabilidade, foco no cliente e comprometimento com a qualidade.

Soldas: Oferecemos serviços de soldagem especializada, para pequenos reparos ou fabricação garantindo resistência e durabilidade em todas as nossas aplicações.

Fabricações Mecânicas: Desenvolvemos e fabricamos estruturas e componentes mecânicos personalizados, atendendo aos mais altos padrões de qualidade e precisão.

Projetos 3D: Nossa equipe de designers trabalha com softwares avançados para criar modelos 3D detalhados, proporcionando visualizações precisas antes da produção.

Prototipagem 3D: Oferecemos serviços de prototipagem rápida, permitindo a criação de modelos físicos para validação e testes antes da fabricação em larga escala.

Impressão 3D: Utilizamos tecnologia de impressão 3D para produzir peças e protótipos com alta precisão e rapidez, atendendo a diversas indústrias e aplicações.

Nossa missão é fornecer soluções inovadoras e eficientes que atendam às expectativas de nossos clientes, sempre com foco na qualidade, precisão e excelência no atendimento. Estamos comprometidos com a melhoria contínua e a inovação, buscando constantemente novas tecnologias e processos para oferecer o melhor em cada projeto.

Das Firmenmotto Hug: «Edelstahl-Oberflächen von matt bis glanz» umschreibt die Produktionsprozesse. Angefangen bei einfacheren Teilen für die Industrie bis zu qualitativ hochstehenden Produkten für die Medizinaltechnik, Pharmaindustrie und Steriltechnik werden Oberflächen-behandlungen durchgeführt.

Die konsequente Qualitätsprüfung auf allen Ebenen der Oberflächenbehandlung ist der Schlüssel für den anhaltenden Erfolg der Firma. Der Umweltschutz hat einen besonderen Stellenwert: Die Firma Hug investiert laufend in Abwasseraufbereitungsanlage, Frischwasser-Aufbereitung sowie Zu- und Abluftanlage mit Wärmerückgewinnung. Die Arbeitssicherheit und Gesundheit der Belegschaft wird laufend überprüft und geschult. Mit der rigorosen Einhaltung aller Vorschriften betreffend korrekter Entsorgung von Chemikalien, Flüssigkeiten, Hilfsstoffen, Sondermüll etc. setzen wir Massstäbe, die den gesetzlichen Anforderungen weit voraus sind.

Wir sind bestrebt, jeden Tag Bestleistung zu erbringen, die Wünsche unserer Kunden nach bestem Wissen und Gewissen zu erfüllen, termingerecht erstklassige Resultate zu liefern und jeden Auftrag unter kostensparenden Aspekten abzuwickeln.

Ausschließlich qualifizierte
Lieferanten

Ein solch großes Spektrum erlaubt es, sowohl große Bauteile,
wie auch kleinste Bauteile, in höchster Präzision zu fertigen.

Eine dauernde Auseinandersetzung mit neuesten Fertigungstechnologien und Werkstoffen ermöglicht uns, Innovationen zu erkennen und für unsere Zwecke umzusetzen.

Innovationskraft, Zuverlässigkeit und Leistungsfähigkeit sind wichtige Grundwerte unserer Unternehmung.

Per informazioni o preventivi Contattaci al 0332/261670 oppure tramite E-mail a info@mcv.varese.it

Realizacja zlecenia obejmuje także montaż w dowolnym miejscu w Polsce. Nie ma dla nas żadnych ograniczeń lokalizacyjnych – wszystkie elementy Twojej nowej hali dowieziemy bezpiecznie we wskazane miejsce. Name: SUZHOU SHENLONG NEW MATERIAL TECHNOLOGY CO.,LTD
Description:
Copper-steel composite material temperature and pressure-penetration composite technology is a new technology emerging in the field of domestic metal composite strip materials, in addition to the high strength, good heat resistance, thermal stability, plasticity and corrosion resistance common to composite materials In addition to the characteristics of resistance and abrasion resistance, in the field of military bullet manufacturing, there are also the advantages of high yield and high dimensional accuracy, which are beneficial to improve the quality of bullets; the composite material has good consistency, thereby ensuring the consistency of the bullet and the shell; One batch is heavy and can be processed continuously, which greatly improves the production efficiency of bullets. The surface quality is excellent, comparable to pure copper; the brass on the surface of the copper-steel composite material also has a lubricating effect, which can reduce the impact on the barrel when shooting The wear and tear of the barrel and rim. It has been widely used in military products such as bullet shells and detonators. The sales network of military copper-steel composite materials has covered the world and won unanimous praise from many customers.


Application:
1. Military industry: Steel clad copper clad steel is used to replace the shell made of traditional steel and copper, which not only guarantees the original performance, but also has the characteristics of corrosion resistance and good surface lubrication.

2. Electronic industry: There are many gaskets in electronic components, which are strong and thin. Steel clad copper clad steel can meet the design requirements of various shapes and functions.

3. Cookware: Steel clad copper clad steel has good strength and plasticity, which greatly improves the processing efficiency of products. Copper has good magnetic conductivity, which can improve the heating efficiency and uniformity of pots.

Name: GALVAMET spol. s r.o.
Description:
GALVAMET spol. s r.o. je stabilní česká společnost specializující se na precizní tepelné zpracování kovů. Jsme spolehlivým partnerem pro výrobní a průmyslové firmy, které potřebují špičkovou kvalitu, přesnost a profesionální přístup.

 Naše hlavní služby tepelného zpracování

Provádíme široké spektrum procesů, které zajišťují pevnost, odolnost a stabilitu kovových materiálů:

Kalení – dosažení vysoké tvrdosti a pevnosti materiálu

Žíhání – snížení pnutí a optimalizace struktury materiálu

Popouštění – jemné doladění tvrdosti a houževnatosti po kalení

Cementace – vytvrzení povrchu při zachování houževnatého jádra

Nitridace – zvýšení otěruvzdornosti a životnosti povrchu

Zušlechťování – kombinace kalení a popouštění pro komplexní mechanické vlastnosti

Normalizační žíhání – sjednocení struktury a zlepšení obrobitelnosti

Další speciální procesy dle požadavků zákazníka

Naše technologie a postupy jsou navrženy tak, aby splňovaly vysoké nároky strojírenských a výrobních provozů. Díky modernímu vybavení a úzké kontrole kvality dosahujeme opakovatelných výsledků, na které je spoleh.

 Kdo jsme a jak pracujeme

Klademe důraz na detail, přesnost a férový přístup. Kombinujeme tradiční know-how s modernizací provozu, digitalizací a efektivní prací s daty. Naše flexibilita a rychlost nám umožňuje reagovat na specifické požadavky zákazníků a být stabilním partnerem pro dlouhodobé projekty.

 Co přinášíme našim zákazníkům

Stabilní a opakovatelné výsledky tepelného zpracování

Kvalitu, na kterou se mohou spolehnout i ve vysoce namáhaných aplikacích

Rychlé a profesionální jednání

Schopnost zvládat atypické nebo specifické požadavky

Podporu při optimalizaci materiálových a výrobních postupů

GALVAMET staví na hodnotách poctivosti, odbornosti a dlouhodobé důvěry. Naším cílem je, aby každý výrobek, který projde naším provozem, obstál i tam, kde se rozhoduje o bezpečnosti, výkonu a životnosti.

Name: RUBINI SRL
Description:
Rubini è un'azienda specializzata nella meccanica di precisione e attiva nel settore da 30 anni. Presso l'officina meccanica si eseguono lavori di prima qualità grazie alla sua lunga esperienza nel settore, alla disponibilità di operatori esperti e di macchine altamente tecnologiche in costante aggiornamento. 



L'azienda ha sede a Bargellino, a Calderara di Reno, e collabora con una ditta esterna che le permette di impiegare ben 12 macchine per la foratura profonda, dando a tutti i clienti l'occasione di accedere a servizi sempre più precisi e a lavorazioni altamente personalizzabili.
Si specializza nelle lavorazioni del cliente, di tornitura, foratura e fresatura dei metalli, prevalentemente da ripresa, inizialmente eseguite con macchine utensili tradizionali alle quali seguiranno le prime macchine a controllo numerico.

Anno dopo anno, la competenza e la professionalita’, consentono all’azienda di svilupparsi, sempre come conto terzista, ampliando i settori di riferimento movimento terra, riduttori e meccanica in generale.
Una strategia che l'azienda ha scelto per differenziarsi e mantenere una posizione importante sul mercato è stato l'investimento in tecnologie ancor più avanzate, come l'acquisto di macchinari Cnc a 4/5 assi con autocentranti speciali, con lunetta e contropunta in ciclo, che permettono di eseguire contemporaneamente alla tornitura altre lavorazioni quali fresature, forature con conseguente riduzione dei tempi, specializzandosi soprattutto sugli organi di trasmissione quali alberi primari, secondari, frizione;



Inoltre, ci siamo dotati di linee robotizzate per la lavorazione sia di tornitura, foratura e fresatura di ingranaggi, dotate di contro mandrino che consentono di non perdere le fasature sulle rispettive facciate del pezzo,  in grado di gestire il carico e lo scarico del pezzo da grezzo a finito e  di macchinari Cnc in grado di eseguire tutte le lavorazioni necessarie per il conseguimento del pezzo finito in un unica fase, tutto questo

Name: UCT Coatings INC
Description:
UCT COATINGS IS THE NICKEL BORON COMPANY
Nickel Boron is a wear-resistant, low friction, damage tolerant coating that is uniformly deposited on complex geometry. UCT’s Nickel Boron plating, production, engineering, and analytical capabilities are second to none in the electroless metal finishing industry. UCT is the originator of EXO, a patented, high-performance Nickel Boron coating that gives metal surfaces an extraordinary combination of hardness, abrasion resistance, and lubricity.

We specialize in all forms of nickel-based coatings, including Nickel Boron (Ni-B) and nickel phosphorous. If you are an OEM seeking to upgrade the performance of your product, or an industrial end-user working to protect metal surfaces in your operation, turn to UCT.

An derzeit 8 CNC-gesteuerten Dreh- und Fräs Bearbeitungszentren des Maschinenherstellers Yamazaki Mazak realisieren wir derzeit im 2-
Schicht-Betrieb die Wünsche und Anforderungen unserer Kunden.

Zu unserem Leistungsprogramm gehört unter anderem

· Zerspanende Fertigung von Einzel- und Serienteilen
· Zerspanende Bearbeitung von Schmiedeteilen

Das Unternehmen ist seit dem Jahr 2007 nach DIN EN ISO 9001:2008 zertifiziert.

Name: Drilha Rob, Lda
Description:
Drilha Rob Indústria, somos especialistas em soluções industriais sob medida para o setor petrolífero. Atuamos com excelência nas áreas de soldadura de estruturas metálicas (ferro, alumínio e inox), logística técnica especializada e fabricação de peças personalizadas para ambientes offshore e onshore.

Com uma equipe experiente, tecnologia de ponta e foco total em segurança e qualidade, garantimos preços competitivos sem abrir mão da eficiência e da durabilidade dos resultados.

 Nossos principais serviços:
	•	Soldadura industrial (MIG, TIG, eletrodo)
	•	Construção e usinagem de peças técnicas
	•	Logística e montagem de estruturas industriais

Name: Wello.ooo
Description:
Firma Wello działa na terenie województwa dolnośląskiego w powiecie średzkim - Gmina Miękinia. Oferuje kompleksowe usługi związane z obróbką stali, aluminium w zakresie cięcia laserowego oraz formowania krawędziowego.
Świadczymy usługi osobom prywatnym oraz podmiotom z branży przemysłowej, którym oferujemy prototypy i produkcję seryjną. Nasze zaplecze maszynowe jest przystosowane do zarówno małych, jak i dużych zamówień. Posiadamy bogate doświadczenie we współpracy w różnych branżach, takich jak budownictwo, reklama, motoryzacja, przemysł energetyczny i wiele innych.
Dysponujemy nowoczesnym parkiem maszynowym oraz zatrudniamy doświadczonych specjalistów. Sprzęt, z którego korzystamy to obecnie najbardziej zaawansowane urządzenia do cięcia blach oraz profili o różnych parametrach.
Nasze wyposażenie uzupełniają prasy krawędziowe, umożliwiające formowanie wyciętych elementów.

Name: GRW Usinagem
Description:
A GRW Usinagem Industrial fornece serviços e produtos usinados desde 2017, situada na cidade de Massaranduba - SC, paralela a Rodovia SC-108. Com o objetivo de agregar valor aos seus  produtos e clientes temos o compromissso em atender aos requisitos e especificações dos produtos e de nossos clientes, sempre focando na qualidade entregue.

Contato: grw.comercial@netuno.com.br

Name: Očistíme
Description:
Moderní způsob čištění různých povrchů od starých nátěrů, koroze i mastnoty pomocí laseru.

Stejně jako naši zákazníci jsme dlouho hledali efektivní způsob jak se zbavit koroze a starých nátěrů aniž by došlo k poškození čištěného povrchu.

Laser představuje rychlý a šetrný způsob jak očistit povrchy kovů od různých typů nátěrů, barev, laků, oxidací či koroze. Kromě kovů lze čistit i kámen, beton a to jak od různých barev, grafiti nebo třeba i mechu.

Naše zařízení je mobilní. Čištění provádíme u nás na dílně v Palkovicích. V případě větších zakázek jsme po domluvě schopni čištění provádět přímo u zákazníka.

Name: LBR Industrial Painting S.r.l.
Description: Verniciatura industriale a polvere su prodotti metallici come: Macchinari; Automazione Industriale; Automotive; Carpenterie metalliche pesanti e leggere; Arredo urbano; Cancellate; Ringhiere; Portoni; Serramenti in alluminio e ferro; Settore ferroviario; Settore Navale

Description: Jesteśmy polskim producentem szerokiej gamy artykułów metalowych na zamówienie. Realizujemy projekty klienta lub dzięki doświadczeniu proponujemy własne rozwiązania, szczególnie w produkcji stojaków reklamowych w których mamy najbogatsze doświadczenie.

Name: MPM Techmar Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Specjalizujemy się w realizacji zleceń z zakresu obróbki skrawaniem na maszynach CNC oraz obrabiarkach konwencjonalnych. Obrabiamy stal narzędziową oraz stale nierdzewne, kwasoodporne, węglowe, tworzywa sztuczne oraz metale kolorowe.

Zapraszamy do współpracy !

Zapytania można przesyłać na adres zamowienia.techmar@cncprodukcja.pl  
W razie jakichkolwiek pytań zostajemy do Państwa dyspozycji.

Name: Smederij Hiemstra
Description:
Smeedwerk:
Bij ons in de smederij brand nog dagelijks het smidsvuur, waarmee we nog "echt" handgemaakt smeedwerk maken. We gebruiken alle traditionele smeedtechnieken zoals klinken, stuiken, gaten slaan, uitpennen en de verdwenen techniek van het vuurlassen. 
In de smederij maken we siersmeedwerk, gereedschap en restauratiewerk. 
Naast dit smidswerk hebben we ook ervaring in harden en temperen van staal.
Laswerk:
Naast het traditionele smidswerk beheersen we ook de moderne lastechnieken.
Gecertificeerd Laswerk:  EN ISO  9606-1 in Lasproces 141 tig rvs en 111 elektrode basisch.
Daarnaast beheersen wij:
141 Tig aluminium
141 Tig staal
135 mag-lassen
gietijzer lassen.
Reparatie:
Zoals bij de echte dorpssmid van vroeger kan men bij ons terecht voor het repararen van alles wat van metaal is gemaakt.
Ook voor draaiwerk, freeswerk en zetwerk kunt u bij ons terecht.
